**" I'm personally asking you to help Democrats defend our Senate majority by giving just one minute of your time."
**
**\- CHUCK SCHUMER**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=5991%2E9716520%2ER1z_t9)
---
Friend, I know I don't have to tell you how narrow our majority is. Mitch McConnell only has to flip ONE seat to take back power, and he's spending MILLIONS to make that happen.
But while the GOP caters to their wealthy donors, Senate Democrats are focused on middle-class families and small businesses. YOU are our priority -- and that's why it's vital to hear from you now.
**So today, I'm inviting the most engaged grassroots Democrats -- that includes you, friend -- to take our Strategic Majority Election Survey.**
| | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=5991%2E9716520%2ER1z_t9)

Please, friend, taking just 60 seconds to respond to this exclusive priorities survey will help define how Democrats protect our Senate majority. **[Will you answer the first question right now?](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=5991%2E9716520%2ER1z_t9)**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/4465?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220820-ChuckSchumer-jtk1820-Welcome1-Pros-sl1&akid=5991%2E9716520%2ER1z_t9)

Chuck Schumer

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: #SueTheView
body:
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f673529ac7b447f48f66c54f5672fce5&_e=cLLYzBaq0zO1Yf1SszpRVVV9GP2wa5g8jsBB87PhQ-l_L2VG_WKe__hLrBG6nMQUNLIoFKQol2evlnO7GSQ4NirLszbdtT_bxmDVCO9jbU8bKDF_AEdLeg1cBHcZN0_R2uSz3W1mq7DbumVBlqEaNVKia6IzyMRlzxHhVu9dG-9mgut8WXVPRQcW-F_5cM70-pzjUKGMsZzYkoE-tqgqw2KIntp5JLvsp38zFveET-pb-Sfk_0JCjCLvvEPsCh4rxNMDbsjnuJTbCMMY_e4PbIeYM6jZr86fJJt_I5zpu1FEqf7ltjDBqaXgzU_pzp0pMQ7O5Sj_soFA1moabLZ8WyjgNWV20juaSV4xlPduuIQ%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, For years, the radical Leftists on ABC's _The View_ have smeared conservatives with impunity -- but this time, they may finally get the legal consequences they deserve. **I'm talking with attorneys RIGHT NOW about suing ABC and some of the personalities on their daytime propaganda hour after they _LIED_ about my team at Turning Point USA and our patriotic young activists by falsely claiming on national television that we're allied with "Nazis."** As we consider our legal options and defend the good name of thousands of America-loving young conservatives, can I count on your partnership as a fellow patriot? [**Help us pursue every legal remedy against these Left-wing Media Radicals by pitching in a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f673529ac7b447f48f66c54f5672fce5&_e=cLLYzBaq0zO1Yf1SszpRVVV9GP2wa5g8jsBB87PhQ-l_L2VG_WKe__hLrBG6nMQUNLIoFKQol2evlnO7GSQ4NirLszbdtT_bxmDVCO9jbU8bKDF_AEdLeg1cBHcZN0_R2uSz3W1mq7DbumVBlqEaNcUMSO6WFWIT28m9mYDcgIeDk5o09Xw47pAX6MZv6ZtPM2RWaIO7mr0PoWrfMI3xMaCaY7DTxDz-ut3w9GIVvYtlTbLpJ2yJuDMJWVChMPoz3W9epMTdJ63bOC9opKCC3n5-ytUXoXE90Em1IeG9QGrq-okN7bJUnD3XHIPy2OUVoJZSjnOVA6bRMLaxW4RK-agQjXhdZq-4gyGpi8WWMsM%3D)
---
[**Stand with Turning Point USA**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f673529ac7b447f48f66c54f5672fce5&_e=cLLYzBaq0zO1Yf1SszpRVVV9GP2wa5g8jsBB87PhQ-l_L2VG_WKe__hLrBG6nMQUNLIoFKQol2evlnO7GSQ4NirLszbdtT_bxmDVCO9jbU8bKDF_AEdLeg1cBHcZN0_R2uSz3W1mq7DbumVBlqEaNY76i5v7Ro6zwSrCIM9lqqP5up14Ocjn3okTCK8iG-y6y1-rDGOoMi5jANzjiBA91us-zciCL-_WP9WCMTouXUOD2RvmgmlPsL6hTsC6LxD0dTo7qtGux5qJxIV871-kS5MdsyhqULcC5wZT6S1C3n0tp2HmW8vpA91pMaTEcITMOrHBQsXCayhyAZa-15X_wJ-EZFV8HOJlkP9Xf7CDs84%3D)
---
The Mainstream Media LOATHES Turning Point USA and our 500,000+ America-loving students because we're the biggest threat to their stranglehold on younger generations. _That's why they're lashing out at us with VICIOUS and completely BASELESS attacks._ **You see, TPUSA recently hosted our annual Student Action Summit in Florida, where we welcomed 5,000+ young patriots for a weekend of inspirational speeches from conservative leaders, activism training, and networking.** Outside the venue, a small group of radical demonstrators unaffiliated with TPUSA protested our event. We attempted to have them removed, but as they were on public property, we could not do so. _This isn't the first time we've had an event protested by fringe radicals, and it certainly won't be the last._ But the Leftists at _The View_ saw an opportunity that they couldn't pass up -- a chance to smear Turning Point USA and our 500,000+ student activists. They claimed that these radical demonstrators -- who were _PROTESTING_ our event! -- were actually our allies. They **_LIED_** and **_FABRICATED_** a false story that I can only describe as socialist fan fiction, with Whoopi Goldberg even going so far as to claim that we "welcomed Nazis" into our event "metaphorically." [**_Can you see why we're taking a serious look at suing these smear artists -- and why we need your generous financial support to defend our good name?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f673529ac7b447f48f66c54f5672fce5&_e=cLLYzBaq0zO1Yf1SszpRVVV9GP2wa5g8jsBB87PhQ-l_L2VG_WKe__hLrBG6nMQUNLIoFKQol2evlnO7GSQ4NirLszbdtT_bxmDVCO9jbU8bKDF_AEdLeg1cBHcZN0_R2uSz3W1mq7DbumVBlqEaNS_lXMgshb0Frc_92GyJ55JW_--HzA2WJKWuvoGYR0Dpj0uDCnEq8jKwcez23--4T-QgH6cHUBjKISM0JCOeNs4UKHMFRoU8pZ_uN_2nWCcc9wr2QEgd1EXG9veGLMBQ-WcMp0WGtSJ8Szo4T1-bMP1zL371t7j-F-Xp_IxxEIg_jNwpJ08ez6FHFEcCLqrdalIagxuBhfAPvIdi0CUrJ1k%3D) Fellow Patriot, as an informed conservative, you've probably heard of Turning Point USA-- and even if you don't know us that well, you probably know that we're about one thing, and one thing only: Teaching young Americans to LOVE America and stand up for the principles that make America the GREATEST country in the history of the world. TPUSA's Student Action Summit brought together 5,000+ patriotic young people from ALL 50 states because they love our country and they believe in American Greatness. They're the FUTURE LEADERS of our Pro-Freedom, Pro-America movement -- and now _The View_ and Whoopi Goldberg have smeared and lied about them on national television! **I can promise you this: Turning Point USA and I WILL NOT back down from this fight, and we WILL stand up for our student activists. In fact, we've ALREADY sent a cease and desist letter to ABC News.** Now I'm calling on grassroots patriots like YOU to support these young people, too. [**Can I count on you to chip in $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford to help Turning Point USA defend our Student Action Summit AND our student activists?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f673529ac7b447f48f66c54f5672fce5&_e=cLLYzBaq0zO1Yf1SszpRVVV9GP2wa5g8jsBB87PhQ-l_L2VG_WKe__hLrBG6nMQUNLIoFKQol2evlnO7GSQ4NirLszbdtT_bxmDVCO9jbU8bKDF_AEdLeg1cBHcZN0_R2uSz3W1mq7DbumVBlqEaNXGbG83G_SH_NYWn7zrA1hlxPRN1h5jUelaUsG0QE2XrXLZW4MKxsso4UBMwB8Ec7b6wJ8EM38JdriNHrqmRJX7RCqwFq_oBNchI_xL7Fz1XYR8z2b7tqHBCzDWcsYZxPtfsv5onyXBc9hLD-8N5_9aIm34Wpw_XQ2Ypuw8h02B_Fw1UQYUvJkzLuvSRPz_eUSnPpQbOXtdYFxVliP85Raw%3D) These young patriots need to know that Americans have their backs!

clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, For years, the radical Leftists on ABC's The View have smeared conservatives with impunity -- but this time, they may finally get the legal consequences they deserve. I'm talking with attorneys RIGHT NOW about suing ABC and some of the personalities on their daytime propaganda hour after they LIED about my team at Turning Point USA and our patriotic young activists by falsely claiming on national television that we're allied with "Nazis." As we consider our legal options and defend the good name of thousands of America-loving young conservatives, can I count on your partnership as a fellow patriot? The Mainstream Media LOATHES Turning Point USA and our 500,000+ America-loving students because we're the biggest threat to their stranglehold on younger generations. That's why they're lashing out at us with VICIOUS and completely BASELESS attacks. You see, TPUSA recently hosted our annual Student Action Summit in Florida, where we welcomed 5,000+ young patriots for a weekend of inspirational speeches from conservative leaders, activism training, and networking. Outside the venue, a small group of radical demonstrators unaffiliated with TPUSA protested our event. We attempted to have them removed, but as they were on public property, we could not do so. This isn't the first time we've had an event protested by fringe radicals, and it certainly won't be the last. But the Leftists at The View saw an opportunity that they couldn't pass up -- a chance to smear Turning Point USA and our 500,000+ student activists. They claimed that these radical demonstrators -- who were PROTESTING our event! -- were actually our allies. They LIED and FABRICATED a false story that I can only describe as socialist fan fiction, with Whoopi Goldberg even going so far as to claim that we "welcomed Nazis" into our event "metaphorically." Fellow Patriot, as an informed conservative, you've probably heard of Turning Point USA-- and even if you don't know us that well, you probably know that we're about one thing, and one thing only: Teaching young Americans to LOVE America and stand up for the principles that make America the GREATEST country in the history of the world. TPUSA's Student Action Summit brought together 5,000+ patriotic young people from ALL 50 states because they love our country and they believe in American Greatness. They're the FUTURE LEADERS of our Pro-Freedom, Pro-America movement -- and now The View and Whoopi Goldberg have smeared and lied about them on national television! I can promise you this: Turning Point USA and I WILL NOT back down from this fight, and we WILL stand up for our student activists. In fact, we've ALREADY sent a cease and desist letter to ABC News. Now I'm calling on grassroots patriots like YOU to support these young people, too. These young patriots need to know that Americans have their backs! #SueTheView, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Who? Glad you asked. Josh was my General Counsel on the Senate Judiciary Committee from 2011 – 2014, and is now running for an open House seat in upstate New York. Even during a period of partisan gridlock, Josh and I successfully got two bills through Congress and signed by the President. One created new rights for survivors of domestic violence. The other provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs.

Josh grew up in Upstate New York in a working-class family. His entire career has been dedicated to making life better for people who don’t have people fighting for them. Get to know Josh and what he stands for [**_HERE._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49523541/362482638/-1126184350?refcode=UD_20220820_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNzM0MTM0LWY5MjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aqFgupUsYAyIDaY5vQjEsE72STcCvHwc6wL7lPyIeDQ=&emci=7b20608d-511a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=70734134-f920-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4584036) I was fortunate to have had many, many brilliant, dedicated staffers during my years in the Senate. None was better than Josh. And I can’t think of one who would make a more effective member of Congress.

More often than not, I was the best prepared member of the Judiciary Committee. That’s because I took my work very seriously and so did Josh. That said, we had fun. Please go to his [website ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49523542/362482639/-1126184350?refcode=UD_20220820_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNzM0MTM0LWY5MjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aqFgupUsYAyIDaY5vQjEsE72STcCvHwc6wL7lPyIeDQ=&emci=7b20608d-511a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=70734134-f920-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4584036)to get to know Josh and what he believes and will be fighting for.

Josh’s seat is a new one, created during redistricting. In a year where every seat will count, this is a tossup district that is a MUST-win for Democrats.

Thanks for your attention.

Al

P.S. No other former staff member of mine is running for Congress. So, this is the last one of these!

He is a solid, reliable, consistent conservative and the only one who can flip this seat for Republicans. His opponent on the other hand, has been dishonest about her military service and there's **NO WAY** she can beat the Democrats.
[**That 's why I need your help. The Florida primaries are less than 72 HOURS OUT and this race is dead heat. Kevin can win this race but it's a close one. I'm asking you to make a last-minute contribution to put the only TRUE Trump Republican over the top before polls close.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054744:6ARY7YVN9:m:1:3334294963:4693A6DA3BE987649C801301E9C98DB5:r)

name: Marco
subject: We need to start working like a team, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I just want to start off by saying - I'm so sorry.

I hate that I have to drop into your inbox like this, but I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you get to the end and still think your donation doesn't matter, then you may end up paying more at the pump, in the grocery store checkout, and on Tax Day.

Earlier this week, I fell $3,246 short of my Mid-Month goal. This is a disaster since a poll on Tuesday showed me LOSING to a former Trump Impeachment Manager. I can't stress this enough, but my race WILL decide whether or not Republicans take back control of our country. That means we have two options:
1. Let a Pelosi-Endorsed candidate continue to outraise us and outspend us on TV until she wins Florida and the Senate.
2. **We can start working like a team to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.**

I know you get a lot of these messages, but these are REAL goals and REAL deadlines we need to meet. _**[I'm humbly asking you to chip in to meet this critical extended deadline and join the team that gets America back on track.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055808:6NZD7YVTN:m:1:3317145305:BDFD803499308B6AA89AE766254B86B2:r "I'm humbly asking you to chip in $13 to meet this critical extended deadline and join the team that
gets America back on track.")**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH MARCO](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055808:6NZD7YVTN:m:1:3317145305:BDFD803499308B6AA89AE766254B86B2:r "STAND WITH MARCO")
---
Do I need to remind you that just last week it was reported that my opponent raised more in one month than I was able to raise all of last quarter? **My opponent is gaining momentum and I desperately need your support.**
---
| | | [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055808:6NZD7YVTN:m:1:3317145305:BDFD803499308B6AA89AE766254B86B2:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM >>")
---
Please, I'm begging. **Don't look back and wish you did more.**

- Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |

* * *
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055809:6NZD7YVTN:m:1:3317145305:BDFD803499308B6AA89AE766254B86B2:r "POLLS TIED!") I'm not going to lie, this scares me. We are less than 100 days until the election and my far-Left opponent is raising millions of dollars and gaining ground in the polls.

I'm sick and tired of people saying that Florida isn't going to be a tight race, because clearly, it is. This poll is the latest proof that the Democrats' plan is working. Far-Left progressive groups are pouring in millions of dollars to try to win this Senate seat. The truth is, **I will lose if I don 't have your support.**

Please, I'm begging: **[Will you chip in right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055809:6NZD7YVTN:m:1:3317145305:BDFD803499308B6AA89AE766254B86B2:r "Will you chip in right now?")** | | [SEND IMMEDIATE HELP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055809:6NZD7YVTN:m:1:3317145305:BDFD803499308B6AA89AE766254B86B2:r "SEND IMMEDIATE
HELP")
---

---

Miami, FL 33153

subject: If you claim your copy today, I’ll even sign it. ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, it's South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy n0w before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056148:J5cc7YVSN:m:1:3253819041:0BA68F116A82D9D715352D314A06D3EB:r "Claim your signed copy n0w before I have to offer this to another top Conservative
supporter!")**_

---
_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056148:J5cc7YVSN:m:1:3253819041:0BA68F116A82D9D715352D314A06D3EB:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! So, act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056148:J5cc7YVSN:m:1:3253819041:0BA68F116A82D9D715352D314A06D3EB:r "But I can’t sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Kristi Noem

body:

| | | Sorry to reach out again- but this is really important. Last week, when the FBI unjustly raided President Trump's home at Mar-a-Lago... everything changed.

We're coordinating our immediate response but still need your input.

Only our top 4% of grassroots patriots were selected to participate, so please take advantage of this opportunity in the next 30min before we're forced to move on:

---
| **\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Trump Raid Update (via House GOP)
Subject: We're coordinating our immediate response but need YOUR input.**

**TRUMP RAID UPDATE**

House Republicans are coordinating our immediate response but need YOUR input!

**PLEASE: Take 30sec to answer (4) quick questions:**

---
**1\. Do you trust Biden's Department of Justice?**

| | | | | | [YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)

---
| | | | | | [YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)
---
| | | | [NO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)
---
**3\. Would you support a FULL investigation into Biden's Department of Justice?**
---
| | | | | | [YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)

| | | | [NO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)
---
**4\. Should Merrick Garland resign?**
---
| | | | | | [YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)
---
| | | | [NO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)
---

The input of grassroots patriots like you guides our every move. Please respond by 11:59pm so we can assure your voice is heard.

---
| | [SUBMIT RESPONSE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055872:JiWq7YVBN:m:1:3331421248:8895FFB001F32FFCF5A5138FDF81DFDD:r)

Thank you for your time,
House Republicans

name: American Update
subject: diabetes death drinks 💀
body:
Dear Reader,

Please find a special message from our paid sponsor. Sponsorships like this allow us to offer you our services free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
If You Drink These, Stop Immediately This isn’t a joke. It’s as serious as it can get. If you are diabetic, pre-diabetic or know someone who is, keep reading. Experts are pushing to get these 3 drinks moved over to the 'Do Not Consume' list asap. These killers have been officially labeled the "Diabetes Death Drinks". They are so dangerous that even consuming a small amount can trigger a deadly response. **_[Tap here to find out what the 3 deadly drinks are!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31961%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bcDrLh1XJ1B1z%2feagZtZew&sysid=1)_** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31962%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7XMeVPbLFmascgXYxj2nJA&sysid=1) P.s. Frequent consumers -- defined as consuming two or more of these **_[death drinks](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31963%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DqCA2cOoBOnQTR7AN3%2fXAA&sysid=1)_** a day -- had a 500% waistline increase over non-users, according to researchers.

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0661%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2Fo5q7MZSDI8Je09EBqGpQ&sysid=1)_

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| August 21st, 2022 | Issue XXIX
---
| |
---
| |
---
| In case you missed it...
---
Senator Rob Ortt and Sheriff Michael Filicetti Announce Grant for Niagara County Sheriff's Office
---
Last week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Niagara County Sheriff Michael Filicetti announced the Niagara County Sheriff's Office has been awarded a $15,000 grant to support and enhance their Taser Program.

Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Scores 100 Percent on NFIB Legislative Scorecard
---
This week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt was recognized as having scored 100 percent on the voting scorecard from the 2021-22 legislative session by the National Federation of Independent Businesses (NFIB), the state and nation's leading small business advocacy association.
---

Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Joins Long Island Senators & County Legislators to Blast Congestion Pricing Plan
---
This week, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt joined Senators Alexis Weik and Mario Mattera and members of the Suffolk and Nassau County Legislatures to blast out-of-touch New York City politicians for pushing forward with their Congestion Pricing tax that could cost motorists and commuters up to $34.50 per day and $82 for commercial vehicles. The elected leaders called for the immediate passage of legislation that would repeal congestion pricing.
---

| | | Senator Ortt Calls on Governor Hochul to Update CDC Guidance and Drop Remaining COVID Restrictions
On Wednesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt sent a letter to Governor Hochul urging her Administration to update the State's guidance and emergency regulations to reflect recent changes made by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).
Leader Ortt also pushed the Governor to release COVID-19 guidelines in line with the CDC changes, without further delay as the new school year rapidly approaches and parents and school administrators have yet to receive guidelines for schools.

clean_body: Sunday, August 21st Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | August 21st, 2022 | Issue XXIX | | | | | In case you missed it... Senator Rob Ortt and Sheriff Michael Filicetti Announce Grant for Niagara County Sheriff's Office Last week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Niagara County Sheriff Michael Filicetti announced the Niagara County Sheriff's Office has been awarded a $15,000 grant to support and enhance their Taser Program. | == | Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Scores 100 Percent on NFIB Legislative Scorecard This week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt was recognized as having scored 100 percent on the voting scorecard from the 2021-22 legislative session by the National Federation of Independent Businesses (NFIB), the state and nation's leading small business advocacy association. | == | Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Joins Long Island Senators & County Legislators to Blast Congestion Pricing Plan This week, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt joined Senators Alexis Weik and Mario Mattera and members of the Suffolk and Nassau County Legislatures to blast out-of-touch New York City politicians for pushing forward with their Congestion Pricing tax that could cost motorists and commuters up to $34.50 per day and $82 for commercial vehicles. The elected leaders called for the immediate passage of legislation that would repeal congestion pricing. | == | Senator Rob Ortt Supports == | | This week, Senator Ortt had the opportunity to meet with ==, NYS Senate candidate in ==. Patricia is a Malverne trustee, small businesswoman, wife and most importantly a mom of 4, and now she wants to be your voice as a candidate for state Senate. Looking forward to her joining us in Albany. Follow Patricia Canzoneri-Fitzpatrick for Senate == == == == | | | | | Senator Ortt Calls on Governor Hochul to Update CDC Guidance and Drop Remaining COVID Restrictions On Wednesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt sent a letter to Governor Hochul urging her Administration to update the State's guidance and emergency regulations to reflect recent changes made by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). Leader Ortt also pushed the Governor to release COVID-19 guidelines in line with the CDC changes, without further delay as the new school year rapidly approaches and parents and school administrators have yet to receive guidelines for schools. | == | | | Senator Ortt visits Long Island in support of Don Clavin, Town of Hempstead Supervisor | Wednesday, August 17 on Twitter: "Great time down on LI last night in support of @DonClavinTOH and a wonderful crop of @NassauNYGOP candidates who are ready to help us #TakeBackNY this November from One Party Rule." | | | Supporting Steven Sams II for Congress, NY-26 | | | On Wednesday, Senator Ortt showed support for Steven Sams, congressional candidate for NY-26, which consists of portions of Erie and Niagara counties. The great thing about Steven is he's not a politician - he's a soldier first. Senator Ortt also caught up with Williamsville Mayor Deb Rogers and other local officials who came out in support of Steven's campaign for the 26th Congressional District. | | Follow Steven Sams II For Congress | == == == == | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with

name: Kari Lake
subject: re: DeSantis said he’d send troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Arizona
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056298:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)
---
Peter, For too long, Republicans have stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was left wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. **Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. I'm talking about leaders like President Donald Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis. ** **They're not afraid of the left. They're not afraid to fight back. And neither am I.** That's exactly the kind of attitude we need to SAVE AMERICA. That's why I'm bringing that same Trump and DeSantis BDE to Arizona.
---
**[SUPPORT KARI: SAVE AMERICA>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056299:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)**
---
Make no mistake... my race for Governor of Arizona is the most critical race in the country. The reason is simple: the crisis at our state border is a crisis for every American. And we cannot afford to lose the battle for border security by electing another socialist in a border state. [**_I AGREE >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056298:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r) **I promise, on Day 1 --when I take my hand off the Bible after giving the Oath of Office--I will issue a Declaration of Invasion on our Southern Border and we stop people from illegally crossing.** When we see those cartel drones flying across the border, we're gonna shoot them down. I'm also going to blow up the drug tunnels... and I don't care if there's a Narco-Terrorist in there when we do it. And then we're going to finish what President Trump started and FINISH THE WALL. It's a vital security issue for Arizona, but it is about the security of our entire nation. Recently, I even spoke with Ron DeSantis, myself. **He agreed that if I'm in office, Florida will send National Guard troops to help secure our border.** Because that's what it takes to save our country right now. It takes transformative leadership.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056298:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)
---
We've seen what Trump was able to accomplish for our nation. We've seen the great things Ron DeSantis has done in Florida. Now, it's time to see what we can do in Arizona. But Peter, I really need your support. Will you chip in today to secure a victory for the NEW RIGHT so we can SECURE OUR BORDER?
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $100 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056300:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)

---
[**YES: CHIP IN $50 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056302:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)

---
[**YES: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056298:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)
---
I know we've seen what the other side has to offer.
_And we 've seen what it means when we don't fight back._ **We must work together NOW to send the message that we are sick and tired of the political elite. We are ready to SAVE AMERICA. ** I know how important it is to fight. I'm up for it. I'm ready. I just need your support now to make sure I have the chance. **Thank you in advance for helping carry the NEW RIGHT over the finish line in Arizona in November.[https://secure.winred.com/kari-lake-for-arizona/action-shiraz-6650605](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056298:Jr6f3YVMN:m:1:3253819041:25B62003126FED4846DC2278059A22B1:r)** Sincerely,

name: Voice of the Martyrs
subject: When faith is forbidden ...
body:
Meet bold believers in a book that will inspire you to a deeper walk with Christ
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMzMtZDE0YTM5MzUwMDNhNGI1NDhkY2I0YTQ0YTI4NzEzZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9zZmt0ZGhldmZlP3NyYz1QTTMwMzkzIn0/tLPXwernoKmwYdRUu6SwUw)
---
Dear Friend,

I encourage you to take a 40-day journey through a book that will deepen your faith and may change your life.

You’ll meet a Chinese Christian who called six months in prison “a wonderful time,” an Iraqi pastor who narrowly escaped death after being shot by those opposed to his work, and other men and women —our brothers and sisters in Christ — who have endured great suffering for their faith and witness.

The award-winning book [When Faith Is Forbidden: 40 Days on the Frontlines with Persecuted Christians](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMzMtZDE0YTM5MzUwMDNhNGI1NDhkY2I0YTQ0YTI4NzEzZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9zZmt0ZGhldmZlP3NyYz1QTTMwMzkzIn0/c9pgI6SH3PFTo5tM39a1GA) will take you on an unforgettable journey to restricted nations and hostile areas to meet believers who boldly live out their Christian faith at great cost.

As you journey through its pages, this book will challenge you to reflect on your own walk with Christ along the sometimes difficult path toward our heavenly home.

Serving our persecuted brothers and sisters and telling their stories is the heartbeat of The Voice of the Martyrs’ ministry. VOM is a nonprofit, interdenominational Christian organization that **serves persecuted Christians on the world’s most difficult and dangerous mission fields**.

Founded in 1967 by Richard and Sabina Wurmbrand, who were themselves imprisoned because of their Christian faith and witness, VOM is dedicated to inspiring believers to deepen their commitment to Christ and to fulfill His Great Commission, no matter the cost.

**We will send you a copy of this outstanding book as our thanks for your online donation to The Voice of the Martyrs.**

| | [Donate Now](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMzMtZDE0YTM5MzUwMDNhNGI1NDhkY2I0YTQ0YTI4NzEzZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9zZmt0ZGhldmZlP3NyYz1QTTMwMzkzIn0/EPNLXd-f87A7d7ODUVCZhA)
---

| [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMzMtZDE0YTM5MzUwMDNhNGI1NDhkY2I0YTQ0YTI4NzEzZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9zZmt0ZGhldmZlP3NyYz1QTTMwMzkzIn0/GU3ETfTf_Dc2Ola2ia4KPw)
---

Each stop on this 40-day journey provides inspiration and encouragement through the firsthand accounts of Christians who have endured persecution for the name of Christ.

The book also includes a suggested prayer and space for written reflection as you gain a deeper understanding of persecution against Christians and learn from the examples of faithful believers.

[Make an online donation today and receive this incredible book!](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMzMtZDE0YTM5MzUwMDNhNGI1NDhkY2I0YTQ0YTI4NzEzZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9zZmt0ZGhldmZlP3NyYz1QTTMwMzkzIn0/SGop-bHmKtd23bu55U4mHw)

The book will

* help you learn the truth about Christian persecution
* introduce you to faithful persecuted believers and explain how to help them
* inspire and encourage you through engaging testimonies of God’s faithfulness
* help you pray more specifically for persecuted Christians

I am thrilled to share this powerful resource, which will inform you of the courage and faithfulness of persecuted Christians while inspiring you to stand with them in your own walk of faith.

| | [Donate Now and Receive Your Book](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMzMtZDE0YTM5MzUwMDNhNGI1NDhkY2I0YTQ0YTI4NzEzZDkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9zZmt0ZGhldmZlP3NyYz1QTTMwMzkzIn0/SoZQZHqZ6GaIl0jX4L3pcw)

# *** NO.1 U.S.-URANIUM COMPANY ***
---
| **If there 's one thing you can DEFINITELY SAY about the war between Russia and The Ukraine, it is that these geopolitical storms have completely reshaped the way that energy independence is prioritized in North America.**

Just like the Chinese cannot be relied upon for global commerce any longer, the Russian government have proven themselves to be totally unpredictable, when it comes to energy and electricity.

**In my career, I 've seen many types of business and financial opportunities, but none SO CLEAR as a politically-driven mandate.**

If the U.S. government were to ramp-up its dire need to be nuclear-independent, **Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC)** could become an essential energy stock and a powerhouse company. **45% of the company 's shares are institutionally-held; this is THE GO-TO nuclear stock for Wall Street, when it comes to U.S.-domiciled leverage to nuclear energy!**

Here are some of the company's largest shareholders: Fidelity, Blackrock, State Street, UBS and Sprott! **I 'm going to boil it down and make this very simple, because in my head, I see the upside potential for Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC) in a straightforward and clear way:**

As of 2020, global uranium mine production covered only 74% of world reactor requirements. Analysts expect the market deficit to continue through 2022.

**There is virtually No U.S. uranium production, despite operating the world 's largest nuclear reactor fleet.** **There is no other company in the uranium sector that has greater upside potential, compared with its risk profile than NYSE-listed Uranium Energy Corp (NYSE: UEC), in my opinion!**

There are currently two, issued price targets, one of $6.60 and a second, of $7.10; the current price is: $4.21.

**Look at these price targets:** **Below I summarized the essence of the REASONS that I rank Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC) as the top uranium stock:**
* Fastest growing, 100% unhedged pure play uranium company.

* Production ready, low-cost ISR mining - largest ISR projects of any U.S. based producer.

* Strong Balance sheet with $182M of assets, no debt!

* Physical uranium portfolio of 5M lbs. U.S. warehoused U3O8 at approx. $38/lb average cost, the largest inventory position for a U.S. based uranium company.

**This is the holy grail for many mining investors. Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC) actually has a physical position and is backed by the underlying commodity. ****Research Uranium Energy Corp. (NYSE: UEC)!**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Peter, we have the opportunity to protect our children from COAST to COAST.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | |
Peter,

The school year is about to begin, which means millions of students will be forced to endure the the relentless brainwashing of the liberal indoctrination machine:
* Critical Race Theory
* Gender Ideology
* Explicit Sexualization Topics
* And not to mention - forced masking

The liberal machine doesn't want your children to simply learn the basic skills needed to succeed in life. They want to churn out future generations of Democrat voters with a worldview based on race & identity politics rather than character and merit.
**I 'm reaching out to tell you: it doesn't have to be this way.**

---
| | [SUPPORT PARENTS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055881:JgiIaYV8N:m:1:3317145305:7217CBC4DEC63116457F11F1711ED979:r)
---
| | [STOP THE INDOCTRINATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055881:JgiIaYV8N:m:1:3317145305:7217CBC4DEC63116457F11F1711ED979:r)
---

Virtual learning has exposed parents to what garbage is being forced upon our children, and we're fed up.

In a few short months, we have the opportunity to protect our children from COAST to COAST. Republicans are working on a Parents' Bill of Rights -- which will enshrine parents' rights and voice in education. It will reinforce the notion that children belong to their parents -- not Big Government's brainwashing machine.

But, Democrats are doing everything they can to STOP this bill and STOP concerned parents from propelling Republicans to victory. They've raised RECORD sums of cash, and it's paying off -- Republicans' lead in the polls has completely evaporated.

I'm humbly asking -- if you can spare $5, $10, or $25 to support our mission, millions of free-thinking children will have YOU to thank when freedom prevails in education. **[Rush a gift in the next 15 minutes and I'll even send you an exclusive Parent Voices Matter sticker!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055882:JgiIaYV8N:m:1:3317145305:7217CBC4DEC63116457F11F1711ED979:r "Rush a gift in the next 15 minutes and I’ll even send you an exclusive Parent Voices
Matter sticker!")**

---
Thank you,

Kevin McCarthy

name: Josh Lafazan
subject: Less than 48 hours to go-Laying it all on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49525717/362488273/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGJiZmJkMC00ODIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WxYrtlxHmal8ZrIHIGSuJYAqZ9_nzBpdWmYVuhYvpI=&emci=c7a21036-0a20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f8bbfbd0-4821-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, **First and foremost, this election is about change.** We know Washington is broken. Radical ideologues have polluted our political discourse. Partisan officials spend more time scoring political hits on T.V. than they do working for the people they serve. The result, Peter? A divided nation and a government that doesn't deliver. **This election is about common sense.** The solutions to a lot of our nation's problems aren't secrets, Peter; we know that fully-funded police departments keep our streets safe. We know that keeping abortion legal means keeping abortion safe. We know that empowering Medicare to negotiate drug prices will make prescriptions cheaper. And we know that public policy can be used to make the economy work for everyone. We know all these things and more. It just takes the courage to get it done. Which brings me to my last point: **This election is about electing an outsider.** My opponents in this race have spent decades as career political insiders, enriching themselves while losing touch with the problems facing Long Island's working families. I'm the _only_ candidate in this election who's ready to challenge the status quo, bring a true outsider's perspective to Washington, and disrupt politics from the ground up. **Peter, here's my pitch to you: if you want to elect a leader who's going to change Washington with common sense ideas and an outsider's perspective, then vote for me.** More to come! _Josh_ P.S. — Our campaign needs you to forward this campaign for just five friends to help us make our final case to as many voters as possible. clean_body: | | | | Peter, First and foremost, this election is about change. We know Washington is broken. Radical ideologues have polluted our political discourse. Partisan officials spend more time scoring political hits on T.V. than they do working for the people they serve. The result, Peter? A divided nation and a government that doesn't deliver. This election is about common sense. The solutions to a lot of our nation's problems aren't secrets, Peter; we know that fully-funded police departments keep our streets safe. We know that keeping abortion legal means keeping abortion safe. We know that empowering Medicare to negotiate drug prices will make prescriptions cheaper. And we know that public policy can be used to make the economy work for everyone. We know all these things and more. It just takes the courage to get it done. Which brings me to my last point: This election is about electing an outsider. My opponents in this race have spent decades as career political insiders, enriching themselves while losing touch with the problems facing Long Island's working families. I'm the only candidate in this election who's ready to challenge the status quo, bring a true outsider's perspective to Washington, and disrupt politics from the ground up. Peter, here's my pitch to you: if you want to elect a leader who's going to change Washington with common sense ideas and an outsider's perspective, then vote for me. More to come! Josh P.S. — Our campaign needs you to forward this campaign for just five friends to help us make our final case to as many voters as possible. Hello,
Grassroots donors like you are the most critical part of my campaign, so I wanted to tell you first:
**Poll after poll has shown Chuck Grassley’s approval rating at the lowest it’s ever been. But after we out-raised him by 2-to-1, Grassley just dropped another $2 million on TV ads against me!**
The latest polling shows we are gaining ground. We are hot on Grassley’s heels, and I never could have done it without you.
But here’s the problem: The GOP's spending advantage on TV could ruin everything we’ve worked for. With Grassley spending another $2 million on TV against me, Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are sure to follow.
We have the momentum, but this could put a stop to it unless we double down on our voter outreach immediately.
**I set a goal to raise another $30,000 before our midnight deadline to fight back against Grassley’s attacks. But the only way we’ll hit our goal and win is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**I can’t defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority without your help now, so I’m personally asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49525749/362488314/-42398318?refcode=em20220821am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJiZmJkMC00ODIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A07K7ejRSnn2GqsdnXuOSw-cisDpQs0YS4r1-v2gHhg=)

body:
| |
---
| | |
Peter,

The school year is about to begin, which means millions of students will be forced to endure the the relentless brainwashing of the liberal indoctrination machine:
* Critical Race Theory
* Gender Ideology
* Explicit Sexualization Topics
* And not to mention - forced masking

The liberal machine doesn't want your children to simply learn the basic skills needed to succeed in life. They want to churn out future generations of Democrat voters with a worldview based on race & identity politics rather than character and merit.
**I 'm reaching out to tell you: it doesn't have to be this way.**

---

---

Virtual learning has exposed parents to what garbage is being forced upon our children, and we're fed up.

In a few short months, we have the opportunity to protect our children from COAST to COAST. Republicans are working on a Parents' Bill of Rights -- which will enshrine parents' rights and voice in education. It will reinforce the notion that children belong to their parents -- not Big Government's brainwashing machine.

But, Democrats are doing everything they can to STOP this bill and STOP concerned parents from propelling Republicans to victory. They've raised RECORD sums of cash, and it's paying off -- Republicans' lead in the polls has completely evaporated.

I'm humbly asking -- if you can spare $5, $10, or $25 to support our mission, millions of free-thinking children will have YOU to thank when freedom prevails in education. **[Rush a gift in the next 15 minutes and I'll even send you an exclusive Parent Voices Matter sticker!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055938:6YbDPYVNv:m:1:3331421248:692E45F4014A744C8B6855292C7377E2:r "Rush a gift in the next 15 minutes and I’ll even send you an exclusive Parent Voices
Matter sticker!")**

Thank you,

Kevin McCarthy

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z245o2anbaqtee4tsguud2s9jc59lt67ov9fkgbg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ei3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4cj4euqm6p5mccpb8or4saq34d9l6mor6d5mm6pj1phkedhb5d1nm9hndd70eurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj9cr0curm6phks2pmcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm8o30sph64pj24no)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcadh5bv8pvqn5ood3irpu6geie4kvbt8905pt70_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1gecoj2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z040s4at654617pqn68gvhjabe6d76jll00qd1r0_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1gecoj2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsli3mb545mhn35nv2tvnklv46270gcg45pmjv98_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1gecoj2cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Peter,
---
President Donald J. Trump released a powerful video after the FBI raided his home and seized his passports.
---
**But YouTube CENSORED President Trump 's video.**
---
_Here 's what they told me:_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056468:69QAfYVN0:m:1:3253819041:AD48680A8B5BA0DD447D8503C8291929:r)
---
Are you kidding me? The FBI just treated an innocent man like a political prisoner, but YouTube claims __President Trump__ is the "violent" one?
---
**Meanwhile, the Left is engaging in REAL violence against my campaign by stealing and vandalizing our Trump signs, shoving razor blades in our tires, and shattering our windows.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056468:69QAfYVN0:m:1:3253819041:AD48680A8B5BA0DD447D8503C8291929:r)

**We cannot let the radical Left get away with these Marxist tactics. We MUST prevail in Tuesday 's congressional election.**

**_President Trump 's censored video called America a "failing nation."_**

**My husband and I both served our country, so we don 't say this lightly... America, under Joe Biden, is unrecognizable.**

clean_body: I'm showing you the evidence to PROVE it... | Peter, President Donald J. Trump released a powerful video after the FBI raided his home and seized his passports. But YouTube CENSORED President Trump 's video. Here 's what they told me: Are you kidding me? The FBI just treated an innocent man like a political prisoner, but YouTube claims President Trump is the "violent" one? Meanwhile, the Left is engaging in REAL violence against my campaign by stealing and vandalizing our Trump signs, shoving razor blades in our tires, and shattering our windows. We cannot let the radical Left get away with these Marxist tactics. We MUST prevail in Tuesday 's congressional election. President Trump 's censored video called America a "failing nation." Were his words strong? Yes. But they were 100% accurate. My husband and I both served our country, so we don 't say this lightly... America, under Joe Biden, is unrecognizable. There's an invasion taking place on our southern border... ...our constitutional rights are being threatened ...inflation is ravaging our economy ...the feds are being weaponized against the Democrats' political enemies ...crime is destroying our cities ...and our enemies abroad LAUGH at Biden and Kamala. Those are the points President Trump powerfully made in his video. But YouTube decided those points were far too "violent" for citizens to hear. We cannot and will not let the Left get away with attacking and censoring us into oblivion. body:

---
| | | Howdy Peter, it's South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy n0w before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055952:6u1JfYVNl:m:1:3331421248:EFB1549DC469B6373D9761BB52A6A724:r "Claim your signed copy n0w before I have to offer this to another top Conservative
supporter!")**_

image")

_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**

YOUR SIGNED COPY")

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

Governor Kristi Noem

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
********I’m at my wits’ end, Friend. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump’s endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31975%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cNjLbk%2bJmSm8LgWaTarOLw&sysid=1) The point is, Friend, I’m the toughest Republican running for office. If I can’t beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I’m going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $5 right now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fjrq7rcXzfeOQ8B9UME43A&sysid=1), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi’s plan to destroy our nation. I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=28jXmEoA6A9NAmqit4fN%2bg&sysid=1) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c31977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=28jXmEoA6A9NAmqit4fN%2bg&sysid=1)

clean_body: ******I’m at my wits’ end, Friend. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, but Republicans may never win another race this year. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. I have Trump’s endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** The point is, Friend, I’m the toughest Republican running for office. If I can’t beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I’m going to be blunt with you. , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi’s plan to destroy our nation. I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | Paid for by Zinke for Congress PO BOX 1597 Helena, MT 59624 Ryan Zinke is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

https://www.catherineforcongress.com [https://www.catherineforcongress.com]
Last Day to Vote Early - find locations here
Have plans today? Make sure you add VOTING to your Sunday to do list! Polls are open today across Westchester County from 10am - 6pm. This is your last chance to vote early!
I’ve spent the last 15 years serving residents of Westchester County and it has been the greatest honor of my life. I’m asking you to join me as we take our values and our voices to Washington. We all know NY-16 is one of the best places to live, work, and play.
When you vote for me you’re going to get an accessible, transparent, passionate, and driven representative who won’t be beholden to party bosses or squads. You’re going to get a true representative who will listen to you, will vote as you would vote, and fight for the issues you care the most about. You know you’ll get that from me because I’ve been doing it for close to 15 years.
Now, go vote!
-Catherine

name: Letitia James
subject: I will not bow. I will not break. I will not be bullied.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49527130/362493153/265476937?refcode=jtk666-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFkMmYzMi01MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fE9kUFBvExailQjaXvouTB0_gYkm2J6GzcLatB810bs=)
---
I’m sure you’ve seen the headlines, Peter.

**Once again, powerful men are trying to take me down.**** But here’s the thing: It doesn’t matter if they're Democrat or Republican – I will ****_never_ bow, I will _never_ break, and I will _never_ be bullied. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49527131/362493154/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk666-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFkMmYzMi01MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fE9kUFBvExailQjaXvouTB0_gYkm2J6GzcLatB810bs=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49527132/362493155/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk666-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFkMmYzMi01MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fE9kUFBvExailQjaXvouTB0_gYkm2J6GzcLatB810bs=)
---
From the moment that I made history in 2018 and became attorney general, I’ve stayed true to my mission of holding the powerful and corrupt accountable after generations of elected officials turned a blind eye. I knew that standing up directly to the forces that have ruled our nation for so long would earn me enemies – but I also knew that New York’s working families deserved a champion.

And, frankly, I’m nowhere near done fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable. These powerful men think that they can rattle me and scare me off my path, but the truth is, they have only reaffirmed my commitment to holding harmful actors like them accountable.

**But Peter, I can only continue my fight for New York with YOUR support. I’m up for re-election in November, and I’m counting on this powerful grassroots team to help me defeat my conspiracy theorist-funded Republican opponent. So, I have to ask:

name: Andy Kim
subject: It started with a conversation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
It all began with a conversation.
In 2017, I was speaking with residents of a retirement community when one gentleman pulled me aside and, in a troubled whisper, shared that he was paying nearly $500 a month for one life-saving medication.

He resorted to halving his dosage.

He was a proud man, but I could hear a quiver in his voice because he felt terrible that he couldn't support himself and his wife in their golden years.

He said he worked hard for his entire life but couldn't do this alone.

I told him that it wasn't his fault since Big Pharma has been mercilessly running prices up, and Medicare has been unable to negotiate.

I couldn't get it out of my head hours after the conversation ended. How sad is it that folks who work hard are left to fend for themselves in the richest and most powerful nation in the world? Halving their medication.

I knew that it wasn't just this man struggling but hundreds of thousands of seniors like him across the country trying to keep up with the rising cost of prescription drugs.

That day wasn't the last time I heard that story. With each conversation, my resolve to solve this problem grew.

So I co-authored the spending cap provision for those receiving Medicare to $2,000 a year and was proud to vote for it as part of the Inflation Reduction Act. Now, the man I spoke with at the retirement home will pay no more than $166 per month for all of his medication.

Seniors have been waiting too long for these changes. As always, there's more progress to be made, but I'm glad we can finally say we've delivered, and our most vulnerable Americans won't be forced to ration critical medicine.

Andy

name: Blue Senate Alert
subject: We can win this thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The path to victory for Maggie Hassan is clear
| | |
---
Friend, you already know the path to the Senate runs directly through New Hampshire. And the path to victory for Maggie Hassan is clear:
• We have a dedicated team of **volunteers and boots-on-the-ground organizers** committed to calling, texting, and knocking on the doors of every Granite State voter to turn out for Maggie come Election Day.

• Whether it's lowering the cost of health care, fighting for a woman's fundamental right to choose, or standing up to corporate interests, **Maggie is dedicated to improving the lives of Americans** , and we're working hard to share that message across the state.

• And last but not least, our people-powered movement is fueled by people like you with **grassroots donations** that help us combat the relentless attacks of Mitch McConnell and the GOP.
**But those attacks are climbing: They're already spending over $25 MILLION on this race, with millions more on the way. So we need to do everything we can to make sure the pathway to victory is clear from now through November.**
[**Please, will you rush a $3 gift toward Maggie Hassan's reelection campaign now to keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49528090/362497153/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1430-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUyYjRlNS01MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaQd0ZDnacAYm8K650-ZZ6Xx66Zko0MM6xWhQHJV4kg=)

subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3kgkpssfk8tcfd069pkl1qgmfqah1m5ijmne2n8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfeohjc5p65db7carbfdb6ctimbchhc3ibctlhcgr76c36maorfdpl6lo66pdk6urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9omcd376kqjfdj7coq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm8o30stg6eo324no)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhvqmddefe38o1gubaq4f48600tb2qp4knmvqvio_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1geeo37c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi2tphr1kdpekklu6lfkqp3ccai8e4fdiqdafmkg_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1geeo37c1h2bs)****[”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgjhdsk8lle8k7vfh239ma65m2rhgp4dmn4v8tm0_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1geeo37c1h2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5fnutda0ukhmhsddlk8qqdeda419hf5g3tm1al8_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1geeo37c1h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv9r95tr2o8b1cqbn90irp28pgpd91ninvr2tqb0_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1geeo37c1h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ftc1ujd1hqocipl45gldehqpf2750vv58n6ju8_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1geeo37c1h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Xan Aird
subject: Come out on Election Day!
body:
Hello!

**Tuesday, August 23, is Election Day**. The marathon is coming to an end and the finish line is in sight.

If you'd like to help out on the final day of the campaign, you can sign up [here](https://forms.gle/LGJeez7LMB5Q9X6H8).

After the polls close at 9:00pm, we'll be gathering for a watch party — details to follow.

We couldn’t have made it this far without your support. Thank you and see you on Election Day!

Best,

Xan

\--

Xan Aird
Deputy Field Director

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ken Paxton is a criminal. How is he still the top law enforcement officer in Texas? Rochelle Garza is running for attorney general of Texas, because she’ll do a better job from day one.
body:
Hey, that’s just what his aides say!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Ken Paxton is a criminal. **Texas Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton is a walking, talking criminal enterprise and shameless right wing extremist.** And if we do our part, he's about to lose to a Latina Democrat, a watershed moment in Texas and American politics. [**Can you join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Rochelle Garza so she can become the next Attorney General of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4aa80d4a-994a-4e7a-b900-f47fc39858ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Barely in office for six months, in July of 2015, a state grand jury indicted the supposed top law enforcement officer in Texas on three criminal charges, i** ncluding 2 counts of securities fraud. In 2016, the Securities & Exchange Commission filed a civil enforcement action against Paxton for defrauding investors in a company he'd represented as legal counsel. **In October of 2020, seven of Paxton's top aides--including First Assistant Attorney Jeff Mateer--published a letter accusing Paxton of improper influence, abuse of office, bribery and other crimes. It's honestly almost comical that this clown is still Attorney General. ** **Paxton also filed suit vs numerous states where President Biden bested Donald Trump in 2020, trying to overturn the election results based on near-non-existent voter fraud and idiotic reasoning that was laughed out of court. He was brought up on ethics charges for this specious lawsuit by the State Bar of Texas. ** **_Besides being a corrupt clown, Paxton is an extremist and traitor. He was in Washington January 6th to speak on behalf of Trump and rile up the violent, seditious crowd that eventually attacked the Capitol. He's pushed religion in schools, pursued felony cases for "voter fraud" against voters of color for accidentally putting the wrong address on voter registration forms, pushed guns on Texas campuses and supported court clerks violating the Contitution by refusing to issue marriage licenses to same sex couples._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: ROCHELLE GARZA FOR TEXAS](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0d67df1-8caf-4ac9-9dad-27aa6e33bcd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I could honestly go on for days, because if there is something stupid. bigoted or downright criminal, chances are Ken Paxton has done it. This is why _he only won his reelection in the red state of Texas by 3 points in 2018, and now he's in real trouble_. I**n a recent poll he is only leading Democratic rockstar Rochelle Garza by 2 points, 34%-32%. Because of all I just said above, this corrupt, cacophonous jack-in-the-box only has a 40% approval rating, and among the many--19%--of undecided voters, Garza beats him by 5%.** Oh, and did we mention an Libertarian candidate is in the race supported by mostly disgruntled Republicans who won't vote for Paxton? **Garza, meanwhile, in 2017 took on then Appellate Court Judge Brett Kavanaugh, Trump and Paxton, defending a 17 year old detained immigrant who was denied the right to an abortion, AND WON. This case resulted in the "Garza Notice" which prevents teens in immigration-detention centers from being denied their right to bodily autonomy, even post-Roe.** **Garza has outraised this monster ($520,000 to $340,000), she has outworked him and she outthinks him every day. She'd bring much needed diversity to the Texas Attorney General's office. With our help, she can beat him** and work with Beto to help speed the transformation of Texas from a reddish-purple into a blue state. She is inches away from achieving this incredible feat.
[**Can you join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Rochelle Garza so she can become the next Attorney General of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6c96c17-6626-45dc-a3a0-f8422f7651c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for inspiring Democrats, and ending the careers of corrupt-hack Republicans. Cliff

|

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: This is ridiculous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Peter:

My RINO anti-America First opponent launched a despicable new attack ad against me.

**It's so ridiculous and so bizarre I don't know whether to laugh or file charges.**

But the sad fact is unless we can respond, his false charges may work.

**[With only 48 hours remaining before the primary, it's vital campaign hit our goal of raising $65,000 to keep our TV ads on the air](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60636089:W0MZtIhNE:m:1:2365227053:604AB79C8814396EF41DD9F83C736B3D:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60636089:W0MZtIhNE:m:1:2365227053:604AB79C8814396EF41DD9F83C736B3D:r)
| | | [ CHIP IN TO HELP MATT GAETZ WIN ON AUGUST 23 ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60636089:W0MZtIhNE:m:1:2365227053:604AB79C8814396EF41DD9F83C736B3D:r) |
---|---|---
**[That's why I hope I can count on you to chip in an emergency contribution of $20.22 right away before the August 23 deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60636089:W0MZtIhNE:m:1:2365227053:604AB79C8814396EF41DD9F83C736B3D:r).**

My opponent hopes I won't have time to respond with only two days left until the primary.

**That's why he is spending ONE MILLION DOLLARS of his own money to run these false hit pieces against me, and I must have your support to fight back.**

The Lincoln Project groomers and D.C. swamp want revenge after I helped lead the fight to fire Liz Cheney.

I know our message is a winning one. I know my opponent's attacks are desperate and proof he can't run on the issues.

**Still, if I don't receive the necessary funds in the next 48 hours, I won't be able to turn this race around.**

I simply must go on offense these last couple of days and take the attack to my RINO opponent.

**[So please help my campaign hit our goal of raising $65,000 by August 23 by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60636089:W0MZtIhNE:m:1:2365227053:604AB79C8814396EF41DD9F83C736B3D:r).**

subject: Keep China OUT OF America’s FARMLAND! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Patriot,

As I'm sure you're aware, Chinese companies with ties to the Communist Party are buying massive amounts of America's farmland.

_**But what you might not know, is that YOUR TAXPAYER DOLLARS are subsidizing this Chinese takeover of our nation 's heartland. **_

**_KEEP CHINA OUT OF AMERICA'S FARMLAND_**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056354:6MPunYVNR:m:1:3299561967:B89BF52C9F884E40F8F1AE4D04123B76:r "Generic Button")
---

That's right, not only are Chinese companies purchasing America's natural resources and food supply, they are doing so with the help of US government farm subsidies.

**[It's time for Joe Biden to put America First and ban China from buying any American farmland. Please sign the petition HERE >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056354:6MPunYVNR:m:1:3299561967:B89BF52C9F884E40F8F1AE4D04123B76:r "It’s time
for Joe Biden to put America First and ban China from buying any American farmland. Please sign the petition HERE >>>")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056354:6MPunYVNR:m:1:3299561967:B89BF52C9F884E40F8F1AE4D04123B76:r)
---

_**KEEP CHINA OUT OF AMERICA'S FARMLAND**_
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056354:6MPunYVNR:m:1:3299561967:B89BF52C9F884E40F8F1AE4D04123B76:r "Generic Button")
---
American land belongs to America, not China. And Americans' taxes should benefit American farmers, not hostile foreign actors.

The Democrats are sitting by while China buys our nation out from under us.

We CANNOT let China control anymore of our precious resources or food supply.

**[America's future hangs in the balance. Make a difference now and sign our petition to keep China out of America's heartland >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056354:6MPunYVNR:m:1:3299561967:B89BF52C9F884E40F8F1AE4D04123B76:r "America’s future hangs in the balance. Make a difference now and sign our petition to keep China out of America’s heartland
>>> ")**

_**Remember, future generations will remember what we did at this critical moment in our nation 's history. **_

For America,

House Republicans
_**KEEP CHINA OUT OF AMERICA'S FARMLAND**_

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056355:6MPunYVNR:m:1:3299561967:B89BF52C9F884E40F8F1AE4D04123B76:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**
