name: Raphael Warnock
subject: just a few hours to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Friend, with just a _few_ hours to go before our midnight deadline, we're so close to hitting our fundraising goal – but at this moment, we're still falling short.**
_NBC News_ is calling Georgia the "most important swing state" of this year's elections, meaning our race could decide Senate control. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.
Trump held major rallies right here in Georgia with my opponent, Herschel Walker – and McConnell is mobilizing national Republicans to flood this race with MILLIONS to defeat me. **Now, polls show me _1 point down._**
I won my last race by a razor-thin margin – and with our entire Democratic agenda on the line – I mean it when I say we can't afford a single misstep. **The stakes have never been higher, friend, so if you've been waiting for the right time to make your very first gift, this is it:**
[**Will you split $5 or more between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s – before our midnight deadline – to help us hit this goal, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49533981/362520537/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3590-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjQ5Njk5Ni01OTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7L8tk667BaJ29QqGRKuYncyakboAlfG60F3jpvsS260=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Banning members of Congress and their spouses from owning and trading individual stocks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This is part of how we root corruption out of Washington. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49534839/362522940/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMzZTQ2OC01YTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoewovau6uBfNwMfP7GtL29ueuPZWc5vQcuoNY950g4=&emci=4033e468-5a21-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4433e468-5a21-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
Here’s the way I see it: someone can be a member of Congress, or they and their spouse can own and trade individual stocks, but they shouldn’t be able to do both at the same time. The American people need to have confidence that their representatives in Washington are making decisions in the public interest — not to line their own pockets. **There’s bipartisan will in Washington to ban members and their spouses from owning and trading individual stocks. I’m going to keep pushing. But Congress needs to know that this should be a top priority, so I’m asking this grassroots team to raise your voice.** [_**Add your name if you agree: Members of Congress and their spouses shouldn’t be allowed to own and trade individual stocks.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49534840/362522941/-739771365?refcode=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&ms=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMzZTQ2OC01YTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoewovau6uBfNwMfP7GtL29ueuPZWc5vQcuoNY950g4=&emci=4033e468-5a21-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4433e468-5a21-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) I’ve been working on this issue for years, and I believe we’re closer than ever to making it happen. But I won’t stop there. We need to go even further, including banning federal judges, Cabinet secretaries, and other top officials from owning and trading stocks. And to root corruption out of Washington, we must end lobbying as we know it, put a padlock on the revolving door, strengthen judicial ethics, and more (yes, I’ve got a plan for all that). In the meantime, though, we can at least get Congress to take this basic step: Put your money in conflict-free investments, or pick a new line of work. [_**Let’s get this done, and let’s increase confidence that Congress is working in the public interest. Add your name to say you’re in this fight all the way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49534841/362522942/-739771365?refcode=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&ms=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMzZTQ2OC01YTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoewovau6uBfNwMfP7GtL29ueuPZWc5vQcuoNY950g4=&emci=4033e468-5a21-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4433e468-5a21-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49534842/362522943/741115837?refcode=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&ms=EMZ7L_STK_E_20220820_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMzZTQ2OC01YTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoewovau6uBfNwMfP7GtL29ueuPZWc5vQcuoNY950g4=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: How we'll fix the homelessness problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
,
Did you know that during Gavin Newsom’s term, we have seen the homelessness problem in California become increasingly worse every year?

That’s despite his administration pouring millions into so-called ‘solutions.’

This has to stop.

First of all - we have to finally declare Homelessness a Public Health Crisis!

I need your help in signing my petition: Say you’ll support my policy to solve the Homelessness crisis by building affordable housing, funding recovery and mental health programs, and using proven methods that have actually worked before! (https://go.briandahle.com/petition-homeless?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mailchimp&utm_campaign=How we'll fix the homelessness problem&utm_term=X)
SIGN HERE (https://go.briandahle.com/petition-homeless?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mailchimp&utm_campaign=How we'll fix the homelessness problem&utm_term=X)
There are many things we can do to address the homelessness problem in California immediately, including prioritizing mental health tools, addressing the drug crisis with renewed urgency, and reinstating funding for sober-living homes that help individuals transition out of addiction.

It’s time.

Sign this petition if you agree.

Say you’ll support my policy to solve the Homelessness crisis by building affordable housing, funding recovery and mental health programs, and using proven methods that have actually worked before! (https://go.briandahle.com/petition-homeless?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mailchimp&utm_campaign=How we'll fix the homelessness problem&utm_term=X)
SIGN HERE (https://go.briandahle.com/petition-homeless?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mailchimp&utm_campaign=How we'll fix the homelessness problem&utm_term=X)
Thank you for doing everything you can and standing with us.

- Senator Brian Dahle

name: Fetterman, John
subject: there's this guy Sean Hannity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
have you heard of him?
| | |
---
Hi, friend, it’s John Fetterman.
It brings me *no* pleasure to ask, but are you familiar with the host of a little show on Fox News named Sean Hannity??? 🤡
I’m just asking because my Republican opponent, Dr. Oz, recently made an appearance on Hannity’s radio show.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49535329/362524945/-238718192?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1948-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDA5NDNmYS01YTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avt4lDj0j-uKJmTs0Ao1Z9trz61Ey4CJKwLy_EN-rHA=)
And if you couldn’t guess already... **My dudes Dr. Oz + Sean Hannity spent the entire time spreading BS lies + ATTACKING me and our campaign.**
Another day, another MAGA Republican coming after Democrats like me + Jacky Rosen. 🙄
[**Can you please rush a donation of $5 right now to help me + Jacky fight back against future Fox News attacks? name: Ken Switzer, Field Director
subject: Our opponents are worried.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gashi for Congress
body:
Dear Friend:
Special interests have already poured $100,000 into our race to fund our opponent and help push his defund the police, [anti-President Biden](https://act.myngp.com/el/jQmkOMHRd9UeoKyvJKf1Vg0vOU1TVq0KghOLCw16Epc=/kdShXyeWBx__x33gW_G6zTnseMmHM_UyK7fldMlWt28=), and anti-Israel agenda. Now, we've learned that the Working Families Party is getting involved to help our opponent because this race is ["closer than anyone expected."](https://act.myngp.com/el/jQmkOMHRd9UeoKyvJKf1Vg0vOU1TVq0KghOLCw16Epc=/MOW4Ud8xigPEi6Nwzx3cnkaSDVvy-GD3SWWHdjwejVs=?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=j-street-and-working-families-party-come-in-for-bowman-in-final-days-gashi-is-closing-difficult-choice)
We don't have special interests coming to boost our campaign in the final days. We only have hardworking volunteers like you. We're so close to the finish line and this race may come down to only a handful of votes. Vedat is counting on you to help us get the word out before Election Day on Tuesday. [Can you sign up for a shift to knock doors or make calls today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jQmkOMHRd9UeoKyvJKf1Vg0vOU1TVq0KghOLCw16Epc=/B-3Cl41q4Tn7ICd9P-YXdn5_ZhvKwDG_B9jOWpL6Els=)
Together, we can elect a champion for the Bronx and Westchester who will work with President Biden and Democratic leaders to deliver on our Democratic priorities, implement Biden's infrastructure plan and make sure we receive our fair share, keep our communities safe while ensuring our policing is fair and equitable, and stand with our allies like Israel and Ukraine.
[Sign up for a volunteer shift today](https://act.myngp.com/el/jQmkOMHRd9UeoKyvJKf1Vg0vOU1TVq0KghOLCw16Epc=/B-3Cl41q4Tn7ICd9P-YXdn5_ZhvKwDG_B9jOWpL6Els=) and let's make history electing Vedat to Congress!

Thanks,
Ken Switzer
Field Director, Gashi for Congress

body:
This is a MAJOR breakthrough for the American People:
Folks -- it's Jim Jordan.
This is a MAJOR breakthrough for the American People: **We must sound the alarm about the jaw-dropping political corruption of Joe Biden's Department of Justice.**
Listen: Every last one of the Democrats weaponizing our federal government against President Trump and other conservatives must be held accountable. [**I'M PLEADING WITH YOU TO JOIN ME.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056023:6hefBYVNY:m:1:3317145305:71A40C0D09CD55C823254EAF383CFEAD:r)
\-- The Democrats spent years lying about fake Russia collusion
\-- They sued Trump over and over again
\-- They arrested his closest advisors
\-- They seized the cell phone of one of his top allies
\-- They raided Trump's home and office
\-- They confiscated Trump's passport
\-- They even ransacked Melania's wardrobe
Then, Biden's Attorney General claimed the Mar-a-Lago raid WASN'T politically motivated... _even though President Trump is way ahead in the polls._
**This much is clear: this was a political hatchet job designed to stop President Trump from ever running again.**
THIS IS THE BIGGEST POLITICAL SCANDAL IN AMERICAN HISTORY.
[**That 's why I'm personally asking you to join me in defending President Donald J. Trump. The Democrats are going for broke to take him down. We must stand in their way. I just hope you're with me on this.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056023:6hefBYVNY:m:1:3317145305:71A40C0D09CD55C823254EAF383CFEAD:r)

Jim Jordan

body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49540834/362536781/1260720466?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220821_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQzOGVmNy02MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qL2wyvgLBlQvCqWHT_SWkLtmDSi4SUPNTeb1DkG9yVg=)

Friend,
I know my team has been emailing a lot lately in these final days of the primary election, but I also wanted to reach out this morning to say thank you for being a part of our remarkable campaign.
Together we are demonstrating what’s possible when you reject corporate PACs and special interests that have run New York for too long and instead build a grassroots campaign from the ground up.
Now, we’re on the verge of sending a resounding message in this election. A message that states that folks across NY-10 and our country are ready for big, transformational change. Our grassroots movement is ready to continue making real progress on the issues that matter to all of us.
**Because of supporters like you, I have a real chance of winning.** But since I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs — our campaign is powered by individuals, people like you. So, I have to ask:
**Could I count on you to come through with $5, $10, or whatever you feel comfortable chipping in? Every dollar will make a difference. And every vote on Tuesday _will_ decide the future of NY-10.**
Here’s the best link to give: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mlj-em-aug-2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49540838/362536785/-587701841?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220821_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQzOGVmNy02MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qL2wyvgLBlQvCqWHT_SWkLtmDSi4SUPNTeb1DkG9yVg=)**
Thank you so much for helping us during this critical moment. I’m humbled by your support.
— Mondaire

name: Nikki Fried
subject: A wave is coming
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
And women are leading the way

https://nikkifried.com/ [https://nikkifried.com/]
Peter,
I want you to take a look at this headline:
https://makeaplantovote.com/ [https://makeaplantovote.com/]
Since the hyper-conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , things have changed.
Women are pissed off, Peter. And no matter what state you look at — red or blue — they’re registering to vote like never before.
Too many pundits have been building the narrative of a red wave this November, especially here in Florida. But if there’s any wave this year, it’s going to be a wave of women standing together, fighting together, and taking back our basic rights at the ballot box.
And Democrats need a nominee who’s ready to lead it.
As the only candidate in this race who’s never wavered in her support for abortion rights, I’m more than ready to lead the fight for abortion rights in Florida — to give women and girls the proud, pro-choice voice we deserve.
We have two more days until the Florida primary. Today is your LAST DAY to vote early. And I’m counting on you to get out there and make your voice heard in the fight for women’s rights. If you’re with me, click here to make your plan to vote today. [https://makeaplantovote.com/]
Let’s win this fight!
— Nikki

Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I can tell you what happens next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Here’s how it goes in some parts of the world
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkhs91hu84vn0ja0479bvuhnhd6s240gm0md3beo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7ad3hc1p72tr0cdqj2tdimso72clledge3cj36tib6p1nc3gbepb3e6om4ttgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664qb6o30eti6cd34mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cdi60p71c1i66oh5u)

|
---
| | | Here's how it goes in some parts of the world, Friend.

When a group takes power, one of the first things that group does is criminalize dissent and political opposition, and then when the supporters of the political opponents speak out about it, they are targeted. **That is what is happening this week.**

The next thing you are going to see is the Democrats are going to say Trump supporters and Republicans are being unreasonable. They will say they think we might be a threat and that we're radical extremists.
_**The next step in this whole process is going to be the people who are supporters of Donald Trump speaking out are going to begin to get harassed and labeled as insurrectionists. **_
---
| | | [STOP THE LEFT'S ABUSE OF POWER](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zho5hrglnse22saktev4g0369mr2p7cb9oht1te0_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)
---
I find this wrong. I find this sick. And I find this incredibly dangerous. The Democrats are obsessed and the far-Left will stop at nothing.

People don't understand this is a playbook from all over the world. The far-Left believes **that their mission is so worthy that anyone against it must be evil, must be criminal and must be investigated.**

**This is why elections really matter.** We've got to take back the majority in the Senate and get to the root cause of these dangerous decisions.

But to do this, Friend, I need your help. **I 've been called one of the most vulnerable Senators this election cycle and a poll just this week showed that I'm tied with my far-Left opponent.

_[I've been outraised for over a year now so I'm begging for your help. Will you please chip in $25 to help stop the Left's abuse of power and help Republicans take back power?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9qic42s4qpoc704gg8sp80975srkopajjkpfs7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)_**
---
| | | [HELP REPUBLICANS TAKE BACK POWER](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeh8rlquejr89slfqhvq3cevh7i7rjfinuntnpo0_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)
---
We have to work together to find the truth.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6lgkr6re3irgtsu6vrld4s66squmia8u6umte0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)
---

Marco
---
| | | [STOP THE LEFT'S ABUSE OF POWER](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z069ogp52aqjm4k9g7damu0vf9aovdunsqhiokfg_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)
---
| | | | |

* * *
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcvp3ce0b1uhse02ts4u6d8rd85cognjs1hklvog_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs) This is no joke. **My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time,** and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous.

I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda.

**The Filibuster will be abolished.

Speech will be censored.**

**And conservatives will be silenced.**
| | [HELP MARCO DEFEAT PELOSI >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zng75i88qcouri6p3spqt85ho6n15b7mah6qtsjo_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)
---

What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values.

**[So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5phsi3g4uqjp66gsleb53nuauuju7fpc7lbrlo8_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ie2o34cdh2bs)**

body:
Here’s how we’re fighting back:
|

It may be scary, but it’s the reality we’re living in, friend:
**Gerrymandered GOP majorities in state legislatures across the country are dismantling our democracy** , and they’re using their power to crack down on everything from voting rights to abortion rights and more. If we don’t fight back, the consequences will only get more dire as time goes on.
The good news is the NDRC has been on the case for years now, and we’re working to defend our democracy this November. Here’s our 3-pronged plan to get the job done:
1. **SUPPORT PRO-DEMOCRACY CANDIDATES** we’ve endorsed up and down the ballot who are committed to defending voting rights and ending GOP gerrymandering. So far, we’ve endorsed 14 candidates!
2. **PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS** as some in the GOP ramp efforts to restrict access to the ballot.
3. **DEFEND OUR ELECTION INFRASTRUCTURE** and stop election deniers from seizing control of election administration and polling places.

_All_ of these efforts will be critical if we’re going to ensure the survival of our democracy for future generations. But it takes a lot of resources to do this kind of work across so many states, and we’re counting on support from donors like you to keep it up.
If you’re just as worried about the future of our democracy as we are, please don’t sit on the sidelines. Pitch in anything you can today to help us keep up this crucial work in the months and years ahead:

body:
This may be your last chance to save him.

House Democrats **just** introduced a bill to **remove** Clarence Thomas as an active Supreme Court justice. But their shady plot doesn't stop there...

The Radical Democrats are charging ahead to pack the Supreme Court, impeach Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch, and now sideline Clarence Thomas.
[**The future of America is hanging in the balance, so we 're asking 15 Conservatives from your zip code to help us save the Supreme Court AND the Conservative Majority President Trump fought so hard to build.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055340:JdPaZYVNl:m:1:3334294963:20230D13942D49976D8258A229E1B6A5:r)

But they're not going to get away with it. Not on your watch.
[**Stand with Clarence Thomas right now by adding your signature to our petition before House Democrats try to force him into retirement.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055340:JdPaZYVNl:m:1:3334294963:20230D13942D49976D8258A229E1B6A5:r)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49543184/362541497/1927938479?refcode=220821_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA3MTgxNy02MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wP7JIudgrBpAcl1HXN92k0XUC188NjYlIb4ZW1iw6s8=)
Team — I’ll be honest with you: When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out. I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family — and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get. I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me. And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat. But I need to ask you to do more. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: thank you for keeping up this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=pjRo0mjbYAGUbArxnEPt0cZD4jCf4ApVfwtolNNHXWZZSfdHNJmSNXtKNzQGykfXZlcHRc5tynEabYl%2FvH0vtY7DdNtLYN0doX%2B%2BY7J0hRLRp%2FWU6HBgE7UW2fUMM4HJS3%2FZS0ntQtLhKvebmRmmzEXI9sdLXt5LXi9KFbkOTm3dW8hExt6nRyvJmdZxVpQ%2FPl%2FhZWXBRbifLcqkDjWNETqfv8c%2B359mhzyl8697xVljw6ousJn47rt8ckLeDyUvnW0Xfk4dDV92LIz1R7x1nTV08KNwWluM0q7ZEVu8LWouVYBB%2BgE4oGcFVUCSBsT97vSEAnHQ2xC07fUBMQXLO9SVJhoJeP%2FNX3bgOpmZ1iT8PE%2BVxF%2F1utWzwTPrdLQVrxUqITL%2FtVxJw4JWHLcLbyOGOahnLmU59EqDWblRonYa81cf4Ju338pg5ePnz7vb)
---
| |
---
Hi team,

We’re in our final mid-month fundraising push for August, and I wanted to reach out quickly to ask for your help one more time.

_We’ve got just two and a half months to go till the midterms. And it’s no secret that just about everything is on the line — across the country, and in our election specifically. NJ-07 is one of the LAST truly competitive House districts in the country, and one of the CLOSEST toss-up races on the ballot this year._

I need you to step up for my campaign today, so we can compete in the final 80 days until the election. Here’s a secure link to give $10 or whatever you can:

[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/august-donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49545327/362544161/1719613603?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_202208020_1_6&refcode2=da459d3b-6421-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTQ1OWQzYi02NDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTte4dr53rqXQH27qBucGxFVFYzC7JHNm7Pk4y3YtI0=)

**This election will almost certainly determine control of Congress. That means it’s up to our small-but-mighty grassroots community to:**

→ Keep our responsible majority in power and stop the extremist GOP from taking back Congress — so we can fend off their attacks on our democracy and block their plan to enact a national abortion ban.

→ Defend the progress our majority has made — from enabling America to lead the world to clean energy, to lowering costs for families and protecting healthcare for seniors.

→ Ensure New Jerseyans’ voice is heard in Congress and defeat my opponent, Kean Jr., whose campaign is being bankrolled by insurrectionists.

I know it’s a HEAVY responsibility for our community to carry. But I wouldn’t have it any other way. I’ve seen folks across our district step up time after time when it matters most. And I know that just like we saw in Kansas earlier this month, our grassroots hustle will win out if we keep pushing as hard as we have been.

[We’re gearing up for the FINAL push in this campaign. We are so close to meeting our $20,000 fundraising goal, and my job is to make sure we have the resources to win over every single voter we possibly can — through a massive voter contact operation throughout the fall. Can I count on you to help today? name: Marco Rubio
subject: I can tell you what happens next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Here’s how it goes in some parts of the world [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6961%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=4RhL0Lp5Q8ncFrp5YTVg2w&sysid=1)
Here’s how it goes in some parts of the world

|
---
| | | Here’s how it goes in some parts of the world, Friend.

When a group takes power, one of the first things that group does is criminalize dissent and political opposition, and then when the supporters of the political opponents speak out about it, they are targeted. **That is what is happening this week.**

The next thing you are going to see is the Democrats are going to say Trump supporters and Republicans are being unreasonable. They will say they think we might be a threat and that we’re radical extremists.
_**The next step in this whole process is going to be the people who are supporters of Donald Trump speaking out are going to begin to get harassed and labeled as insurrectionists. **_
---
| | | [STOP THE LEFT’S ABUSE OF POWER](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c73385%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=euTJ0P2AMPi8dV3NRdWuzQ&sysid=1 "STOP THE LEFT’S ABUSE OF POWER")
---
I find this wrong. I find this sick. And I find this incredibly dangerous. The Democrats are obsessed and the far-Left will stop at nothing.

People don't understand this is a playbook from all over the world. The far-Left believes **that their mission is so worthy that anyone against it must be evil, must be criminal and must be investigated.**

**This is why elections really matter.** We've got to take back the majority in the Senate and get to the root cause of these dangerous decisions.

But to do this, Friend, I need your help. **I’ve been called one of the most vulnerable Senators this election cycle and a poll just this week showed that I’m tied with my far-Left opponent.

_[I’ve been outraised for over a year now so I’m begging for your help. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Not the news I wanted to share with you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056039:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056040:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056039:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056039:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056039:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056039:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)** We really could use your help.

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056039:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056041:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056042:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056043:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056044:JSrD9YVxN:m:1:3317145305:A8FBBB063998A117D6D95A561546F0E4:r)

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: We’ve accomplished a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Congressional Leadership Fund, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee, https://www
body:
But there’s still more work to do.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9cno4a48jd9mac70k70n2nu8e9pips9g8cksdro_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ieao72c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onj6ip6adj169g76cj1e5p60tjnclin3cli65p72ctjegq68crnc3ib4d1kcupbfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9kmdg60tr5cor61cr2cuobapbi4no)
| |
---
| |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
I’m honored to have earned the Republican nomination to represent Wyoming in the House of Representatives!
I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming: for our farms, our energy industry, and now I’m ready to do the same in Washington, fighting for President Trump’s America First vision - [**and with Joe Biden as President, I’ve got a lot of work to do.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmgadsbgf93mndoo75u84i8afn189s52om8quk8_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ieao72c5h2bs)
---
[**Help Build our America First Majority!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5nsd0mtv33bocrsb7mj3gi13qh6j1ttc29q6h10_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ieao72c5h2bs)
---
Democrats are **WAGING WAR** on everyday Americans. With the Border Crisis, grocery prices, and taxes ALL GROWING, Joe Biden has done _nothing_ to ease the pain of working-class families. Biden’s _America Last_ policies have been a disaster for our country, that’s why it’s _critical_ that **[America First Republicans](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zihuov6s2gjnph3jg0ofuq1bf30s3tqjein2gr7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ieao72c5h2bs)** take back control of Congress in November! If we fail to secure a Red Wave, Joe Biden and the Radical Left will have another 2 years of unchecked power. **We cannot let that happen.** [**Please chip in ASAP to help us RESTORE President Trump’s Majority so we can hold Biden accountable for his disastrous agenda!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1e0i4javvesrjcecd7nh9e8gra8tudjjeqdqt88_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1ieao72c5h2bs) Sincerely,

Peter,
---
President Donald J. Trump released a powerful video after the FBI raided his home and seized his passports.
---
**But YouTube CENSORED President Trump 's video.**
---
_Here 's what they told me:_
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056077:6_X09YVNw:m:1:3331421248:7F7522298AAD37697134671643462CAD:r)
---
Are you kidding me? The FBI just treated an innocent man like a political prisoner, but YouTube claims __President Trump__ is the "violent" one?
---
**Meanwhile, the Left is engaging in REAL violence against my campaign by stealing and vandalizing our Trump signs, shoving razor blades in our tires, and shattering our windows.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056077:6_X09YVNw:m:1:3331421248:7F7522298AAD37697134671643462CAD:r)

body:
I need a favor. I have a message my district wants to send to Sen. Stabenow. | | | _****_ _**I can't believe Jack Bergman voted 'No' on this bill. My opponent made an astounding vote directly in opposition of real, good-paying jobs in our own district. Jack Bergman owes hard working families of Northern Michigan and the UP an explanation. **_
---
**Help us[thank Sen. Debbie Stabenow](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49546958/362548395/-2009887588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlZTcwNy02OTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2osi63FioZcb0yor_B-TgPucLnlAez9UhiLP06oMuQ=&emci=a06fa6dc-6421-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=298ee707-6921-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) for being a champion for the CHIPS+ Act.**

[SEND THE TWEET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49546959/362548396/-2009887588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlZTcwNy02OTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2osi63FioZcb0yor_B-TgPucLnlAez9UhiLP06oMuQ=&emci=a06fa6dc-6421-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=298ee707-6921-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49546960/362548397/-2009887588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlZTcwNy02OTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2osi63FioZcb0yor_B-TgPucLnlAez9UhiLP06oMuQ=&emci=a06fa6dc-6421-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=298ee707-6921-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427)
---
**_The CHIPS+ Act secures dedicated funds to support the domestic production of semiconductor technologies. These chips are critical for the U.S. auto industry and workers, and many are made here in the 1st District, supporting hundreds of jobs._**
---
| | Our reliance on overseas manufacturing impacts every U.S. citizen and our national security. We need to bring it back home. **My opponent voted against this game-changing bipartisan bill** , and Congress signed the bill into law despite his attempt at obstruction. This bill is an example of the government coming together for a common goal to recharge the American economy and remain competitive with China. U.S. tech innovators invented semiconductors, but domestically the Nation only manufactures 12% of the supply. Asia produces over 75%. Earlier this year, Calumet Electronics, one of a few American manufacturers producing components for microelectronics, announced an expansion creating 80 jobs in the Keweenaw Peninsula. **I support “Made-In-Michigan manufacturing, good jobs, and working families in the 1st District.** Jack Bergman owes hardworking families of the 1st District an explanation. Why did Jack Bergman vote against good-paying jobs? Why didn’t he support improving national security? Why does our Congressman vote against us and not for us? Unacceptable. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve real representation. Help me get to Congress so I can support great legislators like Sen. Debbie Stabenow. -Dr. Bob
---

clean_body: | | | | Ron's always on the front lines of the fight for progressive policy. From health care to the tax code to the climate crisis, Ron's led the charge to make our government more responsive, more inclusive, more just, and to create an economy that works for working families, not special interests. That work has paid off, as the Senate and the House have now passed historic legislation to secure a clean energy future, lower prescription drug costs, and ensure corporations pay their fair share — sending it on to President Biden for his signature. It took years, but Ron persevered, fought the good fight, and won. = = When Senate efforts on climate stalled, Ron stuck with it and kept pushing. For years, he's been spotlighting high prescription drug prices through his work on the Senate Finance Committee. Every time a billionaire tax cheat bragged about not paying their fair share, Ron proposed solutions to make our economy work for everyone. There is still more to be done.And Ron's already leading the fight for data privacy, protecting reproductive freedom, health care, cannabis legalization, and much more. But Ron can't win these fights alone; as always, he needs the strength and commitment of our grassroots movement to power through Republican obstructionism and get it done. = Team Wyden | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. subject: Your 2022 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsbAIxIhNa

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on
eliminating the Second

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osbAIxIhNa

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will
only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve
liberty for future generations. Thank you!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isbAIxIhNa

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osbAIxIhNa

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
Jim Jordan knew about OSU wrestling scandal

Team,
I was just on TV on NBC in Columbus this morning! **I was asked about Jim Jordan's character.** I said Jim Jordan is a man who can't be on the right side of even sexual abuse.

**I was asked about the Ohio wrestlers.** Just so you know, I have spoken with the wrestlers and what they’ve told me is absolutely terrible. I stand with the wrestlers and I am ready to hold Jim Jordan accountable. I**f you cannot get on the right side of sexual abuse,** for students who you helped recruit, who you promised their parents you would protect them, and then you fed them to a predator, **then you should not be in our government, let alone hold a leadership role! **
[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49547706/362552486/295253583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ2YjU4OWUtNmEyMS1lZDExLWJkNmUtMjgxODc4YjgzZDhhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9FnrdYTRQeFwnzDdTIM8DblXdj8gfddNs-RSH_sejU=)

**[Team, we can't let Jim Jordan cover up sexual abuse and his participation in planning the coup and get away with it. If Republicans win the House this November, Jim might be the next Speaker of the House. Will you donate $10 right now to help me kick this phony out of Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49547708/362552490/295253583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ2YjU4OWUtNmEyMS1lZDExLWJkNmUtMjgxODc4YjgzZDhhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9FnrdYTRQeFwnzDdTIM8DblXdj8gfddNs-RSH_sejU=)**
I want to be Ohio’s 4th district advocate in Washington D.C., not a talking head like Jim Jordan. I am a mom, small business owner, and I was born and raised in Ohio. **I am about the kitchen table issues like Senator Sherrod Brown. **

The foundation of our country is at risk. I want to protect Democracy, women’s freedom, lower taxes, remove the SALT cap, remove double social security tax, and cut taxes on overtime pay.

I said Jim Jordan is a man who can't be on the right side of even sexual abuse. I was asked about the Ohio wrestlers. Just so you know, I have spoken with the wrestlers and what they’ve told me is absolutely terrible. I stand with the wrestlers and I am ready to hold Jim Jordan accountable. If you cannot get on the right side of sexual abuse, for students who you helped recruit, who you promised their parents you would protect them, and then you fed them to a predator, then you should not be in our government, let alone hold a leadership role! = = = I want to be Ohio’s 4th district advocate in Washington D.C., not a talking head like Jim Jordan. body:
For the first time in TWO DECADES, Missouri has an open Senate seat.
| | |
---
**Peter: For the first time in TWO DECADES, Missouri has an open Senate seat. That means that Democrats have an _incredible_ opportunity to flip Missouri BLUE in November – and we cannot afford to lose.**
If we let Eric Schmitt or John Wood win this November, you better believe they will do EVERYTHING they can to hold onto power in the Senate for decades to come. **We cannot afford to elect another right-wing radical to Washington who will vote against our right to choose, against our democracy, and against progress for American families.**
That's why proud nurse Trudy Busch Valentine is running to defeat them and take advantage of this rare open seat. **She's giving Democrats the opportunity to flip this seat blue, protect our Senate majority, and elect a leader who will bring compassion, integrity, and kindness to Washington.** Trudy will work night and day to win real results for families, and you can count on her to put people before politics every single time.
**We have no idea when this seat will be open again, so we _must_ ensure that Trudy is the senator voters send to Washington this November.**
**[So please, before the GOP takes back this seat and elects another extremist who will wreak havoc for decades to come, will you pitch in to this historic campaign to flip Missouri blue? Every single donation counts and helps us take advantage of this incredible opportunity to defend abortion rights, combat gun violence, and move our country forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49548132/362554178/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk235-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjE3M2QwZC02YjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txSwyTKiJF18zcGxIosezOWtDTBsiZazTqE6hGkEMdU=)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We must sound the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a MAJOR breakthrough for the American People:
Folks -- it's Jim Jordan.
This is a MAJOR breakthrough for the American People: **We must sound the alarm about the jaw-dropping political corruption of Joe Biden's Department of Justice.**
Listen: Every last one of the Democrats weaponizing our federal government against President Trump and other conservatives must be held accountable. [**I'M PLEADING WITH YOU TO JOIN ME.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056085:6ginXYVNO:m:1:3331421248:4FCCAD59B85CD2805986DAC6F3E0E99E:r)
\-- The Democrats spent years lying about fake Russia collusion
\-- They sued Trump over and over again
\-- They arrested his closest advisors
\-- They seized the cell phone of one of his top allies
\-- They raided Trump's home and office
\-- They confiscated Trump's passport
\-- They even ransacked Melania's wardrobe
Then, Biden's Attorney General claimed the Mar-a-Lago raid WASN'T politically motivated... _even though President Trump is way ahead in the polls._
**This much is clear: this was a political hatchet job designed to stop President Trump from ever running again.**
THIS IS THE BIGGEST POLITICAL SCANDAL IN AMERICAN HISTORY.
[**That 's why I'm personally asking you to join me in defending President Donald J. Trump. The Democrats are going for broke to take him down. We must stand in their way. I just hope you're with me on this.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056085:6ginXYVNO:m:1:3331421248:4FCCAD59B85CD2805986DAC6F3E0E99E:r)
**[DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056085:6ginXYVNO:m:1:3331421248:4FCCAD59B85CD2805986DAC6F3E0E99E:r)**
They CANNOT get away with this. [**Will you help me stop them, or not?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056085:6ginXYVNO:m:1:3331421248:4FCCAD59B85CD2805986DAC6F3E0E99E:r)
For America,
Jim Jordan
**[DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056085:6ginXYVNO:m:1:3331421248:4FCCAD59B85CD2805986DAC6F3E0E99E:r)**
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

subject: FL-13 Candidates Interview with Fox 13
body:
FL-13 Candidates Interview with Fox 13 | | | |
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=357552ff06&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
| | | **Watch the FL-13 Candidates Interviews with Fox Tampa Bay13 ! **
Hi Friend!

Team Makki is excited for our big day with Fox News National here in Clearwater at Lenny’s Diner! The momentum has never been stronger and people are tired of the campaign my opponents have run, with over $4 million in dark money bombarding this district with negative mailers and tv ads for their campaigns.

We have kept this race about the issues affecting the middle-class and retirees, about our veterans, and about Pinellas County. While my opponents fight each other, I’ve always focused on how I will fight for you.

Before you vote on Tuesday, we wanted to share interviews from last week with Tampa Bay’s Fox 13 who individually interviewed the candidates in the race.

Amanda Makki:
[https://youtu.be/qn57NBTcvA8](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=db221f637d&e=c2296cffff)
Kevin Hayslett:
[https://youtu.be/mttNbL7XwuY](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=7bf3e1dc9b&e=c2296cffff)
Anna Paulina Luna
[https://youtu.be/zpCu19HP9Qo](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=12d265c5eb&e=c2296cffff)

We also wanted to share the Spectrum Bay News 9 debate for FL-13, and WFLA Channel 8 from earlier this month. Both Luna and Hayslett declined to show up.

WFLA: [https://www.wfla.com/video/battleground-florida-august-14-2022/7913464/](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=06f517b7a0&e=c2296cffff)
Bay News 9: [https://www.baynews9.com/fl/tampa/news/2022/08/01/community-conversations-with-congressional-candidates-district-13](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=8293d59836&e=c2296cffff)

Please let us know if you’d like to make calls or volunteer to work the polls on Tuesday morning or evening!

Gratefully,

Team Makki

body:
Hi there. It’s John Fetterman — Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate.

**Mmmm 😋crudité!**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49549258/362559489/-2123395702?refcode=EM_FR_220821FettermanSplit_FR_90DO_10_G_N_image&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmViMWRjNS03MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUvDNHrK2SZS-WOwLu2D1m7Cd2CCIPDlVp2Kn7fYh54=) Just kidding. This is NOT a photo of me holding crudité.

Here in PA, we just call this a veggie tray. I bet that’s what LBR calls it too.

Seriously. If this looks like anything other than a veggie tray to you, then I am probably NOT your candidate.

_Because there’s nothing more patronizing to everyday people than calling a “veggie tray” some fancy French word that literally everyone has to look up on Google. 🙄_ [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49549259/362559490/-2123395702?refcode=EM_FR_220821FettermanSplit_FR_90DO_10_G_N_image2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmViMWRjNS03MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUvDNHrK2SZS-WOwLu2D1m7Cd2CCIPDlVp2Kn7fYh54=) I can’t tell you how critical it is that Democrats defeat ridiculous, crudité-eating Republicans like Dr. Oz in November.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The criminal attorney general of Texas must go.
body:
& that’s just what his aides say!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Ken Paxton is a criminal. **Texas Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton is a walking, talking criminal enterprise and shameless right wing extremist.** And if we do our part, he's about to lose to a Latina Democrat, a watershed moment in Texas and American politics. [**Can you join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Rochelle Garza so she can become the next Attorney General of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc4c669a-605b-49ab-ac7b-c1fc04b4683c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Barely in office for six months, in July of 2015, a state grand jury indicted the supposed top law enforcement officer in Texas on three criminal charges, i** ncluding 2 counts of securities fraud. In 2016, the Securities & Exchange Commission filed a civil enforcement action against Paxton for defrauding investors in a company he'd represented as legal counsel. **In October of 2020, seven of Paxton's top aides--including First Assistant Attorney Jeff Mateer--published a letter accusing Paxton of improper influence, abuse of office, bribery and other crimes. It's honestly almost comical that this clown is still Attorney General. ** **Paxton also filed suit vs numerous states where President Biden bested Donald Trump in 2020, trying to overturn the election results based on near-non-existent voter fraud and idiotic reasoning that was laughed out of court. He was brought up on ethics charges for this specious lawsuit by the State Bar of Texas. ** **_Besides being a corrupt clown, Paxton is an extremist and traitor. He was in Washington January 6th to speak on behalf of Trump and rile up the violent, seditious crowd that eventually attacked the Capitol. He's pushed religion in schools, pursued felony cases for "voter fraud" against voters of color for accidentally putting the wrong address on voter registration forms, pushed guns on Texas campuses and supported court clerks violating the Contitution by refusing to issue marriage licenses to same sex couples._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: ROCHELLE GARZA FOR TEXAS](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf6da565-5212-41f0-98df-ee94502fbbed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I could honestly go on for days, because if there is something stupid. bigoted or downright criminal, chances are Ken Paxton has done it. This is why _he only won his reelection in the red state of Texas by 3 points in 2018, and now he's in real trouble_. I**n a recent poll he is only leading Democratic rockstar Rochelle Garza by 2 points, 34%-32%. Because of all I just said above, this corrupt, cacophonous jack-in-the-box only has a 40% approval rating, and among the many--19%--of undecided voters, Garza beats him by 5%.** Oh, and did we mention an Libertarian candidate is in the race supported by mostly disgruntled Republicans who won't vote for Paxton? **Garza, meanwhile, in 2017 took on then Appellate Court Judge Brett Kavanaugh, Trump and Paxton, defending a 17 year old detained immigrant who was denied the right to an abortion, AND WON. This case resulted in the "Garza Notice" which prevents teens in immigration-detention centers from being denied their right to bodily autonomy, even post-Roe.** **Garza has outraised this monster ($520,000 to $340,000), she has outworked him and she outthinks him every day. She'd bring much needed diversity to the Texas Attorney General's office. With our help, she can beat him** and work with Beto to help speed the transformation of Texas from a reddish-purple into a blue state. She is inches away from achieving this incredible feat.
[**Can you join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Rochelle Garza so she can become the next Attorney General of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf60cdcc-6228-4df3-a1ee-6494adb3ff55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for inspiring Democrats, and ending the careers of corrupt-hack Republicans. Cliff
---
|
---

name: Team Cavaleri
subject: Please join us - Monroe Fair Days Parade
body:
Good afternoon Cavaleri for Congress family,
[image: image.png] [image: image.png]

This *Saturday, August 27th* is the Monroe Fair Days parade. As usual with
every parade in our district, we will have a massive presence. The parade
begins at 11 am but we must be lined up by 10 am.

We always love to have some sort of prop that corresponds with the region.
My dear friend, Snohomish County Deputy Heidi Mcallister will be riding her
show horse Josie (see picture above), as a team of about 20 or 30 of us
march behind, and hand out candy and flyers.
T-shirts will be provided if you do not already have one. Please indicate
your size when you respond to the email.

This is always a fun time, and a great opportunity to not only get involved
with my campaign but with your communities.
*Please respond by Wednesday, August 24th so we have an accurate headcount.*

We will notify everyone Friday morning where our rendezvous point will be.
The parade marches through downtown Monroe on W. Main St., so I will find
the most optimal location for us to muster.

Thank you in advance for your activism.

Sincerely,
Vincent

Thank you in advance for your activism. Sincerely, Vincent

name: Dan Goldman
subject: What comes next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN GOLDMAN FOR NEW YORK |
body:
This is a race we cannot afford to lose.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49549520/362562103/1064912967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDhlODdiZS03MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CdAWizJXlO6mhrEra2vCltjRQqnvvPtasLh9pknPWH4=&emci=a90ad1ed-f61f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e48e87be-7221-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13556823)
---
Peter,

Election Day is just two days away, on Tuesday. Right now, I want to take a minute to talk about what comes _after_. **When we elect our next representative from NY-10, he or she will face some of the most pressing challenges our government has ever seen.**

The truth itself is under attack by right-wing radicals who want to see this country burn. The same far-right elements are waging all out war on our most fundamental rights. And playing politics as usual just isn’t working.

name: Team Kelly
subject: Respectfully asking you to make your first donation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we show up for Mark today, we’ll be one step closer to securing victory in November.
#

Friends — we’ll keep this short.
We’re writing to humbly ask if you’ll make your first donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
We’re making incredible progress toward our August fundraising goals — but we still have work to do to get there. If you chip in today, we’ll be one step closer. You might even be the one that puts us over the top!
So, whether you’re sending $5 or another amount, it adds up quickly when we’re all doing our part.
And that’s how we defeat Trump and Masters to re-elect Mark Kelly — together.
[**So please, can you make your first contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? If we show up for Mark, we’ll be in a better position to secure victory in November.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug22.Iyxc-M&refcode=em220821-1-7&t=1&akid=3589%2E6688874%2EcS9M_x)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: 10 things about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I’m Maggie, and I’m running in one of the top battleground Senate races of 2022.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49550731/362565103/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1475-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTgyN2Y2ZC03MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNpzxuOhkWShOADooF68w8r2M3TJee3VAWknk9STNQ=)
---
My name is Margaret Wood Hassan. Some people call me “Senator,” two very special ones call me “mom” (more on that in a second), but most just call me Maggie. You might already know a bit about me and what I stand for.******[If you do, I hope you’ll take a second to give even just $3 to my reelection campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49550732/362565104/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1475-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTgyN2Y2ZC03MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNpzxuOhkWShOADooF68w8r2M3TJee3VAWknk9STNQ=)** But no matter how much you know about me, today I want to take a moment to reintroduce myself. So...
Hi folks – I’m Maggie, and I’m running in one of the top battleground Senate races of 2022. As a part of that campaign, I wanted to share 10 things about myself with you:
1. Before I was an elected **anything,** I was a mom: I’ve been a State Senator, Governor, and U.S. Senator, but before I began my life in public service I had my two wonderful kids – Meg and Ben. Advocating for kids like my son Ben, who has cerebral palsy, was part of what led me into public service in the first place.
2. I’m one of **four** Margarets: My grandmother was Margaret Cooke Byers, my mother is Peggy Byers Wood, I’m Maggie Wood Hassan, and my daughter is Meg. I stand on the shoulders of each Margaret (and every woman) that came before me, and I’m committed to making a better world for young women like my own daughter Meg.
3. I am only the second woman in history to be elected both Governor and Senator: Serving New Hampshire in both roles has been the honor of a lifetime and I’m proud to share the titles of Governor and Senator with my friend and colleague Jeanne Shaheen (the _first_ woman to be elected to both roles!).
4\. In college, I played rugby: While I’m glad that politics is only a full contact sport _metaphorically_ , the teamwork and toughness rugby taught me are skills I carry with me to this day.
5. I’m the daughter of a veteran: My dad, who survived the Battle of the Bulge, instilled the importance of service in me. His example has also inspired my tireless advocacy for the brave men and women who, like him, have served and sacrificed for this country.
6. My dad used to ask “What are you doing for freedom today?” at the breakfast table: With that question, he instilled in us the importance of fighting for freedom every day – not just for ourselves but for those around us. Although it’s been a while since I was a girl eating cereal at that breakfast table, I still think about those values and that question to this day.
7\. I love horseback riding: While I’m not particularly interested in the proverbial political horse race (I’m focused on delivering on the issues that matter most, not the polls) I grew up riding and caring for horses.
8. I do The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle every morning: And sometimes I even compete with my colleagues like Amy Klobuchar.
9. I’ve got a lovable dog named Chip: Chip was originally a service dog in training who joined the Hassan family after realizing he was a little too social for the job. There’s nothing I love more than taking him for a long walk on a rail trail near our home – even though he always seems to find a way to drag me off the path and into a creek...
10. 1,017 is a number I’ve got memorized: That’s how many votes we won this seat by in 2016. Without those 1,017 votes we wouldn’t have saved the ACA or passed the Inflation Reduction Act, so I’m incredibly proud of that number. But I’m also acutely aware of the fact that it’s the slimmest margin of any sitting U.S. Senator. I end with this fact because it is not just about me, it is about all of us. That razor thin margin is proof that holding this seat won’t be easy. **[I’ve won tough fights before but it always takes teamwork – so, friend, I hope you’ll join my team today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49550733/362565105/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1475-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTgyN2Y2ZC03MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNpzxuOhkWShOADooF68w8r2M3TJee3VAWknk9STNQ=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49550734/362565106/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1475-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTgyN2Y2ZC03MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNpzxuOhkWShOADooF68w8r2M3TJee3VAWknk9STNQ=)
---
Now that you know a little more about me friend, I hope I can count on your support. Serving New Hampshire as a U.S. Senator has given me the opportunity to deliver on the issues that matter most, and with so much on the line this November we can’t afford to lose this seat. **[So please, help us win this race and keep the Senate by chipping in what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49550735/362565107/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1475-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTgyN2Y2ZC03MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNpzxuOhkWShOADooF68w8r2M3TJee3VAWknk9STNQ=)**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: I’m Maggie, and I’m running in one of the top battleground Senate races of 2022. | | | = My name is Margaret Wood Hassan. Some people call me “Senator,” two very special ones call me “mom” (more on that in a second), but most just call me Maggie. You might already know a bit about me and what I stand for.****= But no matter how much you know about me, today I want to take a moment to reintroduce myself. So... Hi folks – I’m Maggie, and I’m running in one of the top battleground Senate races of 2022. As a part of that campaign, I wanted to share 10 things about myself with you: 1. Before I was an elected anything, I was a mom: I’ve been a State Senator, Governor, and U.S. Senator, but before I began my life in public service I had my two wonderful kids – Meg and Ben. Advocating for kids like my son Ben, who has cerebral palsy, was part of what led me into public service in the first place. 2. I’m one of four Margarets: My grandmother was Margaret Cooke Byers, my mother is Peggy Byers Wood, I’m Maggie Wood Hassan, and my daughter is Meg. I stand on the shoulders of each Margaret (and every woman) that came before me, and I’m committed to making a better world for young women like my own daughter Meg. 3. I am only the second woman in history to be elected both Governor and Senator: Serving New Hampshire in both roles has been the honor of a lifetime and I’m proud to share the titles of Governor and Senator with my friend and colleague Jeanne Shaheen (the first woman to be elected to both roles!). 4\. In college, I played rugby: While I’m glad that politics is only a full contact sport metaphorically , the teamwork and toughness rugby taught me are skills I carry with me to this day. 5. I’m the daughter of a veteran: My dad, who survived the Battle of the Bulge, instilled the importance of service in me. His example has also inspired my tireless advocacy for the brave men and women who, like him, have served and sacrificed for this country. 6. My dad used to ask “What are you doing for freedom today?” at the breakfast table: With that question, he instilled in us the importance of fighting for freedom every day – not just for ourselves but for those around us. Although it’s been a while since I was a girl eating cereal at that breakfast table, I still think about those values and that question to this day. 7\. I love horseback riding: While I’m not particularly interested in the proverbial political horse race (I’m focused on delivering on the issues that matter most, not the polls) I grew up riding and caring for horses. 8. I do The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle every morning: And sometimes I even compete with my colleagues like Amy Klobuchar. 9. I’ve got a lovable dog named Chip: Chip was originally a service dog in training who joined the Hassan family after realizing he was a little too social for the job. There’s nothing I love more than taking him for a long walk on a rail trail near our home – even though he always seems to find a way to drag me off the path and into a creek... 10. 1,017 is a number I’ve got memorized: That’s how many votes we won this seat by in 2016. Without those 1,017 votes we wouldn’t have saved the ACA or passed the Inflation Reduction Act, so I’m incredibly proud of that number. But I’m also acutely aware of the fact that it’s the slimmest margin of any sitting U.S. Senator. I end with this fact because it is not just about me, it is about all of us. That razor thin margin is proof that holding this seat won’t be easy. = | | = Now that you know a little more about me friend, I hope I can count on your support. Serving New Hampshire as a U.S. Senator has given me the opportunity to deliver on the issues that matter most, and with so much on the line this November we can’t afford to lose this seat. = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . name: Tim
subject: what I’ve learned from my friend, Sherrod Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Sherrod Brown & Tim Ryan

Folks—I’m running for Senate to join my friend Sherrod Brown in
giving Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the Senate. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1010&amount=25&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Before I say
more, will you add a $25 grassroots donation to support my campaign and
help us cut workers in on the deal?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1011&amount=25&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate

Sen. Sherrod Brown is a lifelong fighter for working people in Ohio and
around the country. We both understand folks are working harder than ever
before, but falling even further behind.

But if we don’t elect another Democratic Senator here in Ohio and expand
our Senate majority this fall, hardworking Ohioans will continue to get
left behind by business-as-usual politics.

Together, Sherrod and I can deliver real results to Ohio’s families—like
raising wages, making childcare more affordable, and expanding health care
access and higher education opportunities for everyone.

Along the way, I’ve learned a lot from Sherrod—like how to run a strong,
grassroots campaign to overcome millions in GOP dark money and, perhaps
most importantly, that a pro-worker Democratic Senate candidate can, in
fact, win right here in Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1012&amount=25&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Now it’s up to us to make sure Sherrod has some back up in the Senate.
So, will you make a $25 contribution to my campaign to cut workers in on
the deal and win the race that will decide Senate control? Your support is
critical.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19437?t=1008&amount=30&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Other Amount

Sherrod and I could be a dynamic duo in the Senate—but we’ve got to win
first.

Let’s go!

—Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=5125%2E3611125%2EwRg-Bg ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Demings, Val
subject: the stakes could not be higher, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help today
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49527839/362496210/-1489698644?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4123-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzFkMmYzMi01MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZZh1MolWzzxb6KKfNfg-ceXAbmnnJp8N-4bnn2nEdU=)

**I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help today, friend.**
When I first launched this campaign over a year ago, grassroots Democrats like you came out in droves to support me. This momentum has carried me far: **Two polls released last week showed me TIED with Marco Rubio,****The Cook Political Report upgraded my chances of winning and CNN called Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip blue!**
But Marco Rubio is trying to wipe away all of my momentum, running low-blow attack ads to defeat me by smearing my record. **I've got thick skin, but that doesn't change the fact Rubio and the Senate GOP have hauled in over $50 million. **
There's no way around it: My biggest obstacle to winning this race will be having the resources it takes to go toe to toe with Marco Rubio in what experts say will likely be the most expensive Senate race ever. That's why I set a $250,000 pre-primary fundraising goal – which is ambitious, but it's what it will take to compete with national Republicans and their dark-money allies.
**I'm counting on every person reading this email to help me out with a grassroots donation, and for the first time ever, your donation will be MATCHED 2X! With Senate control on the line in this tight race, the stakes could not be higher. **
**[I cannot afford to miss this goal and time is running out to double your impact before my pre-primary deadline, friend: Please, can you give $5 – or anything you can spare right now while it will be DOUBLE MATCHED – to help me defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49527841/362496212/-1489698644?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4123-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzFkMmYzMi01MTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZZh1MolWzzxb6KKfNfg-ceXAbmnnJp8N-4bnn2nEdU=)**

I know I'm asking a lot of you, but that's because this grassroots campaign relies on committed supporters like you to win in Florida – not dark money and megadonors. Thanks for your sustained support.

Congresswoman Val Demings
