clean_body: I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help today | | | = I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help today, friend. When I first launched this campaign over a year ago, grassroots Democrats like you came out in droves to support me. This momentum has carried me far: Two polls released last week showed me TIED with Marco Rubio,The Cook Political Report upgraded my chances of winning and CNN called Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip blue! But Marco Rubio is trying to wipe away all of my momentum, running low-blow attack ads to defeat me by smearing my record. I've got thick skin, but that doesn't change the fact Rubio and the Senate GOP have hauled in over $50 million. There's no way around it: My biggest obstacle to winning this race will be having the resources it takes to go toe to toe with Marco Rubio in what experts say will likely be the most expensive Senate race ever. That's why I set a $250,000 pre-primary fundraising goal – which is ambitious, but it's what it will take to compete with national Republicans and their dark-money allies. I'm counting on every person reading this email to help me out with a grassroots donation, and for the first time ever, your donation will be MATCHED 2X! With Senate control on the line in this tight race, the stakes could not be higher. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I know I'm asking a lot of you, but that's because this grassroots campaign relies on committed supporters like you to win in Florida – not dark money and megadonors. Thanks for your sustained support. name: Herschel Walker
subject: I am worried.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056138:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056139:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056138:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056138:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056138:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056138:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)** We really could use your help.

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056138:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056140:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056141:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056142:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61056143:JCyq_YVSN:m:1:3331421248:27A88B685786096A984E2FF655F4D55A:r)

subject: I'm neck-and-neck with an extremist

Hello,
I know you hear a lot from me, but I just saw that we are still $19,450 short of our fundraising goal. **Time is running out before our midnight deadline, so I had to reach out.**
With the polls this close and control of the Senate on the line, we simply cannot afford to fall short and miss a single goal. The latest polling shows we are gaining ground on Chuck Grassley. His approval ratings are now the lowest they’ve EVER been.
And if we turn Iowa blue this November, the pundits say Democrats are guaranteed to protect and expand our Senate majority. But with Grassley just dumping another $2 million on TV ads against me, I need your help now if we’re going to fight back and win.
**Iowa was one of the closest – and most expensive – races in the country in 2020. This November, it’ll be even closer and even more expensive. Every dollar is going to matter. But if we fall short of this crucial fundraising goal now, we won’t have the resources we need to surge into the lead.**

body:

And I'm not going to make it complicated - once you've finished reading, [**I hope you 'll make a donation to support Greg Stanton today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gnVz90Tpz8Au7b9yeagSFOsoHoyDEusbGX7OD10E_z8=/A_0_VMSakb6-k9rFT6DRXwdbUxtiO8ZtYLzAAYPPUL0=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.08.21_b1_cjcm_all)

I won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020, and experts are forecasting an even closer race this year. **I won’t sugarcoat it: we are in real trouble.**

We were recently ranked in the top 10 most competitive seats in the country, and FiveThirtyEight is even saying that my far-right opponent is **“slightly favored”** to win. Republicans think they have a real shot at defeating me and flipping this seat red, and they’re spending big in an effort to do it.

I’m not afraid of a tough fight. But to hold this critical seat we need serious resources, and that starts with grassroots supporters like you.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare right away to ensure I defend my seat again and stay in Congress advocating for American families and workers?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49551617/362568481/-1105104058?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220821-z-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkM2Y2Zi03OTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VwKPnko2-_gRkmdumJgqNrDWzOTb_hHNb9nYXTQtw4=)

clean_body: I won’t sugarcoat it: we are in real trouble. | = | Peter, I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, = | = I won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020, and experts are forecasting an even closer race this year. I won’t sugarcoat it: we are in real trouble. We were recently ranked in the top 10 most competitive seats in the country, and FiveThirtyEight is even saying that my far-right opponent is “slightly favored” to win. Republicans think they have a real shot at defeating me and flipping this seat red, and they’re spending big in an effort to do it. I’m not afraid of a tough fight. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ad4fe2c4faf492d96130277b55442df&_e=WydUpMzI2R58V4v_b9m4MxQ13HC8n08QxwwtEVP5c8KDtd7Y1zG6-VRnMDZFJ6Xd64OrTEUxqb_x8wtMV_fcgnJzn84ndkyrG1AgqVg0w5jrPeMehC0XG5vmsXYtLOuC4qP659d_fWa4MovgA53uu5qKMgmCCJKcFK68bhtfB9fMSBcX7hLIqM-0XyBZ17izWs7_13OGppV3luCFtFuKgfCYZxevm8DlhR4Uz1t2p16n6ArCUGnBKSxIl2gtLUdQiag4qa4cArDa2k1oGF15rDgWAVaGlHfaLOVBZrOYENnak4nKcfz3m__YffE2ajeST_2nuCjgk4yAm4G1fUGVsuRyxirsqWz9ZXcrl2YHRRikfsTdwMTDZw9HGII0fw3BqEcEdU4d1TLzgcUfIj4nPEBTks0C1qvPMO2N2LptQu3_6izWx3PXtZivjoV-2T_UBBXFcNFE4iFARWMmkn-U1w%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ad4fe2c4faf492d96130277b55442df&_e=WydUpMzI2R58V4v_b9m4MxQ13HC8n08QxwwtEVP5c8KDtd7Y1zG6-VRnMDZFJ6Xd64OrTEUxqb_x8wtMV_fcgnJzn84ndkyrG1AgqVg0w5jrPeMehC0XG5vmsXYtLOuC4qP659d_fWa4MovgA53uu5qKMgmCCJKcFK68bhtfB9fMSBcX7hLIqM-0XyBZ17izWs7_13OGppV3luCFtFuKgfCYZxevm8DlhR4Uz1t2p16n6ArCUGnBKSxIl2gtLUdQlklBasAbW3OwOu97CsNKzOUHrnXJUrC9YrndJh0VoyzQPSU6-zIwehXsJzxxrBPO4LI7XUnYuxHzg_hEyVxEuNAo1IfmnxjpI7ryrLMLG9_Z8LzIx61i595l-eGglV3q6ods1aPHRx_SOxSi5wBH5mLUfACYVf-IszUmz00LPVxi4iMU-T2Sz1-mnhY9HtON9r3m4gjgr_l0fRU7jv16Ng%3D%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ad4fe2c4faf492d96130277b55442df&_e=WydUpMzI2R58V4v_b9m4MxQ13HC8n08QxwwtEVP5c8KDtd7Y1zG6-VRnMDZFJ6Xd64OrTEUxqb_x8wtMV_fcgnJzn84ndkyrG1AgqVg0w5jrPeMehC0XG5vmsXYtLOuC4qP659d_fWa4MovgA53uu5qKMgmCCJKcFK68bhtfB9fMSBcX7hLIqM-0XyBZ17izWs7_13OGppV3luCFtFuKgfCYZxevm8DlhR4Uz1t2p16n6ArCUGnBKSxIl2gtLUdQx0ury-EQGS-sznHqrtx1Gnllq_EUMX1QmxkG23SvlUDKiQ6vKISumhwzSgxRW0dcTXGK_p2JpXsa5BivAIhc45LRvOJtaa-nri7WGgz5QqFuz5_uR3fpcxyuaBcEeXUdTdDrMTHveAeGVMHS5Q2vt404fTL22RsjDcNauMIOrmXkuWDxCV3hSGTA2JRGtyyp8O7NzDN-Xi-9bAvGjsVPUw%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Team Tina
subject: We need yard signs across Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — it’s a Sunday, so we are going to keep this quick. With less than three months until Election Day, our campaign is ramping up our voter outreach. One of the best ways to show our grassroots strength is through yard signs! The truth is that name recognition can make or break a campaign, and it’s a pretty big deal to us when people choose to display our sign. When our conservative opponents spend millions on advertising, we can show up with grassroots momentum, and we want to make sure that everyone who wants a yard sign can get one. [**We’re about to place a huge order of new yard signs this week. subject: our brand new Bernie Sanders sticker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis, did you see the team’s message about our exclusive new “Bernie on the stairs” sticker?

[**Pitch in $10 dollars or more, and we’ll send you this iconic vinyl sticker that commemorates how hard Bernie keeps fighting for our progressive agenda!**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6878?t=11&akid=3265%2E5885482%2Et5oFIT)

**_—Begin Forwarded Message—_**

Peter Willis,

Bernie never gives up, and neither do we.

After fighting to make the Inflation Reduction Act more progressive and offering a series of amendments voted down by corporate Dems, a photographer snapped an iconic shot of Bernie resting on the Senate stairs.

Bernie’s frustration with corporate lobbyists killing his popular proposals is so relatable, but we also share his perseverance.

That’s why we commissioned an exclusive new vinyl sticker of Bernie on the stairs to remind us that despair is not an option. **_[Chip in $10 or more now, and we’ll send you one of these exclusive “Bernie on the stairs” stickers!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6878?t=12&akid=3265%2E5885482%2Et5oFIT)_** [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6878?t=13&akid=3265%2E5885482%2Et5oFIT) [Get Your Sticker](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6877?t=14&akid=3265%2E5885482%2Et5oFIT) As Senate Budget Chairman, Bernie has aggressively pursued a progressive policy agenda that directly helps working people - and we are shifting the window of what’s possible.

While corporate Dems were able to weaken the bill, it still passed, and if Bernie hadn’t fought so hard it would have been much weaker or not happened at all.

[**Click here to stand with Bernie against corporate Dems and extreme Republicans by chipping in $10 or more to claim your very own “Bernie on the stairs” sticker→**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6878?t=15&akid=3265%2E5885482%2Et5oFIT)

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

---
* * *

****Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power.

[Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5920?c0=OR_EM_FR_30SP_20220821_1_2.eRB9YN&t=8&akid=3265%2E5885482%2Et5oFIT)

name: VoteVets
subject: Please give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets runs some of the most powerful ads every election cycle. We move numbers. We do it in places most other organizations can’t.
#
Derek -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets before our critical fundraising drive ends. Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
VoteVets runs some of the most powerful ads every election cycle. We move numbers. We do it in places most other organizations can’t.
We are once again coming up on a number of important budget decisions. What states can we afford to spend in during the final two months, and where can we not?
Control of the Senate is basically a coin flip. Our ads will make a difference in at least one race.
If we can afford it...

name: HER Time
subject: Did you miss our petition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/O0wkgwt0irbjYKcmizc14VfX-Gir_FNGkK5um-CppKc=)
---
Millions of women across the country have lost the right to choose what they can do with their own bodies. So we're fighting like hell to make sure we elect leaders who will protect abortion rights no matter what. ([**You can support our midterm effort here!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/uptzA9N2NN3ySj4xqGAC8aLHKahhMALFBs_Zw7bewGk=?refcode=X_082122_AbortionPetition2_B))
But _we can 't wait until November_. That's we've put together a list of actionable demands for Congress to protect our reproductive freedom.
[**Call on Congress to act NOW to protect abortion rights nationwide | _Sign on here_ >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/eDmqMbrQ4dgySCGFqJUByt9jbrle1mDeuVG5TuU_3i8=?source=direct_link&)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Katie Hill** <[team@her-time.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/xU2VOZdCRaPG8NtSmReoKNN2XSKbkAq7MUo3yJ1le2E=)>
Date: Wed, Aug 17, 2022 at 2:07 PM
Subject: Tell Congress: Keep 👏 up 👏 the 👏 energy

Congress accomplished a lot of amazing things over the summer. These bills will make a huge difference for folks across the country. BUT, none of them address the fact that in June, women lost a fundamental right to make decisions about their own bodies.
**That 's why we put on together a letter calling on Congress to take action to protect our reproductive freedom.**
[**You can add your name (and strengthen our movement) here >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/eDmqMbrQ4dgySCGFqJUByt9jbrle1mDeuVG5TuU_3i8=?source=direct_link&)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/eDmqMbrQ4dgySCGFqJUByt9jbrle1mDeuVG5TuU_3i8=?source=direct_link&)
---
Thank you!
-- _HER Time_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/IWkmb9KylOQ719U8uCVuEOPBmjZ2qFh3wi6XFliTa1U=?refcode=X_082122_AbortionPetition2_B)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/IWkmb9KylOQ719U8uCVuEOPBmjZ2qFh3wi6XFliTa1U=?refcode=X_082122_AbortionPetition2_B&recurring=1)

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time **[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/IRlBPrAjfs7NHgkB3iL9WcxKXYi-xqXpNAB8o50frwM=?refcode=footer)**, and **[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/O0wkgwt0irbjYKcmizc14VfX-Gir_FNGkK5um-CppKc=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
---

HER Time PAC
2120 University Ave
Berkeley CA 94704 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/GNZrqDJ7HWpaTGlgXTVunIHu5kwON3hpxniVb2WLoF0=/TS-QGieThd8dvwuVdRQj_4TSnrFU-maIc_CcexeZpro=).

| Peter \-
---
| There are just 2 days remaining until Trump-Endorsed, America First fighter Matt Gaetz faces a critical Primary Election!
With America First fighters now becoming TARGETS of Deep State raids, we can't afford anything less than REAL leadership that has the backing of President Trump and other top leaders of our movement.
Otherwise, our district might be stuck with Lincoln Project-funded RINO leadership... Nancy Pelosi and the Biden Regime would like nothing more than to see one of Trump's allies defeated 2 days from now!!
We can't let them win.
That's why we're calling for our movement to pool together $10K in online grassroots funding to put the final touches on our [Winning Strategy](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h20N6mSRS4GNm-mEsd-XogHbZo1LdWisSJHMKKcP7DYZDSLsES81JOK4oHn06jeex_87C7k1lr9kMYQXFzI4pHiOhmXQzSnaxtjNHDKd-owCK2nTxeraLY9lEWcH3CRT3QEGms0eEb6RkAbsFA_HXj5z02SR61dbit3HiPRI0t13k8wyQLWhnSZNydPbOVVOMf81keZgs7Y=&c=xkbvwjscm7Wwnz6yHwISB9N3sJD07uL0xYn8LUF6IqPlI85DA7DMYA==&ch=LreB9LW3UMpUxdjve5Pu6Y43DjLUYOeNYZlObWGzlptPtw91JQauGg==) and hold off the Establishment mega-donors.

Our ballot measure campaigns are the last line of defense for those stuck without coverage. Will you add your name to show that you support our efforts at the state-level to win Medicaid expansions? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49553137/362574527/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDBjMWQyNy04MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwC0MEnj8tLGkEbwJm5_tn-RGRN2jepcLJks8judFiA=&emci=96b81af4-e81f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=440c1d27-8021-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | This past week, President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) into law — an important move that will lower prices and put hard-earned dollars back in Americans’ pockets. **But we cannot ignore that the bill also misses a big opportunity to solve the problem of the Medicaid coverage gap._Millions of Americans_ will still be stuck without coverage.** [**Our ballot measure campaigns are the last line of defense for those stuck without coverage. Will you add your name to show that you support our efforts at the state-level to win Medicaid expansions, team?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49553138/362574528/992537028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDBjMWQyNy04MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwC0MEnj8tLGkEbwJm5_tn-RGRN2jepcLJks8judFiA=&emci=96b81af4-e81f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=440c1d27-8021-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) **[POWER MEDICAID EXPANSION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49553139/362574529/992537028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDBjMWQyNy04MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwC0MEnj8tLGkEbwJm5_tn-RGRN2jepcLJks8judFiA=&emci=96b81af4-e81f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=440c1d27-8021-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582)** Folks in this gap live in 1 of 12 states that never expanded Medicaid. They make too much income to qualify for Medicaid or health care subsidies...and often get left in the middle, sometimes without any affordable health care option at all. **This is not viable going forward:_everyone_ deserves equal access to affordable health care.** [_**No one should have to choose between paying for a week of groceries and their family’s health!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49553140/362574530/992537028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDBjMWQyNy04MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwC0MEnj8tLGkEbwJm5_tn-RGRN2jepcLJks8judFiA=&emci=96b81af4-e81f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=440c1d27-8021-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) **Fairness Project has been working to close this gap state by state with local organizations and activists, passing Medicaid expansion via ballot measure _when politicians fail to act._**__ The IRA is more proof that _citizen-powered measures_ can do what 100 senators just can’t. [**We’re working on powering more Medicaid expansion measures across the country to close the gap and bring coverage to thousands, but we need your backing to do that. Will you sign on to show your support for our work to expand Medicaid for everyone, and _everywhere_ , team?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49553141/362574531/992537028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDBjMWQyNy04MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwC0MEnj8tLGkEbwJm5_tn-RGRN2jepcLJks8judFiA=&emci=96b81af4-e81f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=440c1d27-8021-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) **[SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49553142/362574532/992537028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDBjMWQyNy04MDIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwC0MEnj8tLGkEbwJm5_tn-RGRN2jepcLJks8judFiA=&emci=96b81af4-e81f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=440c1d27-8021-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582)** Thanks for your support. — Fairness Project

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: 401 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
My mom taught me growing up to always give back and serve others.
#

As I was drinking my tea this morning, I caught myself thinking back to my race for Chief Justice in 2020 and all that I’ve learned about what it takes to win statewide in North Carolina. I want to share a bit about my journey in public service and why I’m so grateful for your support.
My mom taught me growing up to always give back and serve others. It’s what drove me to become a public defender when I graduated from law school, but back then, I never imagined that I’d be on the other side of the bench. I had never seen an African American woman presiding over a courtroom until I was a practicing lawyer, and it really shifted my perspective on what was possible.
In my campaign for district judge, my opponent went around telling everyone that a mom like me couldn’t win. So I grabbed the diaper bag and knocked on as many doors as I could. I won by 30 points. From there, I went on to win two statewide races before becoming the first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.
My race for Chief Justice in 2020 was ultimately decided by 401 votes — out of over 5 million. That’s just how close these races in North Carolina can be, and there’s a real chance that this one comes down to a similar margin in November.
When the days feel long or the challenges feel steep, I think about those 401 votes. And I remind myself that I refuse to wake up with any regrets on November 9. I will do everything I can today, right now, to make sure that we flip this seat.
Every decision, every door knock and every dollar matters. That’s why I’m so grateful for everyone who has pitched in their time and talent already. But it’s going to take all of us, so I’m asking:
[**If you believe in our campaign, please consider making a donation today to help us flip this seat. The Senate majority is on the line, and a few hundred votes in North Carolina could make all the difference.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220821-1-MA&t=1&akid=1512%2E357359%2E2XraO_)

****

****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-aug22.FDUiEv&refcode=em220821-1-MA&refcode2=1512.357359.2XraO_&t=23&akid=1512%2E357359%2E2XraO_)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-aug22.z2qqW0&refcode=em220821-1-MA&refcode2=1512.357359.2XraO_&t=24&akid=1512%2E357359%2E2XraO_)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-aug22.IJ7kyv&refcode=em220821-1-MA&refcode2=1512.357359.2XraO_&t=25&akid=1512%2E357359%2E2XraO_)**
---
****
This is going to be a tough race — one of the closest in the country. But together, there’s no doubt that we will have the grassroots strength it takes to win!
Thank you for your support,
Cheri
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220821-1-MA&t=26&akid=1512%2E357359%2E2XraO_)**

subject: Join me in thanking Ron Kind for helping to pass the Inflation Reduction Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553468/362576346/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxNmU4MS04MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNQ8usgrSKlY_AIzoZWJzxf8wKNj0Yn640d38sPVEKg=) | Hi friends, As you know by now, last week President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) into law. This historic legislation will not only help rein in inflation, it will also lower prescription drug costs, save taxpayers hundreds of billions of dollars by closing corporate tax loopholes, and make unprecedented investments into clean energy. This is a monumental victory for our country, so I wanted to take this opportunity to thank my good friend Congressman Ron Kind for voting to pass this legislation through Congress! [**Will you join me in thanking Ron by signing this card for him? He deserves to be celebrated for helping get this monumental legislation across the finish line!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553470/362576355/502239835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxNmU4MS04MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNQ8usgrSKlY_AIzoZWJzxf8wKNj0Yn640d38sPVEKg=&emci=045c89c4-db1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=93f16e81-8321-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050) | [Sign your name!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553472/362576363/502239835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxNmU4MS04MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNQ8usgrSKlY_AIzoZWJzxf8wKNj0Yn640d38sPVEKg=&emci=045c89c4-db1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=93f16e81-8321-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)
---
When Democrats are in charge, **we get things done**. Ron has been delivering for our district and our country for twenty years, and now that he is retiring, we need to show him we appreciate all the work he has done for us.
[**So please, sign on to this Thank You card for my good friend Ron and help me show him gratitude for his committed service to the people of Wisconsin and the United States!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553474/362576371/502239835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxNmU4MS04MzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cNQ8usgrSKlY_AIzoZWJzxf8wKNj0Yn640d38sPVEKg=&emci=045c89c4-db1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=93f16e81-8321-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)

Fellow Patriot,
Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat donors think that conservatives are racist and closed minded.

_So then what do they think when they see an unapologetic conservative immigrant minority like me?_

_They say I’m just a white guy in an Asian suit._

**The last I checked, the definition of racism is making prejudiced judgements about someone because of the color of their skin - and nothing is more racist than thinking I have to vote a certain way just because I’m a minority.**

It’s time to send the racist radical Left packing, but I need your help.

[**Pitch in now and join our fight to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE with conservatives who speak for ALL Americans, no matter what their skin color is.**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=794d25876222473f8ce24345c2e6700b&_e=-UQsVdoWIus1ATFYSBRONpDOeRBql6H_i9YaFbxkGiQ69KL5SH-qphGjYKbTXgA3CvLRnPtYIj688TAn3zzF5IvJ1R-mpgBHvzzw2Gj19T3aVFbRvKOsI4--fn7JTY3jKW2dDVkZSgPCFsJcl4hOsuXHmDIGdCC61nVzAHOTJjW4tpdaMhJpQlVuU6SfVl03eC3Iet0YX-YcCK28yrny_STTFIjrhB3YZrM-7D5RvjeYqwD1NswiX1ADpsIixq_-gdI43oI2R00m1jAUME8tpcbmiN8TyfwTY8Fiqx2TMOEX8nWwYWpgSWD_QoE8Diqj8w4gYd8UhlzqjZxgMRyPFQ%3D%3D)

I’m proud to be an Asian American legal immigrant, but that’s not the only thing that defines me, Fellow Patriot.

I’m also a special operations Navy veteran, a devoted Christian, and a homeschooling father of five.

Democrats want to define us by our race, and when their predisposed cookie-cutter molds don’t fit, they write us off as “not real minorities.”

_It’s time for that to change._

**[America’s communities know what ivory tower Democrats don’t: that Americans want safe streets, affordable goods, and well-paying jobs, no matter WHAT race they are. Join our team today to build a House majority that works for ALL of our citizens and unites America under our great flag.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=794d25876222473f8ce24345c2e6700b&_e=-UQsVdoWIus1ATFYSBRONpDOeRBql6H_i9YaFbxkGiQ69KL5SH-qphGjYKbTXgA3CvLRnPtYIj688TAn3zzF5IvJ1R-mpgBHvzzw2Gj19T3aVFbRvKOsI4--fn7JTY3jrUYpHWY6Mq323Qqtx78RohtQEVwo4wO7xDnjXTgZL1qmPuKMd2Va94CTzUibMc45mgX-KURlURQhl5wonFkLRVuza2VNVIRYIBw7gEAklxx0Ac4GB4KD3FY3T_-_ZgUEndKtTlxpbgwv67kEu_skfwKUm6gyFNsr5kxzupuj056l7jna6kIx72VIq8UAUhA5lcoiCIrhol2WFkS1fWXKBQ%3D%3D) **

name: Team Schmidt
subject: We can’t repeat this disaster again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
As Kansas kids go back to school, we are still faced with major challenges... Massive school lockdowns led to declining student menta2018 campaign prom| | |
---
| | Friend,**

**As Kansas kids go back to school, we are still faced with major challenges... Massive school lockdowns led to declining student mental health and academic achievement over the past few years under Laura Kelly’s leadership and did lasting harm to many of our kids. And Kansas students and parents continue to pay the price. **We can’t allow Laura Kelly to continue to fail our students.****If you agree, will you chip in $50 today? >>> [https://secure.winred.com/schmidt-for-kansas/contribute](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=8a5dbdf12f654147ba2dab7ca9177c44&_e=SB6FSpreanmtwLpo1AKEnOWP28x77HzaIai8KCd2rT_i3waVta_6c66FXYFkJFo2i3EiQRcZrdS83bPA2VMtDJK7ftYGvND_k3EmVuPesnFpXYhAg3287ED8bsigRDmJ7BJ_rl4smMjQT9V_irJSX3njfMILg5FbFJvRwvlodckIL10j0Gd3J7Q7tPeYlx0GMT2EVxK0WwmNga75Zb1tcfTKZSLmvziaNFPWUXeItHM5rIIiyAaL2kRXOkyjyScl6MtU3YRx0fAgpgLlDqY542uCEDNIJncHHKV805FrLl1uBZbAJwRbpeJZ77VkLHPTUbOt-o6kl7t28cOytSilxfHl1Iql-r6e2kFbjzJIu-Fl36cw-PkJ81DIXrxMTCXqh-PxAaYQ4Ht3VetdK8QCHnubo8MHbj5w7dOFtI96DLI1QBvMEvoHLS25MiptVyheSeHFX0tB61L5AgE3QB6iss5kAuJCoP1we8tF7ab8Zb_-nsvee2yYqDDP9ZGa-4SG)

** While Kelly campaigned in 2018 as a “champion for students” and promised to improve mental health outcomes, the data and actual experiences of kids and parents today are vastly different. A [survey](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=8a5dbdf12f654147ba2dab7ca9177c44&_e=SB6FSpreanmtwLpo1AKEnDK7lvJyP0lCfg89JkW2G7fEv9b9Sj7wYmhV1IwWg00bwn5slnTCPLq8kS1n6JdeU2mbfIazabNXravAZUF-yDuLbcLgBC-s7AxdwUqVV5PBP7SoEahjZEOELYxSIs9eTfqDMWTezSSN8Bvd86aV8sGb7zqvkIvxGYZegyIk4Pu6eTW2JMMVm4YRmsDIC1EPxJk7aEAr_TH2qSg8fPviqNVU3-3MbbOI_MtCnrh5KhCyrGlJ-9-er2tSy7IHscvMC8EA6LBd_41AtGPYB3SuvnyZXhg-QgHZF2Q8ycqQJGU6) conducted by the _Centers for Disease Control and Prevention_ on the effects of school closures on high school students showed that **almost 20% of those surveyed had seriously considered suicide in the 12 months before the survey**. Similarly, the CDC survey results reported 37% of students shared that they experienced poor mental health during the pandemic. These outcomes are devastating. But we can still get Kansas schools and students back on track. To ensure Kansas never repeats this disaster, Derek Schmidt is committed to: ✅Constitutionally funding our schools✅Keeping students in the classroom ✅Addressing school safety by providing more mental health professionals for schools
We’re ready to provide a better education system and future for Kansas kids. clean_body: As Kansas kids go back to school, we are still faced with major challenges... Massive school lockdowns led to declining student menta2018 campaign prom| | | | | Friend, As Kansas kids go back to school, we are still faced with major challenges... Massive school lockdowns led to declining student mental health and academic achievement over the past few years under Laura Kelly’s leadership and did lasting harm to many of our kids. And Kansas students and parents continue to pay the price. We can’t allow Laura Kelly to continue to fail our students.If you agree, will you chip in $50 today? >>> While Kelly campaigned in 2018 as a “champion for students” and promised to improve mental health outcomes, the data and actual experiences of kids and parents today are vastly different. A conducted by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention on the effects of school closures on high school students showed that almost 20% of those surveyed had seriously considered suicide in the 12 months before the survey. Similarly, the CDC survey results reported 37% of students shared that they experienced poor mental health during the pandemic. These outcomes are devastating. But we can still get Kansas schools and students back on track. To ensure Kansas never repeats this disaster, Derek Schmidt is committed to: ✅Constitutionally funding our schools✅Keeping students in the classroom ✅Addressing school safety by providing more mental health professionals for schools We’re ready to provide a better education system and future for Kansas kids. | | Thank you for your support! -Team Schmidt | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:

In**Louisiana, Alabama, Georgia, and Ohio** , judges have determined that the **GOP-drawn congressional maps are likely illegal gerrymanders** that discriminate along partisan or racial lines.
**However, in all four cases, elections this year will go forward using those maps.** And in two cases, it’s because the Trump Supreme Court directly ordered it. When considered alongside the Supreme Court’s gutting of the Voting Rights Act, it paints an extremely alarming picture of the future of democracy.
The good news is we have a plan that _doesn’t_ rely on the Supreme Court to do the right thing. That plan includes fighting in **17 Democracy Target states** across the country to defend voting rights and help elect **14 Democracy Defender candidates** who understand what’s at stake. We’ve made incredible progress with this model in recent years, but we need your help to keep all our work going.
**Securing fair maps and voting rights is critical to protecting our democracy, friend, and there’s too much on the line to sit this one out.[Will you pitch in today to help us keep up all our work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49541333/362537811/1479146301?&amount=20&refcode=20220821.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NDM4ZWY3LTYxMjEtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=As6Sre0QpjoHqWCMmza8H3VEFlDhpAQHyNg8yPEiGE4=)**

clean_body: A.G. Holder: "Gerrymandering... disproportionately hurts the voting power of communities of color." | We'd say this is unbelievable, friend, but unfortunately, that's no longer true: | = InLouisiana, Alabama, Georgia, and Ohio , judges have determined that the GOP-drawn congressional maps are likely illegal gerrymanders that discriminate along partisan or racial lines. However, in all four cases, elections this year will go forward using those maps. And in two cases, it’s because the Trump Supreme Court directly ordered it. When considered alongside the Supreme Court’s gutting of the Voting Rights Act, it paints an extremely alarming picture of the future of democracy. The good news is we have a plan that doesn’t rely on the Supreme Court to do the right thing. That plan includes fighting in 17 Democracy Target states across the country to defend voting rights and help elect 14 Democracy Defender candidates who understand what’s at stake. We’ve made incredible progress with this model in recent years, but we need your help to keep all our work going. Securing fair maps and voting rights is critical to protecting our democracy, friend, and there’s too much on the line to sit this one out.= = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you for your support, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: =?utf-8?Q?Carl=20Paladino?=
subject: Get out and vote
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/30e4029c665d/vote-early-in-person-now-11823073?e=7e49f828ab)
---
| |
---
| | Dear friend, I just wanted to send you a quick note, **TODAY August 21st is the last day for in person early voting.** I would urge you to please make a plan to vote, and consider voting early in person today. You can find your early in-person polling location by **[clicking](https://CarlPaladino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=ae0752d69b&e=7e49f828ab)[here](https://CarlPaladino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=92bd7fa30b&e=7e49f828ab)**. Your polling location on Election Day, this Tuesday, will be your normal polling booth. The corrupt establishment is opposing my campaign, and the Never Trump donors in the DC swamp will stop at nothing. Their allies in the liberal press have joined the smear campaign, but voters know me and my strong consevrative record. I need your help to send a message to the DC swamp, I will be your voice and fight for you everyday. If you show up and vote, we will win this election in a landslide. **Election Day is this Tuesday, August 23rd, and we need all America First Patriots to FLOOD the polls. I am hoping to earn your vote.** The reason that I decided to run for Congress is simple: I want to give back to this community. I have been blessed with great success in this area, creating thousands of jobs, and serving as President Trump’s 2016 campaign chair right here in New York. We defeated the establishment then, and with your help, we will do it again on August 23rd. I wanted to remind you that Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, the House Republican Conference Chair, will be campaigning for me at our very important telephone rally. Congresswoman Elise Stefanik is one of President Trump’s closest allies in Congress, you might remember her from helping defeat the sham impeachments, and beating Pro-impeachment RINO lunatic Liz Cheney as Conference Chair for the House Republicans.

**You can join the tele-rally by dialing 833-305-1685 on August 22nd at 7PM.** Lastly, our camping has created an **ELECTION INTEGRITY HOTLINE**. If you see any shady or illegal behavior happening at the polling locations, make sure you report it. You can call **716-539-2994**. I strongly believe in the integrity of our election, and we will expose any shady tactics or corrupt behavior. Best,
Carl Paladino
---
| [ ](https://CarlPaladino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=2d87834165&e=7e49f828ab)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear friend, I just wanted to send you a quick note, TODAY August 21st is the last day for in person early voting. I would urge you to please make a plan to vote, and consider voting early in person today. You can find your early in-person polling location by . Your polling location on Election Day, this Tuesday, will be your normal polling booth. The corrupt establishment is opposing my campaign, and the Never Trump donors in the DC swamp will stop at nothing. Their allies in the liberal press have joined the smear campaign, but voters know me and my strong consevrative record. I need your help to send a message to the DC swamp, I will be your voice and fight for you everyday. If you show up and vote, we will win this election in a landslide. Election Day is this Tuesday, August 23rd, and we need all America First Patriots to FLOOD the polls. I am hoping to earn your vote. The reason that I decided to run for Congress is simple: I want to give back to this community. I have been blessed with great success in this area, creating thousands of jobs, and serving as President Trump’s 2016 campaign chair right here in New York. We defeated the establishment then, and with your help, we will do it again on August 23rd. I wanted to remind you that Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, the House Republican Conference Chair, will be campaigning for me at our very important telephone rally. Congresswoman Elise Stefanik is one of President Trump’s closest allies in Congress, you might remember her from helping defeat the sham impeachments, and beating Pro-impeachment RINO lunatic Liz Cheney as Conference Chair for the House Republicans. You can join the tele-rally by dialing 833-305-1685 on August 22nd at 7PM. Lastly, our camping has created an ELECTION INTEGRITY HOTLINE. If you see any shady or illegal behavior happening at the polling locations, make sure you report it. You can call 716-539-2994. I strongly believe in the integrity of our election, and we will expose any shady tactics or corrupt behavior. Best, Carl Paladino | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Paladino for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Charles Booker
subject: 37.3 million Americans like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

While speaking at an event this week, my glucose meter kept beeping.
Usually, I try to hurry and silence it. But this time, I stopped to check
my level in front of the room. Let me tell you why:

I was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes over 20 years ago. I found out when I
woke up in the hospital after passing out in high school. I was there for
a week.

Every day since, I've taken 2 forms of insulin just to stay alive, and I'm
not alone. The CDC estimates that one in every ten Americans has diabetes.
That's 37.3 million of us who depend on insulin for survival.

We've become used to predatory politicians like Rand Paul, who
successfully fought to remove a $35 insulin price cap from the Inflation
Reduction Act. What we need are more people who understand us in Congress.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220821.vi2UuK&refcode=em20220821-2386&t=1020&akid=2386%2E346206%2EKxiLGB ]I won't stand by while Republican leaders make life harder and harder
for us while they profit. That's exactly why I'm running for Senate. Will
you commit to a $5 donation to help get me there?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220821.vi2UuK&refcode=em20220821-2386&t=1021&akid=2386%2E346206%2EKxiLGB ]Contribute $5

Just to be clear, insulin should be free. The proposed $35 cap on insulin
in the Inflation Reduction Act was the floor.

But Rand Paul made sure millions of hardworking Americans would get no
relief from the burden of paying exorbitant amounts for our lifesaving
medicine.

The only reason insulin is so expensive is because the higher price tag
puts more money in the pockets of Big Pharma execs and their shareholders.

I don't think that's right, and the majority of Americans agree. As the
next Senator for Kentucky, I will always push back against the business as
usual model that puts our health last.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220821.vi2UuK&refcode=em20220821-2386&t=1022&akid=2386%2E346206%2EKxiLGB ]I'm asking you to stand with me and chip in $5 today so
I can get to the Senate and fight for OUR interests, not corporate
interests. Can I count on your support?

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220821-2386-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2386_346206_KxiLGB&akid=2386%2E346206%2EKxiLGB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2386%2E346206%2EKxiLGB

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Tucker Carlson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We all know Fox News is a bunch of BS.
#
We all know Fox News is a bunch of BS, Derek.
Of course, that didn’t stop Tucker Carlson from attacking me on national television this week. 🤔
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48700?refcode=em20220821-6934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6934%2E434096%2ERny49j)
First, he told his viewers that “John Fetterman has a very public record of failure” and is “implicated in the destruction of [Pennsylvania].”
Okayyy....
**Then, he called me “****the weakest possible candidate you could run.****”**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48700?refcode=em20220821-6934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6934%2E434096%2ERny49j)
**Derek, I need your help RIGHT NOW to fight back against these attacks and stop Tucker Carlson + his Fox News BS.**
**[If you have my back, will you please consider chipping in $10 right now to help me fight back against Tucker Carlson’s attacks on national TV? Pennsylvania is the most important Senate race of 2022, and we have less than 80 days to win this race.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48700?refcode=em20220821-6934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=6934%2E434096%2ERny49j)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48700?refcode=em20220821-6934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=6934%2E434096%2ERny49j)**
Thanks for *everything*,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Democratic Nominee for U.S. Senate
P.S. I don’t know who needs to hear this, but throughout the 2020 election, Tucker helped spread millions of smears about election fraud — and no state was smeared more than Pennsylvania. **[Donate any amount right now to help me fight back against his BS.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48700?refcode=em20220821-6934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=6934%2E434096%2ERny49j)**

subject: re: voting by mail

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

This is Lauren Groh-Wargo, Stacey’s Campaign Manager.

Tomorrow, Georgia voters will begin to request their absentee ballots.
That’s right — Georgians can start making plans to vote for Stacey this
week! And we have so much to do before the first ballot hits the mail in
just a matter of weeks.

Our ground team must continue to mobilize voters and volunteers in every
corner of the state.

Our communications team must continue to share Stacey’s vision for One
Georgia — and make sure Georgians know about Kemp’s dangerous and extreme
agenda.

Our finance team must continue to work hard and ensure we can keep our
staff paid as they continue on this race to Election Day.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B1_Ballots_S1_T1_LGW_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=1948%2E1862389%2EFFV2Z3 ]We’re neck and neck with Brian Kemp in the polls,
Derek. But we need to reach our
$200,000 goal before tomorrow evening to fuel our work and pull ahead.
Please, Derek,
will you donate $5 now to help us hit our goal before
voters begin requesting their ballots?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B1_Ballots_S1_T1_LGW_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=1948%2E1862389%2EFFV2Z3 ]DONATE

Look, Derek,
we’re in this fight for the people of Georgia:

We’re fighting for a teacher in Quitman who’s underpaid and overworked.

We’re fighting for a grandmother in Albany struggling to pay for groceries
and her much-needed medications.

We’re fighting for a small business owner in Atlanta who is grappling to
stay afloat after Brian Kemp ran opportunities like the Music Midtown
festival out of Georgia.

We are creating One Georgia where everyone can thrive together.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B1_Ballots_S1_T1_LGW_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=1948%2E1862389%2EFFV2Z3 ]But first, we need to elect Stacey Abrams to get there. We’re counting
on supporters like
you to help us hit our $200,000 goal and defeat Kemp's misinformation
before Georgians begin requesting ballots on Monday. Make your
first contribution
now, Derek, and
support our mission of making real opportunities available for all, no
matter their background or zip code.

Thank you for your support. Together, we can help Georgia thrive.

Lauren Groh-Wargo

Campaign Manager

931 Monroe Dr NE

Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I don't have the typical background of a U.S. Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I learned everything I know about work and opportunity from my parents.
#

Hi friends,
I don’t have the typical background of a U.S. Senator.
I'm the proud son of Mexican immigrants. I learned everything I know about work and opportunity from my parents. My father worked his way up from a dishwasher to head cook at a local diner with only an elementary school education, and my mother worked tirelessly as a housekeeper for affluent families.
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-aug22.-sWbty&refcode=em220821-1-30&t=1&akid=952%2E159979%2E6RNjD-)_My dad and I when I was in high school_
I grew up right here in the San Fernando Valley and worked hard as a kid. I found refuge in books and baseball and eventually earned admission to MIT and graduated with an engineering degree.**
Now, as California’s first Latino Senator, I’m working hard to ensure all Californians are afforded the same opportunities to succeed — no matter where they were born or what neighborhood they live in.
But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have other ideas. Instead of taking action to address the problems facing our state and our nation, they’re fighting to maintain the status quo that just isn’t working for so many of us.
**So please, I’m humbly asking for your support so we can take them on and WIN. If you can afford to chip in, use this link to add a contribution today:**
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Alex-Donate**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-aug22.-sWbty&refcode=em220821-1-30&t=2&akid=952%2E159979%2E6RNjD-)
Thank you so much. It truly means the world to me to have your support as we keep up the fight for California's families.
\- Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=952%2E159979%2E6RNjD-)

name: WFP Election Alert
subject: NEW POLLS: Barnes vs. Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We need to elect more working people like Mandela to office. | | | Peter, This week, two new polls dropped showing Mandela Barnes ahead of Republican Senator Ron Johnson in Wisconsin — including one poll that shows **Barnes increasing his lead by 5 points** since June. **_Marquette Law School Poll (August 2022)_
Mandela Barnes (D) 51%
Ron Johnson (R) 44%** **_FOX News Poll (August 2022)_
Mandela Barnes (D) 50%
Ron Johnson (R) 46%** Polls like these are just a snapshot of public opinion at one moment in time. **But with less than three months to go until Election Day, all signs are pointing to Wisconsin as being one of our best shots to expand the Democratic majority in the Senate by electing a progressive champion.** **[Will you contribute $3 or any amount to help power Mandela Barnes to victory in November? We need to elect a majority that will end the filibuster once and for all and actually deliver for working families, and this race is one of our best chances in 2022 to make that happen.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUR7-8ryHJVx1GuXcQyhAmpWh3agnbfexTQvVBFqE4TzdoXvsjOEotNdJd9uDT4K_UjyAH1UCus92TLbO13u0i_9rFvbu9jfNoGqtrTVIAV4G40Koyffnlw6_xvTUo0KcD2HO-YRS-0Ywmhn1Iyn_44YtEcuG12BEQcaTO7zBb4yl8agaESyBrWYSn1jNLTccRCOXTm4MStOJQd_QSToy86_19rI6_5fotqYXRcbtiDydpGfLPHq6nNPZ3zoDUkd9RhCrwLt8ERdhYrkpGd6cq57kOJ7dqYxpS04ER9fQHZKfm6E8f4Lf4i-KrHD3YuWyi/3os/smBKxgEOS72qilCKGmOQhA/h0/MzioasD4wk2PTdVtYw9hKsGIplHVQCcmOHHsyCwekec)** **[Donate Now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUR7-8ryHJVx1GuXcQyhAmpWh3agnbfexTQvVBFqE4TzdoXvsjOEotNdJd9uDT4K_UlbHP_8SLl6sJjHqA1T6lRbotqvspatzpDgjf39BqntqpZy1g6sbaxR-P98EWXMqEHjjImz0aCv3LGB62jGFutHQWddSoPC6aX6HRdSUiIdIYpeoqggsPPdrrmKoVrzUb8I0Ru-gCNlN05fzZFrXqNZOEJr52to2ByzfD86QJ5-2q3U77j1T1_pEmFJuUe2ft3p16brVB87FcPK7a0dMhxWmwOJ-ynDKMPV2Y3Sk-wUIbqv3UHqqDSnJk8ohg94lr/3os/smBKxgEOS72qilCKGmOQhA/h1/HSeE-bAHr4Ha6IF1HhqKfu0B-Bk5cK0scW_oRegiE0g)** For the last eight years, millionaire Ron Johnson has failed Wisconsin working families. He was deeply involved in Donald Trump’s effort to overturn the 2020 election. He has dismissed the horrific effects repealing _Roe_ will have on people in Wisconsin and across the country. And he has even suggested ending entitlement programs like Medicare and Social Security. We have a real shot at defeating him in November and sending a Working Families Party champion to the Senate to take his place in Mandela Barnes. clean_body: We need to elect more working people like Mandela to office. | | | Peter, This week, two new polls dropped showing Mandela Barnes ahead of Republican Senator Ron Johnson in Wisconsin — including one poll that shows Barnes increasing his lead by 5 points since June. Marquette Law School Poll (August 2022) Mandela Barnes (D) 51% Ron Johnson (R) 44% FOX News Poll (August 2022) Mandela Barnes (D) 50% Ron Johnson (R) 46% Polls like these are just a snapshot of public opinion at one moment in time. But with less than three months to go until Election Day, all signs are pointing to Wisconsin as being one of our best shots to expand the Democratic majority in the Senate by electing a progressive champion. For the last eight years, millionaire Ron Johnson has failed Wisconsin working families. He was deeply involved in Donald Trump’s effort to overturn the 2020 election. He has dismissed the horrific effects repealing Roe will have on people in Wisconsin and across the country. And he has even suggested ending entitlement programs like Medicare and Social Security. We have a real shot at defeating him in November and sending a Working Families Party champion to the Senate to take his place in Mandela Barnes. But we know Ron Johnson and his millionaire and billionaire friends aren’t about to give up. There are less than three months until Election Day, Peter. If we’re going to expand the Democratic majority so that senators like Joe Manchin don’t matter anymore, we need folks from across the country to step up and help power our get out the vote efforts today. More soon, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Gov. DeSantis’s agenda has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s:
* Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law
* Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors
* Proposed setting up his own private police force
* Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_
* Signed the most restrictive anti-choice legislation in Florida’s history
* Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state
* Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes
* Ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s scaring off tourists

... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures!

---
If there’s one thing we know about Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, it’s that she’s an ultra-MAGA Republican who is more concerned about spreading extremely dangerous lies and unfounded conspiracy theories than actually working for the American people. **[Take a moment to read on, and then make your first $7 donation to the DNC’s Red Alert Fund to fight back against Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJDjJ-mKKmEXJDrYMSyj036u31y70F4obanALGcCOqkOPR1UBOQs2lymnrMnpUiBEvw1ADj0UnaiiIxBT8YhryhWLvY-HXBCYuRYKvLuBnikzz0gJyzlZ-ENMENsFRCl0EZWzL7QczvZGqznh_0_nmkXOLfA9L_psWgqL0BAynR5r3G7C3GI3kO7L1lOyRiRxPX2xbJZoB9Uo0cc686m6-uZRHVnUMIYsiIF_YwNOaEZzLA_Imh0zQtdovMbE0724Q62e7ZBmW7kyqB9uBmItpUrODEfPOy-wiknU6xLxeSjciTCex_rgvJsmJ2SMLeOo_/3os/ZpYhLwluQ9mAK6zmmho6Xg/h0/_zm_urtAQhU2fSSiEdKzW7s_DngwL6DIxSq6ApBP5KY)** **Time and time again, Marjorie Taylor Greene has voted against key pieces of legislation. clean_body: President Biden and congressional Democrats are delivering for the people. Republicans can’t say the same. | | If there’s one thing we know about Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, it’s that she’s an ultra-MAGA Republican who is more concerned about spreading extremely dangerous lies and unfounded conspiracy theories than actually working for the American people. Time and time again, Marjorie Taylor Greene has voted against key pieces of legislation. But not only is she opposing our work in Congress, she’s spreading some pretty incendiary lies and wild conspiracy theories online about our legislative accomplishments, President Biden himself, and so much more. But Derek, it’s not just Marjorie Taylor Greene. Republicans at every level are pushing a MAGA agenda that would be disastrous for American families. We have an opportunity this November to stop the GOP in their tracks, elect Democrats nationwide, and continue delivering for working families. While Democrats are working for the American people and to lower costs, Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene are siding with special interests. So here’s the deal: we can beat the ultra-MAGA GOP this November (in fact we have a really good chance!) but it’s going to require grassroots supporters like you to step up for the first time. Make your first $7 donation to the DNC’s Red Alert Fund today. Anything you give will be put straight to work fighting back against ultra-MAGA Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene. clean_body: | | | = I have an urgent update: Ron DeSantis was JUST in Ohio to campaign for JD Vance and rally their right-wing base against us. = After multiple polls showed me beating my ultra-conservative opponent, Republicans started panicking. National Republicans unleashed a $5 million ad campaign against me and now they’re sending in the cavalry to save JD’s floundering campaign. They know Senate control hinges on what happens here in Ohio, so they’ll do whatever it takes to win this race. This is the beginning of a new effort to tear down our campaign, and it’s no surprise that they ruthlessly attacked me. Now look, I’m not afraid of some schoolyard bullies—but Mitch McConnell has virtually unlimited resources to use against us and no shortage of right-wing puppets to fire up their extremist base. We have to fight back today. The only way we can counter the GOP’s dirty tricks is by collecting as many grassroots donations as possible. So we’ve set an emergency goal of raising $100,000, and we need you to make a contribution of any amount to help us get there: = We can win this race, flip Ohio blue, and expand the Democratic Senate majority, but only if you’re with us. Do you want to know what I’m not feeling anxious about?
_My record in comparison to far-right April Becker’s._
April took a page out of Donald Trump’s playbook and filed two lawsuits to overturn the results of her last State Senate election. Now, she’s trying to change her persona to convince Nevada voters that she’s a totally different person.
But, the reality is that **April Becker is still who she was less than two years ago.** _Heck, she’s on a mission to collect every anti-choice endorsement she possibly can before the election._
Everyone has their collectors hobby but that’s not one that I’d be proud of.
I’ve been on the frontlines of fighting to protect reproductive freedom and our democracy from people like April Becker. Election deniers have made our country sicker and we can’t afford sending another to Congress.
[**With your help, I know we can win this election and make up ground in August. Will you chip in $10, $25 or more to help my campaign keep NV-03 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49554330/362581903/-2056433254?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220821_FR_ANXIOUS_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYwYzFlMi04YjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rfxD4Rbv_2xgo8hB_-4MGpbfogNEu2aWJrerZqCvck=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, I have to be honest. I’m feeling anxious about our fundraising performance. The past few fundraising updates I’ve gotten from Carli, my Finance Director, are making me nervous. For context, our projections showed us having far more August grassroots donors than we do now. = | | | = Do you want to know what I’m not feeling anxious about? My record in comparison to far-right April Becker’s. April took a page out of Donald Trump’s playbook and filed two lawsuits to overturn the results of her last State Senate election. Now, she’s trying to change her persona to convince Nevada voters that she’s a totally different person. But, the reality is that April Becker is still who she was less than two years ago. Heck, she’s on a mission to collect every anti-choice endorsement she possibly can before the election. Everyone has their collectors hobby but that’s not one that I’d be proud of. I’ve been on the frontlines of fighting to protect reproductive freedom and our democracy from people like April Becker. Election deniers have made our country sicker and we can’t afford sending another to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for standing with me in this fight! clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians. on the image above to watch part of Attorney General Miyares’ interview with WJLA addressing what steps we should take to ensure the physical safety and mental wellbeing of Virginia’s children! Virginia’s National Guard Counter Drug Units (VANG) serve as a vital resource supporting our law enforcement officers fighting the opioid epidemic. Under a congressional budget proposal,Virginia would lose 5 VANG analysts, leaving only 2 to serve the entirety of the western region of Virginia. Read theletter to congressional leaders . | | | | This week, the VA Department of Education proposed changes to the curriculum that determines what children are taught in schools to prepare for SOL exams. VDOE intended to remove the nomenclature of George Washington as the “Father of our Country” and James Madison as the “Father of the Constitution.” In Virginia, we teachallof our history. In 2020, an average of 4 Virginians died of an opioid overdose every day. In 2021, overdose deaths in Virginia increased by 15%.We must fight back against this opioid and drug epidemic. Virginians deserve better. On Wednesday, we hosted a discussion with recovery experts, community leaders, physicians, law enforcement, and families who had lost loved ones to the drug crisis about methods and solutions to reduce addiction and drug trafficking. | | Until next time,Team Miyares | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23454 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Derek,

With the newest Marquette University Law School poll showing this race
deadlocked with Tim Michels, we can't take anything for granted.

Michels was handpicked by Donald Trump because of his extreme beliefs,
nearly unlimited family fortune, and willingness to dismantle fair
elections. He supports a pre-Civil War abortion ban and wants to change
the rules so he could hand Donald Trump the 2024 election -- even if he
got fewer votes.

clean_body: Tomorrow is the FIRST day to request an absentee ballot for the general election! | | | Peter, PSA: Tomorrow is the FIRST day to request an absentee ballot for the Nov. 8th general election! Two things: 1. If you’re planning on voting by absentee ballot, send in your application as soon as you can! 2. Tomorrow marks the beginning of a new phase of the election, and we’re building out our field team so we can reach as many Georgians as possible. That’s the best way we can spread the word about critical deadlines like this one. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Nothing less is at stake in this election than the future of Georgia ... and America. If Stacey Abrams loses , we’ll be facing another four years of Gov. Brian Kemp and his extreme policies. If Reverend Raphael Warnock loses , we’ll be facing a REPUBLICAN Senate majority. We’re running out of time to build out our field team to reach every single voter and make sure they know when, where, and how to vote. With voters able to request an absentee ballot starting TOMORROW, we need your urgent help to get it done. = — Georgia Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. **Derek, Election Day is so close, and things are picking up quickly. If you have a moment, we'd love to give you an update on where things stand in our race to hold PA-06.**
We saw Chrissy's right-wing opponent's public fundraising data, and it's clear this seat is a top target for the GOP. Many of his allies and top Republican leaders – including Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise, and Pat Toomey – have been going all in, making the legally allowable maximum donation to his campaign.
Even more concerning, he was added to the NRCC's Young Guns list, an elite program reserved for the GOP's top recruits for this upcoming election. In the announcement, Kevin McCarthy said “Pennsylvania’s 6th District is one of the top races that we need to flip.” This means that Chrissy's extremist opponent and his deep-pocketed allies are ALL IN to flip PA-06 – we can’t let them.
**Now more than ever, we need to maintain our grassroots momentum to counter Ciarrocchi’s GOP establishment allies and keep Chrissy representing PA-06. ****[Will you give $5 now to help us counter the GOP establishment’s effort to flip PA-06?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49554751/362584157/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk668-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Q2OGE5NS04YzIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxpwwVoSv26fnFLDw5zdSx4rQcnNwqDIM9EeqnbhRRU=)**

If you have a moment, we'd love to give you an update on where things stand in our race to hold PA-06. We saw Chrissy's right-wing opponent's public fundraising data, and it's clear this seat is a top target for the GOP. Many of his allies and top Republican leaders – including Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise, and Pat Toomey – have been going all in, making the legally allowable maximum donation to his campaign. Even more concerning, he was added to the NRCC's Young Guns list, an elite program reserved for the GOP's top recruits for this upcoming election. In the announcement, Kevin McCarthy said “Pennsylvania’s 6th District is one of the top races that we need to flip.” This means that Chrissy's extremist opponent and his deep-pocketed allies are ALL IN to flip PA-06 – we can’t let them. Team,
If you weren’t recently watching C-SPAN in the middle of the day (we definitely don’t blame you), you may have missed some in-depth analysis of Elissa’s race.
David Wasserman of Cook Political Report breaks down the dynamics in Michigan’s new 7th district – which Cook has rated a “pure toss-up.” He specifically points out the votes Elissa’s opponent has taken against the deal with GM – which will create thousands of new auto jobs and a brand new auto plant in his own backyard – as a decisive factor in this election.
We agree.
Check out the full interview below:

body:
Hi, Derek. It’s John Fetterman — Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate.
| Hi, Derek. It’s John Fetterman — Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate.

**Mmmm 😋crudité!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49554847/362585392/1387811193?refcode=em_fr_2022.08.21_b1_jf_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzBjNTg0Mi04ZTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KkA5Wix1Zu2KEP6tlz1YafxkaeAa4JuxVZy7ktsyG4=) Just kidding. This is NOT a photo of me holding Crudité.

Here in PA, we just call this a Veggie Tray. I bet that’s what Chris Deluzio calls it too.

_Seriously. If this looks like anything other than a Veggie Tray to you, then I am probably NOT your candidate. Because there’s nothing more patronizing to everyday people than calling a “Veggie Tray” some fancy French word that literally everyone has to look up on Google. 🙄_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49554848/362585393/1387811193?refcode=em_fr_2022.08.21_b1_jf_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzBjNTg0Mi04ZTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KkA5Wix1Zu2KEP6tlz1YafxkaeAa4JuxVZy7ktsyG4=) Derek, I can’t tell you how critical it is that Democrats defeat ridiculous, Crudité-eating Republicans like Dr. Oz in November.

That’s why Chris and I are humbly asking for your support.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: as of 12pm:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I asked -- several times.
Barack and Michelle Obama told you the stakes.
Joe Biden made an urgent plea.
Kamala Harris called you to action.
Raphael Warnock broke his silence.
Jon Ossoff asked for help.
Amy Klobuchar spoke up.
And Beto O'Rourke just sounded the alarm. I don’t know how else to say this, so I’ll be blunt: [_**All these top Democrats would not be sounding the alarm if our democracy wasn’t in immediate danger of falling to Republicans in this election. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: This is a daunting challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Scott Baugh is running for Congress in California’s 47th District. Baugh is running against liberal darling Katie Porter. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=af874e4346&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, I’m the former Orange County GOP chair and a former Republican State Assemblyman in far-left California, so you can bet I’ve faced many challenges in my career.

But, now I’m running against far-left agitator Katie Porter, and I have to admit...what’s happening right now is a daunting challenge, even by my very high standards.

This is going to be a low-turnout election and one of the challenges is: how do we get our voters out to the polls?

To do that, we need funding, and you’d think Republican patriots would be excited at the opportunity to defeat one of Elizabeth Warren’s proteges, but Katie Porter is currently outraising us **NEARLY 10 TO 1!**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=b6df9a1ef8&e=8a657725d1)
---
| That’s why I’m emailing you...it’s time to raise the alarm bells! If we can’t decrease this funding gap, we will be in big trouble in this race.

Please, can I count on you to help?
---
| [CHIP IN ANYTHING YOU CAN](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=e07f918b94&e=8a657725d1 "CHIP IN ANYTHING YOU CAN")
---
| [HELP DEFEAT KATIE PORTER](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=4d1453e626&e=8a657725d1 "HELP DEFEAT KATIE PORTER")
---
| Peter, we must defeat Katie Porter if we are going to take back the House from Democrats. Defeating Katie Porter means also defeating Nancy Pelosi. It’s a 2 for 1 victory!

So, I thank you in advance for doing your part to defend our country from the radical left. You are a true patriot!

Sincerely,
Scott Baugh
---

---

[My House colleagues and I are working hard to deliver on the greatest Democratic priorities of our time, but we can't get them done if Democrats lose in November.

**With Democrats gaining in the polls and enthusiasm growing from our side, Election Day is fast approaching and with it, control of Congress and the very fate of democracy are on the line. I don't want to sugarcoat it.**

It's hard to grasp just how much is at stake, and how much we risk losing if our House Majority slips away. Millions of Americans will face further restrictions on their freedoms — everything from abortion access to marriage equality to voting rights are on the line.

**If Kevin McCarthy were to become Speaker, he'd help pave the way for Donald Trump to return to power. And we simply CANNOT LET THAT HAPPEN.**

I'm proud to fight for the American people in this critical moment, but we need more fighters by our side. We need you!

The GOP is gearing up
| | |
