**Friend: I'm tied with Marco Rubio in the polls – and now, for the first time ever, all donations are being MATCHED before my primary deadline. Here's where things stand:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49549043/362558368/1599764586?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4096-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDZlZGI4Ny02ZTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gimBbUSUKTSKBrWMVT8KxrRqBS0c05i9VVau6bWZ8Jo=)
Polling shows me tied with my opponent in this race, which will decide Senate control. I know that we can pull ahead, but missing this goal means making tough decisions like pulling back our efforts to reach Floridians.

Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. **It could be your donation, which has TWICE the impact right now, that lets us knock on just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign – our movement – to victory.**
The GOP isn't showing any signs of slowing down: Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell's special-interest allies are ready to drop hundreds of millions to keep Florida red. National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again.

**This is an absolutely critical moment, and for the first time EVER, your donation will go TWICE as far in helping me fight back against Rubio and the GOP, and take the lead. This is about Florida, defending the Senate and protecting our democracy from the GOP's far-right agenda.. **

body:
I'll be honest: Things aren't looking good.
| | |
---
Friend, I'll be honest: Things aren't looking good.
First, Donald Trump came to Georgia and held huge rallies with my opponent, Herschel Walker – all to fire up the GOP base and flip this seat.

**Then,** Walker received an _outpouring_ of support from Republican donors across the country. He has raised over $20 MILLION to defeat me.

**Now,** we're launching TV ads to fight back against the GOP and reach as many voters as possible with our people-powered message. **But we’re on track to miss our goal – which means we risk having to cut back on our ads.**
**Our campaign is 100% fueled by folks like you. That's why I'm coming to you, friend, with this urgent ask:**

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Like bees on honey...

****
Let me be straightforward with you.
Hey folks -- this is John Kennedy.
President Trump and I have something in common: we don't like to beat around the bush when we speak to the American People. _Who has time for that??? I sure don 't!_
**So let me be straightforward with you:**
My Conservative friends over in the House have a really big deadline coming up, and I just got word they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. I have to say, it'll be a real disaster if they miss it.
[******With respect, I 'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time is completely out. _We 're less than 100 days out from Election Day. _Do you think you could do that for me?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=c843674e4ffe490eacccfff94dc66ee4&_e=tcojtV4lo0oRr8wQaoEV38IPefFuf4NrKEyI3003FUmbO9M8pwB3RmgUxaiSHykdEUQv6TKDcM2Lr1DjkozUa_7QiFy45HyL2R__kQMo6bi3DOO1SUMduQF5x5zt9xE_pLroh5Iugo_-Gblk9UyOlCssrxDbGXGkFZujscw-NqtOS1NtenRU3kBpwPnxoxq1LqK_1wdb6cWhOflOUW5ICcMV53sX8qZrNKKjPQiCkalBv-GYlA1jq5paFmtSYjOZsJNycAXeN_fzMCBiPqAqvqC6x3KG8q1pVrYBmKQH3FVjmyeH0kDW6skAC4SHn2Z7JS96r8ulgOd3ng3neUVBp72jH8PBfEyYw-HYLPlwARY4xWPyQERSQCXS4pdNKGaX4Jui4RZ_M6zhAra20LHg3eaWeFsxmYMzSoNi4rdSy5-O1AJEj2K48t4He4iYhBNiqc0ilf_6-dkRM-B8ZhTCwQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: ** Let me be straightforward with you. Hey folks -- this is John Kennedy. President Trump and I have something in common: we don't like to beat around the bush when we speak to the American People. Who has time for that??? I sure don 't! So let me be straightforward with you: My Conservative friends over in the House have a really big deadline coming up, and I just got word they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. I have to say, it'll be a real disaster if they miss it. Look, this deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Pelosi's favorite Super PAC has added 20 million bucks to their 100 million dollar television attack -- yep, they're spending upwards of 120 million to defeat ALL my Conservative friends. I 'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... With Trump-hating donors swarming to Democrats like bees on honey AND Conservatives behind their goal, it could be all over for us. That 's why I really need your help right now: ** Ron DeSantis asked... Sarah Huckabee Sanders asked... Kevin McCarthy asked... Steve Scalise asked... Elise Stefanik asked... Donald Trump Jr. asked... Newt Gingrich asked... Jim Jordan asked... Sorry to bombard you like this but we just don't have time to stand around -- not if we want to win! God bless you, John N. Kennedy Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. 320 First Street SE Washington, DC 20003 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Guys.

---

Read that headline again and take a minute to think about it.

I wrote an opinion piece for the New York Times outlining my efforts to find common ground and pass police reform legislation.

**And the New York Times wanted to run it by Democrat Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer.**

Since when do black conservative voices and opinions have to be approved by the Democrat leader of the Senate? Or any conservative voice, for that matter!

This is the same mainstream media that spent four months fact-checking my life story, discovering that my grandfather dropped out of school in 4th grade and not 3rd grade.

While this is not surprising, I am keenly aware that I don’t fit in with the liberal narrative. It is still alarming to see this kind of censorship for ANY conservative voice.

That’s why I am asking you to stand once again with me against the intolerant media.

---
| | | [Stand With Me](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0eec334be93f4ea0975a796de360ab96&_e=LilkpiUtLorZzhZszwPIofuM5MD5YngToHx49zCLKX_dij741DsnfSRQg0KSISz1VelBcW7Wr0MQvYnz3R2U4Rd2PuwVRAcw3aSOeKYrm21rUB_Kyzm1dk0J8mrRPJF1-ICxs6jOhgF1BxO8OzmbbctoseCrO4e88zzqelboG3y_FzEbzXit-9U-ij0itV3nucY-PaMyVfDjv9bog3AvL13eRwTPMZdZWtnKqMWiY8AiKbPlNAFy5OY4UyuQGcoqS0aEKRl8byMtv0iYsf3RfsaSu2n5QbfJ-eLXxOXIC7kDtDQGv-KBZdERTd54uqFRKNFaPfheY6HacNY4UCzS4STJamj2cw78l5TB3V22PFSlP8J_7FnrphOSUSuIFOQM312_xqOpa6crVaujgWgZ9eCjDyfnYzd_mqB6TSfryIyz1_1JYuYWwEpIJ2YkcisyhwYmfM5Coy9pqUqeYLINUfw3TyQlS5_je9SralLaqnbRMEe6iWRXCV2icZFwR3ruaQRp_9kPXEHn2kRHymuIcA%3D%3D "Stand With Me")
---

We cannot allow the New York Times to get away with its ongoing bias against conservative voices. That’s why I need you on my team.

-Tim Scott

**PS. Chuck Schumer did not (and will never) approve this message. **

| | Hey folks – hope you’re having a good Sunday! After winning the primary earlier this month, I wanted to take some time to relax with my family: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49551976/362570171/629448697?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220821_FR_SummerInMI_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxYzIxZi03YjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfHCVhtdkIjUrucqxZDHztaSUZAtHf1kQ5xNzolmMDM=) I took this picture from a family reunion at Otsego Lake State Park, and I can say this with full confidence: _nothing_ beats a summer weekend in Michigan! Getting outdoors not only reminds me of how beautiful our state is – it reminds me of what I’m fighting for in Congress. I think about the _Inflation Reduction Act’s_ record-breaking investment in green energy. I think about the bill I passed to keep hazardous pollutants out of our drinking water. And I think about what more we need to do to confront climate change. Whenever I’m out in nature, I remember one rule: **leave it better than you found it.** And I’m in Congress to make sure our children and grandchildren can enjoy our country’s natural beauty decades from now – just as much as I enjoy it now. clean_body: | = | | Hey folks – hope you’re having a good Sunday! After winning the primary earlier this month, I wanted to take some time to relax with my family: = I took this picture from a family reunion at Otsego Lake State Park, and I can say this with full confidence: nothing beats a summer weekend in Michigan! Getting outdoors not only reminds me of how beautiful our state is – it reminds me of what I’m fighting for in Congress. I think about the Inflation Reduction Act’s record-breaking investment in green energy. I think about the bill I passed to keep hazardous pollutants out of our drinking water. And I think about what more we need to do to confront climate change. Whenever I’m out in nature, I remember one rule: leave it better than you found it. And I’m in Congress to make sure our children and grandchildren can enjoy our country’s natural beauty decades from now – just as much as I enjoy it now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I'll never forget what I'm fighting for. name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e01ac5932b5b45e49a2b68b266cc4d5a&_e=Zp1Hpmw7TL-K5k9QD4beCHkyT1az8E-4dpDoDCnLaLrikOHtVKFoo0OPBGklWs3VkZ1uLIoFCOQAaxleGCcNERG_B2rISj4nlHU_Flu9bVeCq4tD_fNef7tPn4xyXV706sSr9iI3im7puje8sqwlCo4dmeIn5ApkBl8lQoqujdNQ20SVrsqMHEPEsdKbsUJnXZHjYTvcfJ4WyIQa7HGyfInrl8p2aKmU9811w0tR-Do-nZrXPGSphSSjiOTjscbSJEQa0ImFbuWNuB7oEsKLAzfcjNMYfzJo06sa1o692I6zuaahFX33LR8SRSJ7W756B53iZL80Km25wC0Q7d0C7ZkzL2SpjHE0v-g4zVvu1rPcKeq98I8-RiY9U3eZ6C5oYpw8qeehJIRPXP6WSREuy0zUmliFygugWJmq1NvCKtx1_kI0_7maE6gmqUOrA4xb7Bvzcjk0rUEl-lBN8T2h-PXf-zp0q2L2jPC1uJgyDE0%3D)
Fellow American,

The liberal media said Ilhan was unstoppable, they boasted about her being the leading voice of her generation, they claimed her Squad would change the country.

That means working together to ensure that Maryland’s best days are ahead of us by creating economic opportunity for every Marylander, ensuring Maryland leads on building a green future and protecting the ability of each woman to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions.

I’m writing to you today to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Wes Moore’s campaign – and why our unified ticket is so crucial to the future of Maryland. | = The stakes could not be higher in the election this November. Wes is running against Dan Cox, a QAnon-supporting, far-right extremist who chartered buses full of people to the January 6th insurrection. Though less flashy, if he wins, my opponent will be able to cast a key vote as a member of the Board of Public Works to block Wes Moore’s agenda. The direction of Maryland’s future is on the ballot come November and that’s not something we take lightly. We both need to win to ensure we can spend Maryland taxpayer dollars on building a state where everyone can succeed – and where no one is left behind. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = This year's Democratic slate is historic, although that’s not why we’re running: we are running to make a difference. That means working together to ensure that Maryland’s best days are ahead of us by creating economic opportunity for every Marylander, ensuring Maryland leads on building a green future and protecting the ability of each woman to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. Marylanders deserve better than to have progress rolled back in our state by a Trump loyalist: we deserve leaders who will truly put Maryland families and communities first. = Thanks for all you do, Brooke Lierman Democratic Nominee for Comptroller ** | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading nonprofit. body:
We are in the election of our lifetime
Peter, it's Young Kim here. **The anticipation kept me awake last night.**
I just missed my second fundraising goal in a row, and I'm about to fall short AGAIN. My deadline has been extended one final time to help us catch, but I'm down to the wire with only MINUTES left.
I need 13 donations in the door in the next 30 minutes. I'm calling on my fiercest defenders for backup!
[**EMERGENCY DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055393:JOn4UYVN4:m:1:3334294963:F0237B1D31DB0F1B09421AC1EF8942F2:r)
---
_I personally reached out ...
Carter from my team personally reached out...
Rep. Elise Stefanik personally reached out... _
My friend, we are in the election of our lifetime. Falling short will have unimaginable consequences.
Far-Left opponent just raised $1 MILLION in one month, AND Gavin Newsom endorsed him. The cards are stacked against us, but we can prevail if everyone does their part.
[**Will you chip in an emergency donation in the next 30 minutes to save my seat?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61055393:JOn4UYVN4:m:1:3334294963:F0237B1D31DB0F1B09421AC1EF8942F2:r)

Young Kim

Hi,

It’s Sherry and Sydney, Gretchen’s daughters. We wanted to reach out again because our mom is in a competitive race and she needs our help before another big public fundraising deadline on August 22.

Our mom has inspired us to keep going when times get tough and never give up. She works hard every day for the people of Michigan – and we’re not just saying that because we’re her daughters!

Now, she’s in a tough fight that is a must-win to ensure our state we love so much continues moving forward. We know this is going to be a competitive election, and with everything on the line, we’re here to help her out before her first public filing deadline since the primary.

body:
With less than 💯 days to go until Election Day, we need your support now more than *ever* to flip this Senate seat. | |

Hi, Derek. It’s John Fetterman -- Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate. **Mmmm 😋 crudités!** [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zmwCy4Jok-z2rnF7jwow86V5nAGhLigCfaTHiiD2DNrOV_jIMT71R8jTRtH3bm3YhvMM23xWiCf4k_rSJxgc8t3NRvpaHI2gK9pgiLlG6ijkyCYzX-LfLyJIYEZKiUntB7Z1fLTT-jpaRr72_Ac05yrMTOIoVx4h4Eevoj_MmJIpkyIz7Uo7UQMdS60PP2CEcjLMpMsBuslDUndEIj4jQHxtYjmfIlxKKsA0x_S59yyx_veCn0WH53sKxxUotRNtXcOxuSlXDYZBpnB-sRuZXQFn1qU5ZkruFloOkbmI3kVMwG0JkVHtI9RTAaGIkhozQ/3os/N9RU02WkTmORsouTjDzbIw/h0/WfYVjlSuGJRfY2j0AhCvh-Q-96sV2E2iMzBBb1JsXc4) Just kidding. This is **_NOT_** a photo of me holding crudité. Here in PA, we just call this a veggie tray. Seriously. If this looks like anything other than a veggie tray to you, then I am probably NOT your candidate. Because there are few things more out of touch than calling a “veggie tray” some fancy French word that everyone has to look up on Google. 🙄 [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zmwCy4Jok-z2rnF7jwow86V5nAGhLigCfaTHiiD2DNrOV_jIMT71R8jTRtH3bm3YhvMM23xWiCf4k_rSJxgc8tykJNarhzz-F_LIGHHw_KFp1bvcz1Go43AgbSsvcomy8_Byd361APktI8IARca2Eql3wWqEppcXAXEpKQKAm05kRRqFGujLQgvHuivk_dSQZWkhrSbnkiVT1rk-DlTXUPGJ9PXM9248EoESrlvKOnA5AAWNjpExT_zwVlt2M8hvKX143iXRrNcvKJUQLBDVpeJANm6SxBqtVJopxECgAe3WYT7w8C8EJyi_mmUD2_XNY/3os/N9RU02WkTmORsouTjDzbIw/h1/3xxr7ZDE6fZE2jskytKTg8MX4DtS23O4r7cpnRrW9Nw) Derek, my opponent -- crudité-eating New Jersey resident Dr. Oz -- is spending million$ of his own money on his campaign in an attempt to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. That’s why the Democratic National Committee and I are humbly asking for your support. **By splitting a $10 donation between my campaign + the DNC, you’ll have a direct and immediate impact on electing Democrats nationwide in November. I’m so grateful for anything you’re able to give today.**

clean_body: With less than 💯 days to go until Election Day, we need your support now more than ever to flip this Senate seat. | | Hi, Derek. It’s John Fetterman -- Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate. Mmmm 😋 crudités! Just kidding. This is NOT a photo of me holding crudité. Here in PA, we just call this a veggie tray. Seriously. If this looks like anything other than a veggie tray to you, then I am probably NOT your candidate. Because there are few things more out of touch than calling a “veggie tray” some fancy French word that everyone has to look up on Google. 🙄 Derek, my opponent -- crudité-eating New Jersey resident Dr. Oz -- is spending million$ of his own money on his campaign in an attempt to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. That’s why the Democratic National Committee and I are humbly asking for your support. By splitting a $10 donation between my campaign + the DNC, you’ll have a direct and immediate impact on electing Democrats nationwide in November. I’m so grateful for anything you’re able to give today. With less than 💯 days to go until Election Day, we need your support now more than ever to flip this Senate seat and expand our Democratic Senate majority. Thanks for being on our team, ❤️ John John Fetterman Candidate for U.S. Senate, Pennsylvania Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania The DNC's 2022 Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. clean_body: Another political ranking group downgraded Michael’s Senate race closer to a toss-up. | = We have a critical update for our top supporters: The Cook Political Report just moved Michael’s Senate race closer to a toss-up. = This change doesn’t mean the sky is falling, but this race went into overdrive when Mitch McConnell endorsed Michael’s opponent and called him his “perfect candidate.” The National GOP dropped operatives in our state and recently bought $250,000 worth of attack ads to distort Michael’s record. So we’re counting on your support. We don’t take a penny from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, because Michael doesn’t work for them, he works for folks like you. He recently helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act which will make corporations like Amazon pay their fair share and that makes him a big target, team. Michael’s opponent — who is bankrolling his own campaign — came out against this critical legislation so we know he won’t fight for Colorado’s families. = f you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553223/362574897/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_220821Field_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjEyOGIxYi04MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw9bsqIUd7IWyJU9cHISW962gKCVD2ZtbjwgFnb_3M8=)

My campaign would be nothing without our team of dedicated organizers and volunteers.

Conversations with everyday voters will win this election, and building an extensive field program is critical to ensuring that these conversations happen with voters every day. [**Will you pitch in $10 (or any amount) to help my campaign reach more voters at the doors before Election Day?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553224/362574898/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_220821Field_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjEyOGIxYi04MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw9bsqIUd7IWyJU9cHISW962gKCVD2ZtbjwgFnb_3M8=) [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553225/362574899/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_220821Field_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjEyOGIxYi04MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw9bsqIUd7IWyJU9cHISW962gKCVD2ZtbjwgFnb_3M8=) These past few weeks, I have seen firsthand that our supporters are more fired up than ever. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553226/362574900/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_220821Field_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjEyOGIxYi04MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw9bsqIUd7IWyJU9cHISW962gKCVD2ZtbjwgFnb_3M8=) Hearing from voters across VA-10 about their concerns and what is at stake this November is one of my favorite parts of being a Congresswoman. It is clear that folks are determined to fight for their rights and sustain the recent progress we've seen — and that they're ready to come out to knock doors rain or shine to help preserve my seat and our Democratic majority. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553227/362574901/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_220821Field_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_P2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjEyOGIxYi04MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw9bsqIUd7IWyJU9cHISW962gKCVD2ZtbjwgFnb_3M8=) Continuing our conversations with voters will be crucial to securing this seat in November. And since our district added new territory following 2020 redistricting, it is more important than ever that we reach every corner of the new VA-10. **We must reach these new voters before the inevitable GOP attacks and misinformation do.**

My team and I will continue traveling throughout the district to meet with volunteers and voters, but we need your support to sustain our robust field program.

[**Please, will you donate $10 or more right now to help us keep up our momentum all the way to Election Day?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49553228/362574902/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_220821Field_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjEyOGIxYi04MjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw9bsqIUd7IWyJU9cHISW962gKCVD2ZtbjwgFnb_3M8=)

Thank you so much,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. Fellow American,

At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma taking classes at a technical college. I got by _without_ government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it.

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d946e21b0b3f48788ef3281d05949525&_e=mxRq5_LNMQOMYxC9q5M6LOy4DwWyjlPiYh8Hnj9lVLP_0yTrLecLRvhkvSFJ92wOQDs7cIyCwkE3HNNqx-jWS_PZ4_HxdoO-u0PWYk4GwhPei8Tth7vvZ0yqfu7VH80J-RMqBMxYiimGcQfoyEjhsOL6ncToJdlQoEarb5IxWCCr8hRHagobrhZFw__GAPGL3wTif93pom0rPqYW5cGdlDZ7wQ5D-3bSqwGZ_ir9MFAbrRv7-C_Gck1JZfU8DXXDkDyKGoH0Ro2ChHkhTiBey2-fdgmEfNFhLYIOLGagb9_zQDAH6_1d4dOfSbbH6NeB17GingO4560Q8pEZxgQiWa1OtdMkc51ssUTzCuXIx7il_zf_36I_DYzvvL5qEZXt5WBdzH32wEZdb6FWYxwQkitm7LBxl1p2Cl2KJH6U-J0SLedy4TV1FAFCkgRTcN9sWTCa6v-6Aa99YogPfT_wnA%3D%3D)

I went from Waffle House to Washington, with a few stops in between, but my first job taught me many lessons I use in Congress to this day: _the value of hard-work, kindness, and perseverance._

[**I’m running for re-election**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d946e21b0b3f48788ef3281d05949525&_e=mxRq5_LNMQOMYxC9q5M6LOy4DwWyjlPiYh8Hnj9lVLP_0yTrLecLRvhkvSFJ92wOQDs7cIyCwkE3HNNqx-jWS_PZ4_HxdoO-u0PWYk4GwhPei8Tth7vvZ0yqfu7VH80J-RMqBMxYiimGcQfoyEjhsOL6ncToJdlQoEarb5IxWCCr8hRHagobrhZFw__GAPGL3wTif93pom0rPqYW5cGdlDZ7wQ5D-3bSqwGZ_ir9MFAbrRv7-C_Gck1JZfU8DXXDG27sVOXu39rsh_0O4gJd5QSe7026fnqf88hTMNxC268oLE8zwUK4HUpoojk0ir4xwkAXvTAX5haP5ND1fgWSTvWl2ryO-A_kZDnBd5beVThn0hDEFqRRXb9Tvf0s9D5NaIsDF9LVk-IvEDvd4eJDKjcvItAuLPtixCvbKPeqhMVTGpFAgIsJ3YczyjZHRzrRLICmdr8urYmQQ9gxJWUfVw%3D%3D) because I understand the real problems American families are dealing with and how to find sustainable solutions. I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, **work**.

And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17.

Congress is in desperate need of people like me – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices.

[**It’s people like you and me who should be representing America – not the liberal-elites who are used to always getting their way (or buying their way).**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d946e21b0b3f48788ef3281d05949525&_e=mxRq5_LNMQOMYxC9q5M6LOy4DwWyjlPiYh8Hnj9lVLP_0yTrLecLRvhkvSFJ92wOQDs7cIyCwkE3HNNqx-jWS_PZ4_HxdoO-u0PWYk4GwhPei8Tth7vvZ0yqfu7VH80J-RMqBMxYiimGcQfoyEjhsOL6ncToJdlQoEarb5IxWCCr8hRHagobrhZFw__GAPGL3wTif93pom0rPqYW5cGdlDZ7wQ5D-3bSqwGZ_ir9MFAbrRv7-C_Gck1JZfU8DXXDbKEJ8cHQ6xQJbr-Na01xFEX5eqeA6HyD-xWlf6zWOkokgSu16QM456Z5EsaE7FI-oB4XDLoISy-dPKD2y-KUJr-yziiKzzKZr8cw1Q4z2CDNGs-DQ_YxMggB9IpzC_ZFxbjfN-QJD8zCWVdD-OTUht2Cl6-TUIeV2j5BuqhrHYtZPQNQmprp4eVGvkG4ZCNN_N1gMM8ecx56DprNu8K0UQ%3D%3D)

**But here’s where I need your help – the rich continue to run Congress because they have the funds to do so._But I have you..._**

[**I’m relying on the support of grassroots donors who want to see real change happen in America. Will you make a donation to my campaign to send a hard-working, every-day American back to Washington?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d946e21b0b3f48788ef3281d05949525&_e=mxRq5_LNMQOMYxC9q5M6LOy4DwWyjlPiYh8Hnj9lVLP_0yTrLecLRvhkvSFJ92wOQDs7cIyCwkE3HNNqx-jWS_PZ4_HxdoO-u0PWYk4GwhPei8Tth7vvZ0yqfu7VH80J-RMqBMxYiimGcQfoyEjhsOL6ncToJdlQoEarb5IxWCCr8hRHagobrhZFw__GAPGL3wTif93pom0rPqYW5cGdlDZ7wQ5D-3bSqwGZ_ir9MFAbrRv7-C_Gck1JZfU8DXXDSNCZhVUUEnyjkbl9m9CjhBtrsGpNqPJyZ6CNUU-yR377vkrlwamRM5-mRbKINYeJeChthb69aWPLmjDazc6Orh0DDrIczHgttdZ1dagO_5G0sZe31MG8m2n1PpKtTUFi0qTtEhzmzthN7jIRTuq0skcOwjKY7KQAW22UyOY40cmLLZsAMgf_ffHUqNZOKRSTKuzUDiLh4Z8QSvSxhPMi3g%3D%3D)

There was a time in my life where I never thought I would graduate high school, let alone serve in Congress. I’ve never forgotten the feeling of being 17, so lost and confused but also filled with so much ambition to make a life for myself.

I am taking the same ambition to Congress, to fight for you. [**Join me and let’s shake up Congress together.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d946e21b0b3f48788ef3281d05949525&_e=mxRq5_LNMQOMYxC9q5M6LOy4DwWyjlPiYh8Hnj9lVLP_0yTrLecLRvhkvSFJ92wOQDs7cIyCwkE3HNNqx-jWS_PZ4_HxdoO-u0PWYk4GwhPei8Tth7vvZ0yqfu7VH80J-RMqBMxYiimGcQfoyEjhsOL6ncToJdlQoEarb5IxWCCr8hRHagobrhZFw__GAPGL3wTif93pom0rPqYW5cGdlDZ7wQ5D-3bSqwGZ_ir9MFAbrRv7-C_Gck1JZfU8DXXD9KO7s7C-sysaZtXCIdPI991VaMvXK4xvEIoHHQ-hYunHfBjQKYNEKCuGHk4-KsksDn-deBQ9ZMZxqgwzMTmvlSjqV3zYv9cHXt6MK-108UWqo-77fB1UPKOoI2ZueG6UcpcbwpRX_MDVHALP0LIwUdp4H7R5rRYUh-VRDfVlK1xlm7pyqSmqFZhTEqWk9Qp2Fi9eHRHWg9fWtCtyTuNxPA%3D%3D)

For America,

-Nancy Mace

P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress.

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. clean_body: Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma taking classes at | | Fellow American, At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. I went from Waffle House to Washington, with a few stops in between, but my first job taught me many lessons I use in Congress to this day: the value of hard-work, kindness, and perseverance. because I understand the real problems American families are dealing with and how to find sustainable solutions. I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, work. And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17. Congress is in desperate need of people like me – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices. But here’s where I need your help – the rich continue to run Congress because they have the funds to do so.But I have you... There was a time in my life where I never thought I would graduate high school, let alone serve in Congress. I’ve never forgotten the feeling of being 17, so lost and confused but also filled with so much ambition to make a life for myself. I am taking the same ambition to Congress, to fight for you. For America, -Nancy Mace P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. name: Cecile Richards
subject: show them your power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Cecile Richards

CNN just named my friend, Catherine Cortez Masto (D), the most vulnerable
senator up for reelection as polling shows her down 1 point to her
Trump-endorsed extremist opponent.

We cannot hold the Senate if Catherine loses, so I'm reaching out directly
to explain what your support today would mean for this battleground Senate
race and our Democratic majority.

When SCOTUS overturned Roe, I was heartbroken and furious, but not
surprised. As president of Planned Parenthood, I watched year after year
as Republicans methodically gained power and passed legislation to control
women's bodies. It culminated in a deranged president who tipped the
balance of the Supreme Court to finally overturn Roe.

The only person standing in the way of Mitch McConnell and a national
abortion ban is Catherine Cortez Masto. But right now, McConnell’s super
PAC is spending $18 MILLION to defeat her, so the only way she’ll be able
to overcome these attacks is if pro-choice Democats like you and me step
up right now!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]So please, with the future of reproductive freedom at stake, will you
split $25 or more between Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto’s campaign and Tim
Ryan's campaign to save our Senate majority and save women's rights?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1010&amount=25&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1011&amount=50&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1012&amount=100&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1013&amount=200&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1014&amount=250&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1015&amount=30&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]Other Amount

I learned a crucial lesson about anti-choice extremists during my time at
Planned Parenthood—and it's something I want you to take to
heart:

They want Democrats like you and me to sit down, shut up and give
up—because they’re TERRIFIED of our power if we act together. It's
critical that we show them our power. We will not back down. Not today.
Not ever.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19434?t=1007&amount=25&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ]So please, join me in taking action by supporting Catherine's must-win
Senate race in Nevada so we can save our majority and women's rights >>

Thank you,

Cecile Richards

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=5128%2E3611125%2Ekg2czo ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Hey, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Dear Peter,
As extremists continue to target elections, it is up to us to stand up to protect democracy. And that means we need to act swiftly at every opportunity.
Will you help my team mobilize voters in the name of democracy? Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email]
Together, we can make it happen.
– Jena Griswold
— Original Message —
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email]
Team -
Jena went on MSNBC to discuss Colorado’s election security, why our state has the gold standard system, and what is at stake this November.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email]
We are facing a scary reality as we head into this voting season. Donald Trump and anti-democracy extremists have gained a firm grip on the Republican party. As a result, many candidates for Secretary of State across the country are more beholden to Mar-A-Lago than they are to the American people.
It's time to take action to elect defenders of democracy → chip in to re-elect Jena now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email&amount=25] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email&amount=50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email&amount=100] DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email&amount=250]We are at an important crossroads. In 2020, Donald Trump and his allies did everything they could to try to steal the election. Now they have set their sights on 2022, and the American people are the only thing standing in the way of losing democracy in the United States.
It is time we join together to protect free and fair elections. Jena is running for re-election because she believes in fighting for the will of the people. We need your help to ensure she wins this race. Rush in a donation right now to support Jena, who will always stand up against election deniers and extremist sympathizers. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email]
In solidarity,
Team Jena
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220821-email&recurring=true]

name: Brittany Pettersen (via VPP)
subject: this is a long email, but please take a moment to read it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team,

I’ve served in the Colorado legislature for 10 years, and now I’m running for Congress. Let me tell you why.

I was born and raised in Colorado. I came from a working-class family that faced a LOT of adversity. And I paid my own way by working more jobs than I count: I started cleaning houses when I was just 12 years old, worked behind the counter at a bagel shop, pushed carts at a grocery store, and waited tables at restaurant after restaurant.

But in many ways, I was lucky. I had access to great public schools and teachers that believed in me. Because of the investments this community made in me, I was given a chance to earn a good life. I became the first in my family to graduate from both high school and college.

I’m running for Congress because there is far too much at stake in this election. The same opportunities I had growing up have been put further and further out of reach for far too many Coloradans.

[I’m traveling across Colorado to talk to voters, and to make sure they know that I’ll fight for them in Congress. But doing that takes resources, team, and we have a huge fundraising deadline coming up. Can you split between my team and Voter Protection Project to help my team and me spread the word about my campaign across Colorado?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22637?t=6&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Brittany Pettersen and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22638?t=7&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22639?t=8&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22640?t=9&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22641?t=10&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22637?t=11&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
My campaign for Congress is different. When I talk about bringing back the opportunities that I had to Colorado, I want you to know that’s not just talk.

I have a record for getting things done in the State Legislature. I’ve fought to expand early childhood education and make kindergarten free, to lower the cost of health insurance and prescription drugs to help families struggling with the opioid epidemic, and to guarantee a woman’s right to choose.

But there’s a lot of work to be done. Work that I’m prepared to do in Congress to make life better for Coloradans, and folks like you and me nationwide.

[I’m hoping I can count you in on this fight. If you can split just $5, $15, or $25 between my team and Voter Protection Project today, I would be so grateful →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22637?t=12&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Brittany Pettersen and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22638?t=13&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22639?t=14&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22640?t=15&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22641?t=16&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/22637?t=17&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)
Thank you,

Brittany
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=4188%2E878179%2EWvxI_Y)

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: [WATCH] MSNBC featured our must-win race as one that deserves more >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Take a moment to watch the clip and hear from Cheri exactly what we’re doing on the ground to turn North Carolina blue
#

MSNBC just featured our campaign as one that deserves more attention in the race that could “tip the scales” in the Senate majority.
Their reporters talked to Cheri about our strategy of really reaching out to rural communities — and particularly Black voters — as a different kind of campaign than what North Carolina has seen recently. They said Cheri is “taking a page out of the Obama playbook and her strategy is to be everywhere.”
[**Take a moment to watch the clip and hear from Cheri exactly what we’re doing on the ground to turn North Carolina blue, then please consider making a donation to make sure we can organize everywhere and flip this seat.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/4778?c0=cb-em-msnbc2-aug22.8Bj3Tt&refcode=em220821-2-ma&t=1&akid=1517%2E357359%2EmcqQtJ)
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/4778?c0=cb-em-msnbc2-aug22.8Bj3Tt&refcode=em220821-2-ma&t=2&akid=1517%2E357359%2EmcqQtJ)
**[WATCH AND DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/4778?c0=cb-em-msnbc2-aug22.8Bj3Tt&refcode=em220821-2-ma&t=3&akid=1517%2E357359%2EmcqQtJ)**
This race is in a dead heat, and it’s clear that we have what it takes to win if we keep working as hard as possible.
Like Cheri said, “No one should feel discounted. No one should feel a sense of disengagement.”
Cheri will fight for everyone, in every corner of our state, because all of us deserve a future where we have the opportunity to thrive.
Thank you for supporting our campaign!
Team Beasley
**[WATCH AND DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/4778?c0=cb-em-msnbc2-aug22.8Bj3Tt&refcode=em220821-2-ma&t=4&akid=1517%2E357359%2EmcqQtJ)**

Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1517%2E357359%2EmcqQtJ). Team –
I know I don't have to tell you how purple of a state New Hampshire is.
We won my last election by just **1,017 votes – less than half of a percentage point** – in one of the closest Senate races in the country.
I say “we” won because no one wins by 1,017 votes on their own.
If each and every person who helped by donating, knocking doors, or calling voters hadn’t done what they did for our campaign, we would have lost.
Granite Staters stepped up when I needed it most, helping me unseat a Republican incumbent to become the second woman elected both Governor and Senator.
**I'm reaching out today because I need you to step up again.**
If that's all you need to hear, you can chip in here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49557843/362597625/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1476-fr-nd-nh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjkyY2I1MS1hYjIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzOCLbF5gMGPnQr7z_HFPQIelOEXW1IyGDWkbbw4vYg=)**

name: Team Kaiman
subject: We stand with Jon Kaiman.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
body:
Peter,
Over the course of this campaign, we have built a strong coalition of endorsements that will power us to victory this Tuesday, August 23rd. From current and former elected officials, to labor unions and civic leaders, our campaign's diverse support is evidence of Jon's record of results for our community.

These people and organizations recognize Jon Kaiman's trusted and tested experience, and support his candidacy for Congress:
* Suffolk County Executive Steve Bellone
* Town of North Hempstead Councilman Robert Troiano
* Nassau County Legislator Siela A. Bynoe
* Former North Hempstead Town Councilwoman Viviana Russell
* Former District Attorney Tim Sini
* Former NYS Assembly Member Tony D'Urso
* NYS Asst. Speaker to the Assembly, Phil Ramos
* Suffolk County Legislator Tom Donnelly
* Former City Council Civil Service & Labor Chair I. Daneek Miller
* Former North Hempstead Town Councilman Tom Dwyer
* Former North Hempstead Town Chief Sustainability Officer Frances Belzer-Reid
* AME President Dan Levler
* Sean Walsh, Douglaston Civic Leader
* Gene Kelty, NYC Community Board Leader
* Suffolk County PBA
* LIUNA-NY (NYS Laborers and Mason Tenders District Council)
* SEIU 32BJ
* Laborers Local 66
* Amalgamated Transit Union Local 1056
* Amalgamated Transit Union Local 1179
* ... and most importantly, you!

Additionally, thousands of Long Island and Queens residents have donated, volunteered, and supported our movement in every way imaginable. Because of Jon's experience, vision, and record of results, he has built the largest coalition in this race.

Just recently, community and neighborhood leaders from across the district signed a letter that recognizes Jon Kaiman as the most trusted, tested, and ready candidate to represent us in Congress. Read it [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/_DCA4imFA09khAn_-pPEA0dIkGflLC040LP1PArf6Pw=/oMKyYuNdUA7Tng-M_LQCbGnVPu86XDptqBZYeVZgonE=).
# **Election day is this Tuesday, August 23rd. At a time when our country is so divided, and the issues we face are so critical, we need a leader with the experience and track record to deliver results. Jon Kaiman has unrivaled experience in delivering results for our community and advocating for individuals across New York, and we need him to fight for our Democratic values in Washington.**
[With less than 2 days to go, it's not too late to join the campaign. Please consider making a contribution today. Together, we can make real change happen for this country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/_DCA4imFA09khAn_-pPEA0dIkGflLC040LP1PArf6Pw=/MeX7JdagAce5nsUr2Au4XMPBBAuWiubOzQmyCikxNYk=?refcode=website)

-Team Kaiman

Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
---
Jon Kaiman for Congress
P.O. Box 222061
Great Neck NY 11022 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/_DCA4imFA09khAn_-pPEA0dIkGflLC040LP1PArf6Pw=/zJkeRagaJdZmEEgklUZcQXinP8Iwb23l7N9MfALELaw=).

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans will spend $28 million to buy Ohio’s Senate election for Trump-supporting anti-Semite, J.D. Vance. Can you help Tim Ryan fight back?
body:
Mitch McConnell wants Ohio’s Senate seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, did you see how much Republicans want to win in Ohio? If they want it that bad, it can’t be good... Mitch McConnell admitted last week that Republicans may not win back the Senate, because the quality of their candidates is so God-awful. Of course, we know this, but Mitch finally caught on. **The good news: The Republicans have almost completely given up on winning the Senate seats in Pennsylvania, Georgia & Arizona.** _**The bad news: Mitch cancelled $28 million in tv ad buys in those states and put it all into Ohio so he could try and steal that race from us.**_ That’s right, $28 million in attempt to prop up vile anti-Semite J.D. Vance, who commanded women abused by their husbands that it was their duty to stay with their abusers, at risk of their health and lives (and the lives of their kids). [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can to help Ryan counter the $28 million of dirty money Mitch McConnell just dumped on his head in his vain attempt to become aSenate Majority Leader? Ryan is such a great candidate. He’ll make an even better Senator!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fbb574a-5436-46a0-8ba7-fca21af478da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This week we saw even more how utterly contemptible Vance is. A few years back he started a supposed charity—really a sham—that he claimed would help opioid addiction in Ohio. We now know before shuttering the sham, he hired a man from Big Pharma as bud charity’s representative, to go speak to those suffering the scourge of addiction. That’s right: Ever the fraudulent and empathy-less scum, **Vance sent someone who profited from opioid addiction out to speak to communities ravaged by it.** Sure sounds like JD was sending a group known for giving large campaign contributions in to areas rife with addiction to find more customers while hiding behind a fake charity. There is no word in the English language for how evil this is. Perhaps, Republican.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: TIM RYAN FOR OHIO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ad0b6b4-52ce-485a-9e1d-47162afffe18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **Even with his $28 million gift from McConnell, Tim Ryan is beating Vance in every poll and has massively out-raised him. But the $28MM is gonna hurt. ** If we want Tim Ryan representing us in the Senate so he can kill the filibuster, add judges to rebalance the Supreme Court, codify Roe, pass universal voting rights and gun safety legislation —and to prevent a ghoul like Vance, who’d prey on his own community by sending Big Pharma in to profit from his neighbors’ addiction, we must dig deep and support Tim Ryan!! [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can to help Ryan counter the $28 million of dirty money Mitch McConnell just dumped on his head in his vain attempt to become aSenate Majority Leader? Ryan is such a great candidate. He’ll make an even better Senator!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8edb460-47d5-47c7-88d2-893070cd0271/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for helping us stop Mitch McConnell from stealing this race and ever becoming Senate Majority Leader again!! Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: TIM RYAN FOR OHIO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1db06a6a-2450-463f-a8d7-4a6ba9d6d2d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Cassi Fenili
subject: Tim Michels has access to his family fortune and unlimited support from Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
Tony's message? Polling shows his race deadlocked, and the stakes are too
high to fall short.

Tim Michels has access to his family fortune and unlimited support from
Donald Trump.

If Michels wins, he'll fight to institute a pre-Civil War abortion ban and
work to end fair elections so he can hand the 2024 race to Trump — even if
Trump loses.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1238?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20220821_2_7&t=1001&akid=4093%2E1827488%2Eh0BugN ]Please pitch in what you can here to help us close our $12,500 rapid
response budget gap before tonight's midnight deadline!

Thank you for all that you do.

Cassi

—Begin Forwarded Message—

Derek,

With the newest Marquette University Law School poll showing this race
deadlocked with Tim Michels, we can't take anything for granted.

Michels was handpicked by Donald Trump because of his extreme beliefs,
nearly unlimited family fortune, and willingness to dismantle fair
elections. He supports a pre-Civil War abortion ban and wants to change
the rules so he could hand Donald Trump the 2024 election -- even if he
got fewer votes.

Fellow American, my friend George Logan needs your help.

George is running to flip Connecticut's 5th Congressional District that hasn’t been **RED** in over **16 YEARS** , and recent polling shows he has a real shot!

[**The only thing he needs now is the resources to tell his story to voters.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9c4f8b0fe29454cb2b013233621515b&_e=OcDRW0z7NpjHfPkefd6jDVmJ3sUVYSE7Rqo7n9U8ZNTuNVDbOTSotTGuVDl538oola4BzGNC76asQor697OrFaf8Kql-scJUaMQfSFOUsh4NSO_jezvcHWJbpHPUGuauxLJ_G38PvHBRFcoaPbHy7P_IrKLU-Rcle4eoFVAerNg8YCYiLdLuJILeiFxFjRiqe9J9XxemlZSK6ouI5d9ZvKIOKUcojRl8jL2EDa78W0Zbkvd_B4hYnnyYnNIetu5Y5QIXWp9ifhI6VWSaIkFeJO3g_BF4GN0PD4CKtowY-GBKo8iEp4f6jjpJpSs0T5i2DZk9oLur1DwXDrr-YdZx6n8XBjb2jLtjqX2xn72ianVsG64blpErW6XF_vuxmPwsxiSyR2oLbR28_9LBKIvTrn9gM2XJVilwP4kwSaaFDhPfNA9J2mOx5j7qaM3J61Jk2AjuSFi3fL_iqeWkIzGXybm_OJLZRtmW_MuWvP_lXJZut3WbiURnbDBPtmiyRT57)

| [**SEND GEORGE TO CONGRESS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9c4f8b0fe29454cb2b013233621515b&_e=OcDRW0z7NpjHfPkefd6jDVmJ3sUVYSE7Rqo7n9U8ZNTuNVDbOTSotTGuVDl538oola4BzGNC76asQor697OrFaf8Kql-scJUaMQfSFOUsh4NSO_jezvcHWJbpHPUGuauxLJ_G38PvHBRFcoaPbHy7P_IrKLU-Rcle4eoFVAerNg8YCYiLdLuJILeiFxFjRiqe9J9XxemlZSK6ouI5d9ZvKIOKUcojRl8jL2EDa78W0Zbkvd_B4hYnnyYnNIetu5Y5QIXWp9ifhI6VWSaIkFeJO3g_BF4GN0PD4CKtowY-GBSautHQIhvbN-yozuQt0WwZ9qRQtfxffg1k2k79KSw6WOkZE_W5O5_VDi4eubtnAmQ9rcLlok06nZrGjBuwwj6vfQhahISBZuQiJsBSHSoWzYdD67iX2-qNFWtg1n6GWCHniq4ih-uoYnXp70cIFvzepKMey3C-l9GAix0jAuHa9I_q9lRfixcQNgQSxRb6IJ-Djx6Bqqu01K7iU-JKNtv)

You see - George is a a family man, an engineer, a community leader, and a small business owner. Above all, he's a regular guy! On top of the craziness of running a campaign, he works a normal full-time job to provide for his family.

As a first-generation American, George knows that this country provides freedom and opportunity unlike any other. I know it pains him to see our nation going down the wrong path, especially for future generations, **_all because of the lack of leadership from Far-Left Democrats._**

[**That is why he is running for Congress**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9c4f8b0fe29454cb2b013233621515b&_e=OcDRW0z7NpjHfPkefd6jDVmJ3sUVYSE7Rqo7n9U8ZNTuNVDbOTSotTGuVDl538oola4BzGNC76asQor697OrFaf8Kql-scJUaMQfSFOUsh4NSO_jezvcHWJbpHPUGuauxLJ_G38PvHBRFcoaPbHy7P_IrKLU-Rcle4eoFVAerNg8YCYiLdLuJILeiFxFjRiqe9J9XxemlZSK6ouI5d9ZvKIOKUcojRl8jL2EDa78W0Zbkvd_B4hYnnyYnNIetu5Y5QIXWp9ifhI6VWSaIkFeJO3g_BF4GN0PD4CKtowY-GC1fBZPhDo4900eQaZq7_f1apEpQB9OObvp6RN6oC8HhGxoaQhA-JQowcY8dzqmbJbPcux_UmwcM4w90YF7rF0rQbWG0tC02palIedZYkO_QNZEK69WYqSV0DiVk_ULBGObv-Kbven67aUnmdgt9eXwjQNvNvqeLVQPZDM9lKjP2MgSvHYUi2MTD8KPPjCQj3_RjpvxdAFU558ULa6e7902): to break Nancy Pelosi’s Democrat monopoly and help those the Far-Left has turned their backs on, _which is the majority of Americans!_

[**SEND GEORGE TO CONGRESS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9c4f8b0fe29454cb2b013233621515b&_e=OcDRW0z7NpjHfPkefd6jDVmJ3sUVYSE7Rqo7n9U8ZNTuNVDbOTSotTGuVDl538oola4BzGNC76asQor697OrFaf8Kql-scJUaMQfSFOUsh4NSO_jezvcHWJbpHPUGuauxLJ_G38PvHBRFcoaPbHy7P_IrKLU-Rcle4eoFVAerNg8YCYiLdLuJILeiFxFjRiqe9J9XxemlZSK6ouI5d9ZvKIOKUcojRl8jL2EDa78W0Zbkvd_B4hYnnyYnNIetu5Y5QIXWp9ifhI6VWSaIkFeJO3g_BF4GN0PD4CKtowY-GB8C8zzbg37kpUxMWtQv8-ql8StcxbOZkpzp8JmVI7P5fmYOrJI0jSbVPBQp2HhS0RH1OsQfSUGGt0QCpOot0vGje8l_5ZNSQu45cL-sT1nFlBmpLAYqI6x445GZGszg52Jb_5WmWrfSKLAN--ZDd0HDTsmGq5LXy6idLDVQg4nVhr0ojS66_yviHo8nDeifZ2G_BVu94TxXi8amtq2XFtk)
---

I cannot express how much I need George by my side in Congress. He is a born leader who will make Americans across the nation proud. [**Please support his campaign today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9c4f8b0fe29454cb2b013233621515b&_e=OcDRW0z7NpjHfPkefd6jDVmJ3sUVYSE7Rqo7n9U8ZNTuNVDbOTSotTGuVDl538oola4BzGNC76asQor697OrFaf8Kql-scJUaMQfSFOUsh4NSO_jezvcHWJbpHPUGuauxLJ_G38PvHBRFcoaPbHy7P_IrKLU-Rcle4eoFVAerNg8YCYiLdLuJILeiFxFjRiqe9J9XxemlZSK6ouI5d9ZvKIOKUcojRl8jL2EDa78W0Zbkvd_B4hYnnyYnNIetu5Y5QIXWp9ifhI6VWSaIkFeJO3g_BF4GN0PD4CKtowY-GBwk4p3XqW3VMPMBq2IEhYQPJuUGTO_9nDr9HmOJtc0p5p9HEPtIVSTMc1Wcrk3Yt189A-QTxyqnL0NrFVHWPznsBb_1gU1gXqyEBuK4rvzs5aQQjeFeFBS2zfjI1nnKHZ6ACZkWnSAz85JzJTvvujFfx1HsNacHrXhfxB0hMxew6CHh1ZNSP-xaxjC-o7qUYhVCbZJChNUGqCy8Utl36wy)

Sincerely,
Elise Stefanik (NY-21)
House Republican Conference Chairwoman

[**SEND GEORGE TO CONGRESS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9c4f8b0fe29454cb2b013233621515b&_e=OcDRW0z7NpjHfPkefd6jDVmJ3sUVYSE7Rqo7n9U8ZNTuNVDbOTSotTGuVDl538oola4BzGNC76asQor697OrFaf8Kql-scJUaMQfSFOUsh4NSO_jezvcHWJbpHPUGuauxLJ_G38PvHBRFcoaPbHy7P_IrKLU-Rcle4eoFVAerNg8YCYiLdLuJILeiFxFjRiqe9J9XxemlZSK6ouI5d9ZvKIOKUcojRl8jL2EDa78W0Zbkvd_B4hYnnyYnNIetu5Y5QIXWp9ifhI6VWSaIkFeJO3g_BF4GN0PD4CKtowY-GDMuoz0RY_SzjEprN7_qqizS6E4GUw521WyBFK3e0rs94gdclaCV_cT7VvYxxBg48hGQnmuW17S0g2bwlVIbCKS9ct4ulMiVQeyWXac5xVhi9iYlen5_iOD1BA0GmghD2IUAK6nB-7iW8AZOlPWGADW4L-tksh2VW28R-7i6s1-5k5HFRsUHGJiaGrufimSY8uzpA8BLkLWMG8wgdgckTFa)

body:
We need to stand up to Republicans |

This is unbelievable, folks.
Ever since conservative justices on the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ , far-right Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis have been working around the clock to DESTROY reproductive freedom in Florida.
**[Donate to defend abortion rights in Florida](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49558310/362601585/563077528?refcode=20220821_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjRiN2IxOC1hZTIxLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuX_JpMul7Odu9W3CqY4r9qfLEp7-t2eIlSPaCK-vgE=)**
---
DeSantis even tried to ban all abortions after just 15 weeks — even in cases of rape and incest! It was so extreme that a judge struck it down. But now he's in court defending it??
Folks, this is a dire situation — unless we have the resources to fight back, Florida Republicans will ban abortions in the state of Florida.
That's why I'm shocked that so few people have donated to defend abortion rights. It's disgusting that Florida Republicans will use any opportunity they can to restrict abortion access. But we can't stop them unless we have enough grassroots support.
Now more than ever, we need to fight to ensure that Floridians have full access to reproductive healthcare. The deadline for our Stop DeSantis Extremism Fund is coming up TOMORROW, and we've got to hit our goal so we can stand up for reproductive freedom in the Sunshine State.

clean_body: We need to stand up to Republicans | | | | = This is unbelievable, folks. Ever since conservative justices on the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade , far-right Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis have been working around the clock to DESTROY reproductive freedom in Florida. = DeSantis even tried to ban all abortions after just 15 weeks — even in cases of rape and incest! It was so extreme that a judge struck it down. But now he's in court defending it?? Folks, this is a dire situation — unless we have the resources to fight back, Florida Republicans will ban abortions in the state of Florida. That's why I'm shocked that so few people have donated to defend abortion rights. It's disgusting that Florida Republicans will use any opportunity they can to restrict abortion access. But we can't stop them unless we have enough grassroots support. Now more than ever, we need to fight to ensure that Floridians have full access to reproductive healthcare. The deadline for our Stop DeSantis Extremism Fund is coming up TOMORROW, and we've got to hit our goal so we can stand up for reproductive freedom in the Sunshine State. name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Hitting #2 on Mixcloud's "Conscious Hip-Hop" Chart
body:
My latest DJ set features the voices of Greta Thunberg & Chuck D
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in browser](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=69310360&utm_source=email)
---
# [Hitting #2 on Mixcloud's "Conscious Hip-Hop" Chart](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFoaWRidXR0YXIuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvaGl0dGluZy0yLW9uLW1peGNsb3Vkcy1jb25zY2lvdXM_.X7A0rP7uIu-vaWf6rOf9T_VHLc478IxDIBJlpwEDCu4?)
### My latest DJ set features the voices of Greta Thunberg & Chuck D
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e7b5f047-77dc-448e-980d-1b32cc6e775e?r=1hvr60)| [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/e7b5f047-77dc-448e-980d-1b32cc6e775e?r=1hvr60)| | Aug 21
---|---
I've been guided recently to recognize abundance. A night earlier this month felt like a demonstration of it from many corners, not unlike a break in clouds after a rain.
> Anyone can [listen on Mixcloud](https://substack.com/redirect/602aa39d-38a9-4df6-87bf-d5e7615b42eb?r=1hvr60). If you dig either the beats or the lyrics, please share the link! The track list is accessible to paid subscribers at the bottom of this post.
My residency at Madrone Art Bar brings me to San Francisco's Lower Haight on the 2nd Wednesday of every month. On the heels of a 6-hour set in July (which turned out to be too long to post to streaming audio services), this month's set on August 10 was memorable to me for a few reasons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9562b40e-5495-4231-aed8-8912d9ecda7c?r=1hvr60)|
---|---|---
First was a creative performance milestone. For my birthday in 2021, I received a piece of DJ gear with functions that I've always felt terrified of using in public because it's so easy to get them confused--but I used them (a lot) that night for the first time. It felt almost like growing another set of hands!
Second was a return to my creative roots. I came up spitting rhymes in the 90s before ever jumping behind the decks in the 2010s, and (while my vocals weren't recorded) felt moved to hit the mic a few times the other night. Several people approached me later to say they wanted to hear more, which felt like an invitation I'm inclined to accept.
Third, even though I'm excited to escape politics, it felt fun in the moment to riff on my vision through the music. Tracks like Public Enemy's "Power to the People," and an excerpt I edited from Greta Thunberg's [powerful words](https://substack.com/redirect/817eedb3-c30f-4d00-9ec3-a15f08f9aeca?r=1hvr60) in 2019 to the U.N. gave the set a political edge, but I didn't realize until later just how sharply political it turned out to be.
Old habits die hard, it seems....
Finally, I was surprised to discover this morning that--in the time since I posted it over the weekend--the mix hit #2 on Mixcloud's conscious hip-hop chart!
**Anyone can[listen on Mixcloud](https://substack.com/redirect/602aa39d-38a9-4df6-87bf-d5e7615b42eb?r=1hvr60). If you dig either the beats or the lyrics, please share the link (or this Substack post)! **
[Share](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFoaWRidXR0YXIuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvaGl0dGluZy0yLW9uLW1peGNsb3Vkcy1jb25zY2lvdXM_.ByDeELoRh1c4j7kE2-TJSU97oOVT10Wsm6Dtn2_V-54?)
**The track list is accessible to paid subscribers at the bottom of this post.**
[ Subscribe now](https://substack..slTfSS0iJNRnTOSYWOQd0LjNJ8VOzzLfz4ps-cDv2s8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=69310360)
**I'll be back at Madrone on 9/17. See you there!**
In the meantime, I'm also working on some new original music continuing my practice of creatively speaking truth to power.

My previous musical highlights include a 2007 album, "[Get Outta Your Chair](https://substack.com/redirect/f9a25f4e-7cec-41bb-a2c7-f03342b3b104?r=1hvr60)" (which featured tracks like "[the Baghdad Blues](https://substack.com/redirect/42bcb840-6d78-47f8-83a1-321c4405c6f4?r=1hvr60)" and "[Bumpin in My SUV](https://substack.com/redirect/c332b60d-fe3e-4e45-a146-b07cb4b6c4de?r=1hvr60)") as well as the 2014 "[NSA vs USA](https://substack.com/redirect/10d99aba-8076-46ac-a1b2-abb69804993f?r=1hvr60)" music video. NSA vs USA, in particular, fused dance music, conscious hip-hop, documentary film, and contemporary protest with a history and civics lesson. I hope to craft more projects like it in the future.

My next original music project is an EP that I hope to release later this year featuring a new CIA diss track, as well as a tech-house anthem (which I played at Madrone this month) observing the international connections between police and state violence from [Ferguson to Jerusalem](https://substack.com/redirect/695cab35-0a0b-4cd0-a9c7-c881fb3abe53?r=1hvr60).
Eventually, I'd like to produce music videos for each of those songs to enhance their usefulness as teaching instruments, while continuing to MC over my DJ sets in settings from weddings and [nightclubs](https://substack.com/redirect/57250b37-b331-4b3a-a358-810c8f708d00?r=1hvr60) to [parks](https://substack.com/redirect/7f17c829-e5a6-4aa3-a020-e2f25e12b2f0?r=1hvr60), [festivals](https://substack.com/redirect/e1e2da79-5187-45d8-ad20-59e7cf5b1f3e?r=1hvr60), back [yards](https://substack.com/redirect/d8f2c21d-7c6f-4f91-892c-b8dc06218129?r=1hvr60), [churches](https://substack.com/redirect/164ac691-74ca-4480-9529-9bcf11083c38?r=1hvr60), [convergences](https://substack.com/redirect/4428f5c6-3813-49d3-87e5-b50daf793e32?r=1hvr60) in the desert, and [protests](https://substack.com/redirect/822732f7-8d47-4143-8946-3d8f80e58a17?r=1hvr60).
Thanks for reading (and listening!), stay tuned, and enjoy the remains of the weekend!
Shahid
PS -- As promised, below are the funk, afrobeat, hip-hop, trip-hop, and house tracks that I played in [my set at Madrone this month](https://substack.com/redirect/602aa39d-38a9-4df6-87bf-d5e7615b42eb?r=1hvr60). **I hope you find as much to appreciate as I have from these inspiring musicians and producers!...**

body:

Let me be straightforward with you.
Hey folks -- this is John Kennedy.
President Trump and I have something in common: we don't like to beat around the bush when we speak to the American People. _Who has time for that??? I sure don 't!_
**So let me be straightforward with you:**
My Conservative friends over in the House have a really big deadline coming up, and I just got word they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. I have to say, it'll be a real disaster if they miss it.
[******With respect, I 'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time is completely out. _We 're less than 100 days out from Election Day. _Do you think you could do that for me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7765600ec19b48a9a2b07f6b570b474e&_e=X40klllcgUMdItKuXwwE7Awqn4BaAEtlzW8l3jL79IdzWT47NdID-hyPgLgXHF8aaHL5rHuyQOl6-ylh_N6X84UEqRfT8h-W378auW1VcXipuZfidX0AYiaXp8M6DUYBDRyVtzAV3KHrKBTuES-KEMpWlmIeSARna83TRemNCW-ul58dRXb21HAINba3namJR14561gPyNigYOTkGJDtn_2wwdKqu3gVIW0p12TAHMYYc7oM1TNylp_k-E2vWPCY_50uD0_C5W3he95hZ1Q2cOgVvregei42T009Qo1DMArQSd7dslMUzs3-sIl0SW3MZQhm1DBvF4Vmb-zMNH_SsKjt30COH1FBQ7VrFPRviIfnmZ-wHm6CfAVmvFcfRf7eRKC4xLVgig7YXywgYqBZQ96wuLwuEVVG0PUNYTv2t4U_MYE664AzeKt2nAQXMmta)

President Trump and I have something in common: we don't like to beat around the bush when we speak to the American People. Who has time for that??? I sure don 't! So let me be straightforward with you: My Conservative friends over in the House have a really big deadline coming up, and I just got word they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. Look, this deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Pelosi's favorite Super PAC has added 20 million bucks to their 100 million dollar television attack -- yep, they're spending upwards of 120 million to defeat ALL my Conservative friends. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, we’re just
hours away from our midnight deadline — and until Georgia voters are
officially able to request absentee ballots.

[ The ]We have until midnight

We’re so close to reaching our goal. Can you make your
first
$3 donation to help us raise $200,000 to elect Stacey
Abrams before midnight?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B2_CountDown_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1954%2E1862389%2E-tzOoQ ]Your support goes directly towards making sure we can reach as many
voters as possible to help them cast their ballots. Donate before
tonight’s deadline >>

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B2_CountDown_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1954%2E1862389%2E-tzOoQ ]DONATE

In Brian Kemp’s Georgia, rent is sky high, inflation has destabilized our
state and families are struggling with rising costs. He blames others, but
he’s responsible for this economy.

But starting tomorrow, Georgia voters are one step closer to replacing him
with Stacey Abrams. And with less than 80 days until polls close on
Election Day, every minute matters.

That’s why it’s so important that we meet, and beat, every single deadline
in front of us — just like this one. The margins in this race are going to
be razor thin, and we can’t afford to fall behind even a little.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B2_CountDown_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1954%2E1862389%2E-tzOoQ ]Your support makes our work possible,
Derek. Before Georgia voters
begin requesting ballots tomorrow, make your
first
$3 contribution to help Stacey win in November.

Thank you for all you do,

Abrams for Georgia

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE

Peter,

If you’ve read the emails I’ve sent on Friday and Saturday, then you’ll be well aware that unless we submit payment for $21,000 by midnight tonight, our TV ADS will not run for three full days this upcoming week. With 79 days until the election, **EVERYDAY COUNTS.**

[** HELP ME KEEP MY ADS ON TV **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a30a67ac59584872a6b382c0dd738d68&_e=1-_xUskHxoXYV5tF9KAjrbqVvkiGeOJ_cH5BzEejmvzbioKr4XGk28_YOrNNR30rXL0009HhqQjhV4h3VkaV3cu5iBMqKwK-HuE_Yuhhq4dVh2Pv7SclP8VR7T3scP9s84hLPW3PSxQANVd5QgliFl5FCls6JoYMi3EvqGutSGtNiM-N-PrfQm6GcGN_Lv7JYEt2cH11VuaEcimKJgJuyckIpN5VesKb4GKwOSdDv6wnbrxW7JCF5wfjYHUg1wWsEKLn5KQcbgUF7VBFyFsUpgY_6KBzgk3UMi11Pwb3DVzAgSpRNJrneeoycJI0vycwX9GemReRWLFWyWPByURM46fC5tF7GOq36qpZi3oWjF5O2vuo0t0sacyzwLN-B97eiOBhEIQGwuIMRaOdNuCBsxBtquw2q3WJZngLEDRQrIvIaL-Qi0Wn9pw7qsm_fWKc)

Meaning,**[if we can raise an additional $7,000 today, we will be able to keep our TV ADS on air every day next week.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a30a67ac59584872a6b382c0dd738d68&_e=1-_xUskHxoXYV5tF9KAjrbqVvkiGeOJ_cH5BzEejmvzbioKr4XGk28_YOrNNR30rXL0009HhqQjhV4h3VkaV3cu5iBMqKwK-HuE_Yuhhq4dVh2Pv7SclP8VR7T3scP9s84hLPW3PSxQANVd5QgliFl5FCls6JoYMi3EvqGutSGtNiM-N-PrfQm6GcGN_Lv7JYEt2cH11VuaEcimKJgJuyckIpN5VesKb4GKwOSdDv6xgUKo_mhx_NnXGphYAwy51VsD29WN3SEEGxdX41M8jEXOhNcAPbOmZ8QxZMFLI_q4MrDSctWuNIBFV0TvCL3YQ3RIEypEogD1m9XxoyK701lFNBcQoDmFv3FjhUxiE_tFHebH0HO-qLbYKCW22M7m6zxgzaY270yDGlRRMKPYefoZky5y4agPKEPZ2Rv4u_NDsr6Vt5uMDurXQdq1N7i9j)**

If we don’t hit our goal today, we will have to start making budget cuts elsewhere in the campaign, which I can tell you is not what we want to do. **We’re already strapped for cash and operating on a bare-bones budget.**

clean_body: We have until midnight tonight to submit payment if we want to run campaign ADS on TV next week. As of right now, we're still $7,000 short. We’re spending money like drunken sailors. Our individual liberties have been trounced and continue to be under constant threat from authoritarians running the show in D.C. and President Biden and VP Harris clearly do NOT have a grip on the power they wield. . | Peter, If you’ve read the emails I’ve sent on Friday and Saturday, then you’ll be well aware that unless we submit payment for $21,000 by midnight tonight, our TV ADS will not run for three full days this upcoming week. With 79 days until the election, EVERYDAY COUNTS. Going dark on TV this close to November 8th would be one of the worst possible things that could happen to our campaign. The GOOD NEWS is that on Friday, and then again yesterday, we hit our daily goal of raising $7,000. Meaning, If we don’t hit our goal today, we will have to start making budget cuts elsewhere in the campaign, which I can tell you is not what we want to do. We’re already strapped for cash and operating on a bare-bones budget. God Bless, Alek Skarlatos Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress P.S. | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Add your name: Protect Pregnant Workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There’s bipartisan support for this bill.
#
Peter,
_The Nation_ reports that there are enough bipartisan votes in the Senate to pass a bill that would protect pregnant workers in America. But the bill hasn’t come to the Senate floor for a vote.
I was proud to vote for the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act when it passed the House. We must take this opportunity to get a bipartisan bill through the Senate. [**Will you add your name to my call for the Senate to bring the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act up for a vote and send it to President Biden?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect-pregnant-workers/?source=em20220821-1531&t=1&akid=1531%2E420207%2E6VB9f2)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect-pregnant-workers/?source=em20220821-1531&t=2&akid=1531%2E420207%2E6VB9f2)**
The Pregnant Workers Fairness Act would require employers to offer reasonable accommodations to pregnant employees including light duty assignments, more frequent bathroom breaks, and unpaid leave for doctor’s appointments or recovery from childbirth. It would even ensure employers provide things to pregnant workers as small as a stool to sit on or the ability to carry a water bottle.
All too often, workers are left without appropriate protections and working conditions. Pregnant workers are even more vulnerable to unfair treatment or the denial of accommodations. We live in a society that fails pregnant workers in far too many ways. Passing the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act would be an important step in the right direction.
[**Are you with me, Peter? Add your name now in support of this bill to protect pregnant workers. We must build support so the Senate brings this bipartisan bill up for a vote.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect-pregnant-workers/?source=em20220821-1531&t=3&akid=1531%2E420207%2E6VB9f2)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect-pregnant-workers/?source=em20220821-1531&t=4&akid=1531%2E420207%2E6VB9f2)**
Thank you for using your voice today.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220821-1531-footer&t=5&refcode2=1531_420207_6VB9f2&akid=1531%2E420207%2E6VB9f2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

All too often, workers are left without appropriate protections and working conditions. Pregnant workers are even more vulnerable to unfair treatment or the denial of accommodations. We live in a society that fails pregnant workers in far too many ways. Passing the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act would be an important step in the right direction. Thank you for using your voice today. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
