In the wake of the Supreme Court weakening gun safety laws, stripping back the EPA’s authority, and overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , it’s more urgent than ever that we’re building our Democratic power in state legislatures.
Democratic state legislators are at the forefront of the fight against Republican extremism and the GOP’s far-right policy agenda – and with less than three months until this year’s midterm elections, they need our support right now:
**Your gift at the state legislative ballot level could genuinely make the difference between losing or winning on November 8th.** [Will you chip in $7, $25 or whatever fits your budget today to help elect Democrats to state legislatures across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkbf6iwWr0gmCatkMcH_fNu_R4ochh-5y8qOeCV6slGNsfwEA8FUzghZPB90_cVMdvYaAxSTg0jcfBURm1lozuULFYqVlMshd0rgxsLNH3JQWnOxympnnG-pzvoAlV4_NWh0RGeEeUeTIZ-wte0iXnoMEIW35lzXlkAUbC0iQGIajOdBw6-okyME81a5-RXoN7sen31sRq3mxk-1Dsk7lCwaGLT503eUy6E_OzijKMcubF55wHWgcNqlksZBaST0ZJFoaD38Pl-WtYw-qdIlkth5ztxtjoKd3PID2J5KlqkVEBvqb3kDcCgvvTkm4AmB5yUyqg8-Vvlo8v8L20gKmKQxmo-96WDOoVJy8fTg2fGYPrq2g6ae5v8M1-VDKX96Nzz2n575x9xqWgG7xTqlFq1PGClxxHVCkMs7CYvUe5y4jOSArftRAeW4xnX-6pr_pmAhxvBebYTJjnmKrAEpUoOtsjbWaVe1jiWaMtvCqs6wRTCRjHSSyukrMr_zRIXDnYjKP6pQWvaRuST7q-scmVAI/3os/0z-vc8jSTYmBqDFY3lbATg/h7/-jHA5Fbj_50Ka2nej86tg2SuGDHS2Uc-KAwrHLE29eU)

clean_body: State legislative campaigns are run on tight budgets with small campaign staffs, and are often decided by thin margins and a handful of votes | | | | | Our movement to elect state Democrats is powered by grassroots Democrats just like you – and we’re proud of that! Each and every donation from our grassroots supporters makes a huge impact on our ability to give Democrats the resources they need to secure critical state legislative seats this November. State legislative campaigns are run on tight budgets with small campaign staffs, and are often decided by thin margins and a handful of votes – so your donation at this ballot level will have an outsized impact. → Mobilize voters → Get organizers on the ground → Elevate our message ... AND SO MUCH MORE! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | In the wake of the Supreme Court weakening gun safety laws, stripping back the EPA’s authority, and overturning Roe v. Wade , it’s more urgent than ever that we’re building our Democratic power in state legislatures. Democratic state legislators are at the forefront of the fight against Republican extremism and the GOP’s far-right policy agenda – and with less than three months until this year’s midterm elections, they need our support right now: Your gift at the state legislative ballot level could genuinely make the difference between losing or winning on November 8th. Thanks! Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-header-footer?refcode=E16827--headerfooter-graphic--RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-header-footer?refcode=E16827--headerfooter-graphic--RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]
We were going to write a whole email about the Inflation Reduction Act. But honestly, President Obama summed it up perfectly:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-Aug2022-FR-August?refcode=E17903-20220821-IRA-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-Aug2022-FR-August?refcode=E17903-20220821-IRA-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15]

The Inflation Reduction Act lays the groundwork for generational change in our country. It allows Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices, caps out-of-pocket prescription drug costs for seniors and makes health care coverage more affordable, to name just a few.

But here’s the thing, none of this would have been possible without our Democratic Majority. And the scary truth of the matter is that we could lose that Majority this November.

You know how this goes, we’re going to ask you to chip in a few dollars here. But you know what we can do when we have the majority and what’s at risk if we lose it.

So please, chip in anything you can to help us hold on to the Majority in November.

name: Wade Herring
subject: Sunday with Stacey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0821 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0821]
Dear Peter,
Today, I had the honor of attending church in Savannah with Stacey Abrams.
Faith has always been a cornerstone of my life, as it has been for Stacey’s as well. Her parents were ministers, and she, like myself, was taught the value of service to others and the power of taking care of one another.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/300018564_434582185363408_331162649570597090_n_edit.jpg]
Listening to Stacey speak to the congregation brought such a strong feeling of positivity and faith within me that I am beyond hopeful for what lies ahead in November.
Stacey's vision for Georgia's future, One Georgia, is an empowering message of holding extremists accountable, doing the right thing, and getting to work for all of us so that we can not just survive, but thrive.
Onwards to November 8th.
In service,
Wade Herring
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0821]

They’re ALL working to pass this IMPORTANT legislation! Make it harder for members of Congress to object to the certified results submitted by a state. Peter,

Here are three things you need to know:
|
1. **Warnock + Schumer + Liberal Super PACs** have spent more than $25 million attacking Herschel Walker in Georgia. They know if that if Warnock wins, odds are they keep the Senate.
2. **Their attacks have gotten more vicious by the day** - they've even attacked Herschel's record of working with our nation's veterans.
3. **Despite all of this, this race is _still_ within the margin of error.** But if Herschel is going to pull ahead, he needs all of us to step up. Right now, the goal is _489 more online donors before midnight_.

---
So, I'm reaching out to you personally, Peter. **[If you're able, will you make an EMERGENCY donation of whatever you can afford?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=756319f851ab418bb610367620d1a7c1&_e=cxK6GHAsl9PdYQezMd8EgvQaqvZDGm6wbN6sHBRjq8pL3bXCayAP9gwjW0qJd2LHAa9YfofLqXljqxyKBDl80rEcd1pR5U0OcBMJ3DJ7DPdKJOQOQ0E5w8zfoPqlrlHe_lNVcQxqInxwv3VJZini4QmVHKql96vUZt0lNGi_sRKiyUErirC6IpVyuu53hU-MKfqEuMBcZMNxV2GJu_WU2m0W6oed4wEj7C9QnrWUeOEzBAOtZPerFLGYG0TVQtMI_OJ2oSQemNPi2vQenxpvPuaU0kmhJhMPAMNiiFCffgrLBwaIJYB0TyvEaBrEMuy0d7Y7n_WbEhA-O8jbanF98oQb6yW1_Prc-08eqBnOgH75_bV04FlR-eJEJ91Hd91X6ccawZzbF5okqt-7Hms67C6GiLfnachL6km6A3Ve2lUA3JxK1WQV1GLHnAZMBjKnLzS4XE9ZHYcJLKnFhWTwQOLigruqXWwYEb66pV9K9iw%3D)**

I don't like asking for money, but Herschel's opponent - Raphael Warnock - is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. So, it's now or never to make up ground.

**[Please help Herschel stay in the fight and take the momentum now. If we win Georgia, we can flip the Senate.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=756319f851ab418bb610367620d1a7c1&_e=cxK6GHAsl9PdYQezMd8EgvQaqvZDGm6wbN6sHBRjq8pL3bXCayAP9gwjW0qJd2LHAa9YfofLqXljqxyKBDl80rEcd1pR5U0OcBMJ3DJ7DPdKJOQOQ0E5w8zfoPqlrlHe_lNVcQxqInxwv3VJZini4QmVHKql96vUZt0lNGi_sRKiyUErirC6IpVyuu53hU-MKfqEuMBcZMNxV2GJu_WU2m0W6oed4wEj7C9QnrWUeOEzBAOtZPerFLGYG0TVQtMI_OJ2oSQemNPi2vQenxpvPh5cRsG85aNUv6C5bE76nkZh778_0s6u8KW_WYIIYJFnWrUr9BLzHsxQ33qV1Vb8LxeCCOfAPlqkXhHOIGJ6zrTyvToxB9hwOUR-ljCs2ivUEF_Xf6fndvPVfPwxoLNlm4IglR_WrEx7v5SKAE1PLjWaigb5NYwyUvU7aSLUq2_-i-xcTuyf7RbzzOdkLGIg6sksRy7Oot7-qwNPw5IkwCM%3D)**

Despite all of this, this race is still within the margin of error. But if Herschel is going to pull ahead, he needs all of us to step up. Right now, the goal is 489 more online donors before midnight. So, I'm reaching out to you personally, Peter. I don't like asking for money, but Herschel's opponent - Raphael Warnock - is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. So, it's now or never to make up ground. In service, Tom Cotton | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4761a222e5114c6eb4f097de0ad0c347&_e=KpALMdKPTSXunonSP_tFB5cPEJ30M_8DyCFffaYPH05sGy4FYOh2APbiM32pN6vFCH6bda8m6Kcf8dK8-voYhNMj2AfH55Mei1V7k51WVRPRJrg138wows2X86Nr0JEm3iIUWS5-hcVFTvMBG3ls_LOwQgQEo4UHyuEBRbr_l0u3Pa6MuzVCAU-7SXu3H9uAN6GblmBxwlpANYdPyX6P3CmmSd_l6Tbi7KC9BXkTaHMQVzUsE7NokSMbJQOQk6BIq61qW-OoeqKA8rGZGNhDzRBCl7jdI2M3zpDS1n9bICckIPGTV71qy0S6NeQJu12Jp7gREUP-6scw1R84Hv1AMFTzK5nlizCGWeHwTpGjcEQo7LFYNAVNtSkNlx_tZkXOh-FcG-GH0wHIuoLmHiJsR3rW6RlBUrhj9homYNWPqiTCHfZ5uBOhlVI0dDABZqf8V5wqnMZpr1h2kbr7axboFFfL9lQf40BQgO2AAQLg3K-vKtLJXkEfbaYD0zNW3VVC)

---
Hey, Fellow American -

I wanted to make a point of personally reaching out to you today.

Polling in this tight Georgia Senate race has shown me down by three points, tied, or - most recently - _up by one point._

**These polls all have one thing in common:
_MARGIN OF ERROR
VIRTUAL TIE
TOSS-UP_**
Here's the amazing part: my Democrat opponent and his Super PAC allies have spent over $25 million in false and misleading attack ads against me since I won the Republican nomination in May.

_Democrats expected to have a blowout lead by Labor Day. Instead, we're approaching fall with the race still a virtual tie._

There's no denying it: this race will come down to the wire. With so much at stake, **[I'm counting on your immediate support to help us win this critical race.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4761a222e5114c6eb4f097de0ad0c347&_e=KpALMdKPTSXunonSP_tFB5cPEJ30M_8DyCFffaYPH05sGy4FYOh2APbiM32pN6vFCH6bda8m6Kcf8dK8-voYhNMj2AfH55Mei1V7k51WVRPRJrg138wows2X86Nr0JEm3iIUWS5-hcVFTvMBG3ls_LOwQgQEo4UHyuEBRbr_l0u3Pa6MuzVCAU-7SXu3H9uAN6GblmBxwlpANYdPyX6P3CmmSd_l6Tbi7KC9BXkTaHMQVzUsE7NokSMbJQOQk6BIq61qW-OoeqKA8rGZGNhDzRBCl7jdI2M3zpDS1n9bICfW4llMROv4tpkk_6v6Foln_zYvL0d9Tragyj1rNFrCHVPKFiOP-Y4kQ9LKorZpmMVrVn82s5z1cG3v0cwt4i01GG7J-dO730PjcgL0Qs4zjXglDpS1gNRc-8cIhcgpDtvyKke7TgB-g0UZUGOEvjFoWM1VXASvpskVf7VZc97Sri2XHGWASmAbi96gIzaa5JX7HdDlQZJzTrsSGFphw_pT)**

This race isn't just about Georgians. Whoever wins in Georgia will determine the balance of power in the Senate, so this race affects EVERY AMERICAN.

I'm doing everything I can to win and put America first again, but Senator Warnock is breaking fundraising and spending records.

**[Can I count on your support to flip Georgia and help Republicans win back the Senate majority?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4761a222e5114c6eb4f097de0ad0c347&_e=KpALMdKPTSXunonSP_tFB5cPEJ30M_8DyCFffaYPH05sGy4FYOh2APbiM32pN6vFCH6bda8m6Kcf8dK8-voYhNMj2AfH55Mei1V7k51WVRPRJrg138wows2X86Nr0JEm3iIUWS5-hcVFTvMBG3ls_LOwQgQEo4UHyuEBRbr_l0u3Pa6MuzVCAU-7SXu3H9uAN6GblmBxwlpANYdPyX6P3CmmSd_l6Tbi7KC9BXkTaHMQVzUsE7NokSMbJQOQk6BIq61qW-OoeqKA8rGZGNhDzRBCl7jdI2M3zpDS1n9bICeAlCz5j01rhTPKyKuGHJnYRxfm7p82UEaPdgmhW-bEQDdpG4c1n88PlqapWot_7ZM9pF1ERL2-ft4LCr_3bbZnfKMX_25Q_PPKUrxInNCdQkc7InYgnB--ZMixYnGvUzhwQqjR29bAPD__-zG07LCtEY3W29MYaV8PAf_qgsanObDieYx9mCV11J1oZJND8hxK5r45F8Bpe1sxWt8t30Ey)**

The polls will go up and down a bit over the next 11 weeks, but one thing is clear: we cannot afford to continue being massively outraised and outspent. It's critical to make sure our ads are on the air ASAP to connect with the voters who will determine this election.

**[Please let me know I have your support before it's too late.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4761a222e5114c6eb4f097de0ad0c347&_e=KpALMdKPTSXunonSP_tFB5cPEJ30M_8DyCFffaYPH05sGy4FYOh2APbiM32pN6vFCH6bda8m6Kcf8dK8-voYhNMj2AfH55Mei1V7k51WVRPRJrg138wows2X86Nr0JEm3iIUWS5-hcVFTvMBG3ls_LOwQgQEo4UHyuEBRbr_l0u3Pa6MuzVCAU-7SXu3H9uAN6GblmBxwlpANYdPyX6P3CmmSd_l6Tbi7KC9BXkTaHMQVzUsE7NokSMbJQOQk6BIq61qW-OoeqKA8rGZGNhDzRBCl7jdI2M3zpDS1n9bICfHK4nNZNVQ61NIb_XVUeXTRcHl1aqiiUzR5wwPnFe3DFAfPYrqFwKF_0nBUbKeILeQZMzz_d9vcA3nWqUTOkMsQvxxJlQF9hPloMMA8iSanF3KQRmHCpjT09SPEBf5yZU6Aff2L7O3Swicg8_ZFG5zrPKNpcrI31RdocHyKI3UEyBghhlYBfn77wZIMvlPzivf_PvSiggN9NzOuogZ8PfJ)**

Thanks,

clean_body: Polling is SO CLOSE in Georgia, but we’re outspent and outraised. Help us fight back. | Hey, Fellow American - I wanted to make a point of personally reaching out to you today. Polling in this tight Georgia Senate race has shown me down by three points, tied, or - most recently - up by one point. These polls all have one thing in common: MARGIN OF ERROR VIRTUAL TIE TOSS-UP Here's the amazing part: my Democrat opponent and his Super PAC allies have spent over $25 million in false and misleading attack ads against me since I won the Republican nomination in May. Democrats expected to have a blowout lead by Labor Day. Instead, we're approaching fall with the race still a virtual tie. There's no denying it: this race will come down to the wire. With so much at stake, This race isn't just about Georgians. Whoever wins in Georgia will determine the balance of power in the Senate, so this race affects EVERY AMERICAN. I'm doing everything I can to win and put America first again, but Senator Warnock is breaking fundraising and spending records. The polls will go up and down a bit over the next 11 weeks, but one thing is clear: we cannot afford to continue being massively outraised and outspent. It's critical to make sure our ads are on the air ASAP to connect with the voters who will determine this election. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ken Paxton, criminal attorney general of Texas, must go. Who says so? Only *HIS REPUBLICAN AIDES.* For the rest of us, it should be a no-brainer to support his replacement with the fabulous, the strong, and the very decent, Rochelle Garza!
body:
Rochelle Garza for Texas Attorney General
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, According to his OWN STAFF ... Ken Paxton is a criminal. **Texas Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton is a walking, talking criminal enterprise and shameless right wing extremist.** And if we do our part, he's about to lose to a Latina Democrat, a watershed moment in Texas and American politics. [**Can you join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Rochelle Garza so she can become the next Attorney General of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3203131c-ff2d-47b5-896d-a567a32d602e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Barely in office for six months, in July of 2015, a state grand jury indicted the supposed top law enforcement officer in Texas on three criminal charges, i** ncluding 2 counts of securities fraud. In 2016, the Securities & Exchange Commission filed a civil enforcement action against Paxton for defrauding investors in a company he'd represented as legal counsel. **In October of 2020, seven of Paxton's top aides--including First Assistant Attorney Jeff Mateer--published a letter accusing Paxton of improper influence, abuse of office, bribery and other crimes. It's honestly almost comical that this clown is still Attorney General. ** **Paxton also filed suit vs numerous states where President Biden bested Donald Trump in 2020, trying to overturn the election results based on near-non-existent voter fraud and idiotic reasoning that was laughed out of court. He was brought up on ethics charges for this specious lawsuit by the State Bar of Texas. ** **_Besides being a corrupt clown, Paxton is an extremist and traitor. He was in Washington January 6th to speak on behalf of Trump and rile up the violent, seditious crowd that eventually attacked the Capitol. He's pushed religion in schools, pursued felony cases for "voter fraud" against voters of color for accidentally putting the wrong address on voter registration forms, pushed guns on Texas campuses and supported court clerks violating the Contitution by refusing to issue marriage licenses to same sex couples._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: ROCHELLE GARZA FOR TEXAS](https://default.salsalabs.org/T027b98f0-02c2-4549-bc32-ac67f1841767/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I could honestly go on for days, because if there is something stupid. bigoted or downright criminal, chances are Ken Paxton has done it. This is why _he only won his reelection in the red state of Texas by 3 points in 2018, and now he's in real trouble_. I**n a recent poll he is only leading Democratic rockstar Rochelle Garza by 2 points, 34%-32%. Because of all I just said above, this corrupt, cacophonous jack-in-the-box only has a 40% approval rating, and among the many--19%--of undecided voters, Garza beats him by 5%.** Oh, and did we mention an Libertarian candidate is in the race supported by mostly disgruntled Republicans who won't vote for Paxton? **Garza, meanwhile, in 2017 took on then Appellate Court Judge Brett Kavanaugh, Trump and Paxton, defending a 17 year old detained immigrant who was denied the right to an abortion, AND WON. This case resulted in the "Garza Notice" which prevents teens in immigration-detention centers from being denied their right to bodily autonomy, even post-Roe.** **Garza has outraised this monster ($520,000 to $340,000), she has outworked him and she outthinks him every day. She'd bring much needed diversity to the Texas Attorney General's office. With our help, she can beat him** and work with Beto to help speed the transformation of Texas from a reddish-purple into a blue state. She is inches away from achieving this incredible feat.
[**Can you join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Rochelle Garza so she can become the next Attorney General of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e3d1978-3563-48d5-a29c-a4bda50c5a6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for inspiring Democrats, and ending the careers of corrupt-hack Republicans. Cliff
---
|
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Alexandra's message from last week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we wanted
to make sure you saw Alexandra’s email from last week about our declining
fundraising, and let you know that since that email, more than 1,000
grassroots donors have chipped in for an average of $20.97.

And we have to ask: [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113403?refcode=em20220821-24821&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=24821%2E1203867%2EooIdXB ]can you donate $3 right now to help
us catch up this month? We have momentum to get in a stronger fundraising
position, but we’re not there yet — every donation you make helps us
re-elect and expand the Squad, and build for 2024.

Thank you,

Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----
Date: Monday, August 15, 2022
From: Alexandra Rojas
Subject: I’m asking for your help today

Peter,

I’m writing to you today because things are getting tough at a critical
time. Here’s the situation:

Our fundraising has decreased nearly every month this year. Our
fundraising is down 14% just this month. This is not a sustainable trend
as we try to not just re-elect the Squad, but grow it by sending Summer
Lee and Greg Casar to Congress.

We operate on a pretty tight budget, especially compared to other
political organizations. It’s because we run solely on donations from
grassroots supporters like you. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs.

Our average donation this year is just $18.24. We’re incredibly proud of
that number. It means we rely on a lot of small-dollar donations to fuel
our primaries.

You may know by now, but we started Justice Democrats after many of us
worked on the Bernie 2016 campaign. We were all inspired and determined to
find a way to continue the message of Bernie’s campaign through electing a
new Congress that truly represented the needs of the people.

That’s when we launched Justice Democrats and supported a lot of
candidates in our first election year (2018). We lost a bunch of races,
but then we won one big one: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s groundbreaking
victory against the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House.

We recruited and elected Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in 2020, defeating
two more powerful corporate Democrats. This year, we’ve already helped
Summer Lee, Greg Casar, Rashida Tlaib, and Cori win their primaries. Now,
we have to ensure Jamaal wins his primary, we send the Squad back to
Congress, and elect Summer and Greg to join them. We’re working to build
support in Congress for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and so much
more.

That’s why I’m asking,
Peter: can you make
your first
donation to Justice Democrats today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113403?refcode=em20220821-24821&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=24821%2E1203867%2EooIdXB ]→ Yes, I can donate today to help build the Justice Democrats bloc in
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113403?refcode=em20220821-24821&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=24821%2E1203867%2EooIdXB ]Contribute

I appreciate so, so much whatever you can give today, whether it’s $3,
$27, $100 or anything at all. We will never take corporate PAC money and
we will always rely on our grassroots movement.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220821-24821-footer&t=1005&refcode2=24821_1203867_ooIdXB&akid=24821%2E1203867%2EooIdXB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=24821%2E1203867%2EooIdXB

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: We only need one more donation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hello Derek,

Just this morning, we worried we may not hit tonight’s fundraising goal of
raising $200,000 before Georgians begin requesting absentee ballots.

But as of an hour ago, we are just 1 donation from
your area away
from hitting our goal.

We’re relying on grassroots
supporters to beat
back Brian Kemp’s attack ads, power our campaign and build One Georgia —
where opportunity and success aren't determined by zip code, background or
access to power. And this Monday, August 22, Georgians can start making
their plan to vote for Stacey!

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B3_ZIP_S1_T1_HQ_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1938%2E1862389%2ExHd-XZ ]Derek, will
you donate $5 to become the 1 grassroots donor from
your
community we’re counting on in the next few hours to
support our campaign before our midnight deadline?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B3_ZIP_S1_T1_HQ_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1938%2E1862389%2ExHd-XZ ]DONATE

Derek, here's
the deal:

Stacey’s momentum is strong — we’re neck and neck with Brian Kemp in the
polls. So Kemp is plotting to stop her by spreading lies, releasing more
than $1 million in attack ads and doing anything in his power to slow us
down.

The best way to beat back these attack ads, elect Stacey and create a
stronger Georgia for everyone starts with hitting our midnight goal.

But, Derek, we
checked the books and we are just one gift from
your area
short.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220821_B3_ZIP_S1_T1_HQ_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1938%2E1862389%2ExHd-XZ ]So we are asking one last time: will you chip in $5 to
be the 1 donation that puts us over the top and helps us hit our midnight
deadline in just a few hours?

Let’s get good done, together,

Stacey Abrams HQ

subject: What 𝑷𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒏𝒕 𝑩𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒏 said!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC

| Team,

This week, President Joe Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law, putting a nice cap on a string of big victories for Democrats in Congress and President Biden.

This legislation will help fight the climate change issues we’ve seen here in Arizona this summer – extreme heat and extreme drought – while also lowering prescription drug prices for those on Medicare. As another Democratic president said on social media, _it’s a big deal._

**[Team, that’s part of the good news. The bad news is that every Republican voted against these measures. So if we let Republicans grab control of either chamber of Congress, we can kiss all progress goodbye. Can you donate $10 right now so we can hold our current U.S. House seats, while trying to flip AZ-01?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xpCWIve9GsbFUV9FLdFflSE0BIpR1QuLcN2oIJdNTihZxsxV5kvSyOuzM2bgnmFp3d9nxFobTTmhPs0APQGbg3xrK7IXK652QfQZ75iNgkYM6bOeAaObeB6GW34wfC44PhyqDB7xZ5UkZ2n7U-4ir5eAssVB8i__1R7mP8Ap3eOOhAzJfLahEHxabKscgZSX_SMfqVZkHQ-RSr8nV_7s9WnrKE7FVJ--hurr8_PaNGHIplyTSLxwq-wqMyfiJbGezbeimBG9ucZSG1YbbXFVQ4FV6ruGibfK3XoiJUwyKKtgSzq326I9G4T9vu3vdON4_1fOegeBIJCSxtQPtduRv7ZS2peEG6LMGjY8B9X3XaPBgwjGX2rC3uKcla_WmMIq2j-pVKJjgv0ixmeRV88VVh/3os/ZspsHg29S-yIFNdkBmu_FQ/h1/DV1nqhCxeGoUxFKLXVUTEaAYTnTfqm6oL48tCJR4SNs)** [

The Inflation Reduction Act is monumental progress on its own. But our Democratic majority in Congress recently passed two other major bills.

The PACT Act will finally give our veterans coverage for exposure to toxic burn pits. After Republicans blocked this bill for weeks, President Biden recently signed it into law.

Add in legislation to bring semiconductor chips manufacturing back to the U.S. and it’s been a productive few weeks. This legislation is huge for Arizona, which has three chip facilities under construction right now.

**It just goes to show, Democrats get stuff done when we’re in control.** While this progress is nice, we know there’s more work to do – and it’s only going to happen if Democrats retain control.

**[Team, the political winds are shifting, and we have a chance to maintain control of Congress this midterm cycle. As the top toss-up state, what happens in Arizona races will be the difference between keeping our majority or losing it. Can you donate $10 right now to make sure we can continue our progress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xpCWIve9GsbFUV9FLdFflSE0BIpR1QuLcN2oIJdNTihZxsxV5kvSyOuzM2bgnmFp3d9nxFobTTmhPs0APQGbg3xrK7IXK652QfQZ75iNgkYM6bOeAaObeB6GW34wfC44PfttHXZHUBJgj1vpW26xMMO8yEEFTwO6B3KvUFKo3q5iFkpz3wUDtPV7yvEypGeNjDnYAjnX7PINtFDQ6cspJAgM4oh07BISf2G3flt2iFByrz90TN6O7OI88JPQ-cNWf10kNH-EIdAaLg6F9PSgFtPZRbH6R8etWmWewST0jcQPlZwUTaZ070dFgnYpTfDw5DHLJngybDcWltnqRKuBAd3ycjISXtbn6FIa25f3-7i8eyCUAqT55FHa_0_hriJq-ru2hRK4H2TBmeUc9jeY4u/3os/ZspsHg29S-yIFNdkBmu_FQ/h4/xqMV1JIgo8zNLqLgI7zWTv9U1TDVq_m_tTKXQq1_jSw)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xpCWIve9GsbFUV9FLdFflSxbTTXNmuwUUsiEAoqF7Xq_JWwxDIoWpbmQooFJGAhb5E9QfRtvaMdWFMiRIlXCwF_501hibJzEfFWKgqcJA5nWnoichbByeYjlFFN4tSAr2OQAceW4DFe65VChRK7ampuNpwteM9Etbx3QaU2IykCLKBsd-J6FS8Igbbj3FSX9bG9hITLYDC9lkXUoNpAD34Hpn4xttOsWrEtbXkVuNH_Y_ZXipirlGOPMThnFm8P3XahXC0pV6rIP9b8w7J5H4ycyqweCtAVqZDfQiv6slARY7q8EC_CwOpP_u8M3EDXKfrx4ubQEQ4b_h-N1G7-KpdnWOBCd0-UPRQtoCTuLJYR5v6oCb7IwYPQVBZq9S9wHmtQEbuZ-XQC-Q7BF87qRaHOtEwNvT3Ko5WXA2QGO4o6A/3os/ZspsHg29S-yIFNdkBmu_FQ/h5/nkVVczyDDa1wPqbmxQqmBv5PQK9_N1kPl0kc3xvwBeA)

clean_body: | | | Help us hold the majorities delivering results | | | Team, This week, President Joe Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law, putting a nice cap on a string of big victories for Democrats in Congress and President Biden. This legislation will help fight the climate change issues we’ve seen here in Arizona this summer – extreme heat and extreme drought – while also lowering prescription drug prices for those on Medicare. As another Democratic president said on social media, it’s a big deal. | ?linkid=4&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-these-are-big-wins&emailreferrer=email1638883&emailsubject=these-are-big-wins The Inflation Reduction Act is monumental progress on its own. But our Democratic majority in Congress recently passed two other major bills. The PACT Act will finally give our veterans coverage for exposure to toxic burn pits. After Republicans blocked this bill for weeks, President Biden recently signed it into law. Add in legislation to bring semiconductor chips manufacturing back to the U.S. and it’s been a productive few weeks. This legislation is huge for Arizona, which has three chip facilities under construction right now. It just goes to show, Democrats get stuff done when we’re in control. While this progress is nice, we know there’s more work to do – and it’s only going to happen if Democrats retain control. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Help us save the majority, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . There’s so much at stake in the upcoming election, and it’s critical that we're successful up and down the ballot across Maryland in November. Our race is one of the top Democratic pickup opportunities in the country. There is no doubt that winning in 2022 is crucial to making progress on key issues integral to our democracy and communities.
Join us and hear directly from President Biden and other special guests to learn more about how you can do your part in helping elect our ticket in November. **Be sure to RSVP to save your spot at our event and be the first to know additional details as they’re announced.**

**When:** Thursday, August 25th, 4:30pm
**Where:** Richard Montgomery High School

Wes

body:
>>>

** $700,000,000,000
------------------------------------------------------------

How’s that for red-tape sticker shock!

If the D.C. radicals were looking push Robert’s buttons, well then, MISSION ACCOMPLISHED.

We’re FIRED UP at Team Burns, and nothing will stop Robert from getting the job done as New Hampshire’s America First fiscal fighter. But he needs your help to do it, and the first step is securing the Republican nomination on September 13th.

This time it’s welcomed and needed --> hit that button and support Robert’s fight!
PUSH ME (https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/fwd-have-you-seen-the-news?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_PG-e-fwd-have-you-seen-the-news-ise-20220818-a_20220819&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-fwd-have-you-seen-the-news-ise-20220818-a&utm_agency=PG&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b4e0ff1c6b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_08_06_12_02_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-b4e0ff1c6b-252807809)
Record-high inflation and a weaponized IRS don’t stand a chance against We the People and Robert. The Granite State doesn’t crumble under pressure, we make patriots!

Shaun | Campaign Manager, Team Burns
FROM: Robert Burns
TO: Burns for Congress Supporters
SUBJECT: Have you seen the news?

Have you seen the news lately, Peter? For once, I’m sure the leftist mainstream media wouldn’t mind their ratings suffer by you NOT WATCHING this clown show topple!

Even the leftists on TV have had to report on the Democrats’ over $700,000,000,000 price tag for their “Inflation Reduction Act”, which does absolutely nothing to reduce inflation.

The only thing the far-left is focused on reducing is the purchasing power of The People!

I’m running for Congress to return our great nation back into the hands of responsible, hardworking Americans like you. For me, it starts in New Hampshire’s 2nd District.

Support my campaign for common sense in Congress >>> (https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/fwd-have-you-seen-the-news?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_PG-e-fwd-have-you-seen-the-news-ise-20220818-a_20220819&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-fwd-have-you-seen-the-news-ise-20220818-a&utm_agency=PG&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b4e0ff1c6b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_08_06_12_02_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-b4e0ff1c6b-252807809)

body:

#
Recent polls show Beto within 5 points of Abbott, meaning our victory for the people of Texas is within reach.
But with summer coming to an end, **we need to close the gap as soon as possible.**
That’s why we’re about to launch our first statewide TV ads next week. And the reality is that it costs $1,485,000 to air those ads for just one week across the four biggest media markets in Texas.

body:
the Five Ws

| [](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKBUaG_L96URixAbAGWOGAIPtUKZZ-vcimXOU45ySBYE-_mJs8G6fhZQkE6WL5wpWBZCP2KXI6ndWb7KtqCzg3mmQ9RmcqUH5UDw3O1gX3MgLP7uZr6XM5VzS2nvPYFN2ttFzxaAvr5Z0ttAO9MEc-QnI-B_q5BOWKO3lxk6HlP-DmQ4fnx3fAv12i-a1F-P48FuzkN9eKZ4rLzetfMa0q8s%3D)

It would mean the world to me if you took a few minutes to read this email. I thought I’d take a second to walk you through my life, my story, and how it led me here – running for Senator of Pennsylvania. And I think what I have to say is pretty important...

**The beginning:** My parents are Turkish immigrants who moved to America when my father was training to become a doctor. Growing up as a child of immigrants, I witnessed my family’s sacrifices. My father grew up dirt poor (literally sleeping on a dirt floor) and loved this country as much as anyone already here. I would later follow in his footsteps as a cardiothoracic surgeon. I owe much of my work ethic and love of medicine to my father.
[](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKF09g4zB6Wn6Uleq1HfcHSUwAqIQPDsONYsud1yJlGLAOSbpv4r9zwSomAmRpkNkEdZZ_ftQF7E-MLKHLAAYb3AVngMWR3BAkayb2Z_gy16dtideSo2gHv72LnT0uuscDXcl56Ui4A4zqZcp79ouhbAzbj5BxZ1WhkaDid9nrkYTw7sHlnGAMJh0tlE9fGm1Qk1Mzzwb9mKGEd9m459eiUI%3D)
This is a photo of my parents and me at graduation. I couldn’t have asked for a better pair of role models. They came to America for our nation’s incredible education and democracy, and they never wasted a second working to achieve the American Dream.
[](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKG_zhMAZESZqAeUHHHnbF7IyU5NnpiOPhsOTDwt00HhZ1_QR1Z1gsiSMMnTq734VcK5lH3u8mXFuLQ-9B6UUHkDN6ckhRk5uBfVPFS2VOeCgjADoWXGLRWk0eMgREx3jPHZv0lpJ-2dxXW00WIL7UqBHanTKVuLm-coQjUuLzfZJK-9tUH_Flnufw0lCAP3btL_sh6-f-2izB5cl14qLe9g%3D)
**The middle:** I met my wife Lisa in Philadelphia while I was attending the University of Pennsylvania. Funny story – I proposed to her on a city street corner, using a tab from a discarded soda can as a makeshift ring. I’m the luckiest man on Earth to call Lisa my wife of 37 years. And even luckier to have four beautiful children with her.
[](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKAfsVsZ3bd-l0MWmiyi09t158FScapzPFOAhSKiIf3r7E5t6KarXKBZS0axVttoMsIuEIs9lEx7X3kNffT3Hsh7WDjh4HzPz7HxRi7-gM9FzAQkYi4OopNz5nmeMQpeebR5FGD1fwEAo9K2iSZbD6uELmm4zwqDkH-41Jh3jORHYGEP7mIF2TY7_uemTxFOnlWkIjED4S5ycE2n3ZyCblVQ%3D)
Here’s a picture of me during my residency at the Presbyterian Hospital in New York City. Since then, I became a world-class heart surgeon, performing thousands of heart operations and authoring eight New York Times best sellers. I then went on to practice medicine simultaneously on my own TV show, helping millions take control of their own health. Much of what I learned and practiced as a doctor relates directly to why I am running for Senate:
**You are the key to solving many of your problems. The messages of empowerment, personal responsibility, and freedom, are the values I’m taking with me to my campaign for the U.S. Senate. I’ve seen firsthand the goal of the liberal elites and establishment – to make your life decisions for you - and cancel you if you disagree.** [](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKNQdUKmBed_TYM1W-o8RLMwXSPThCbYUJle6KnP0rmuVALx2krrc8bp07KMZ6W1j190T21WAn8RJELUYIgOc1Vm1y7cXggnVtP_2-pYJATR8cE6Z799aleMjwYGikTK75WxtgMvGgliIzRtmtzmGi6ccB6kApu7mRinzk0WO_puTMOwbcqFfZzkEWoCIMeO1TvAwz6hrcKKKRL4AWgFrjI8%3D)
**The now:** After seeing the dysfunction in Washington and across America, I couldn’t be silent. I refuse to allow the system to continue to fail my kids, my grandchildren, and future generations.

**This brings me to my main point:** I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to empower the people of Pennsylvania and improve their lives. No one, including the Washington establishment, knows what’s best for you – _except for YOU._
[](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKHRZQZA7x5mX24nXUWpKUUEzj1f6ZMBRW0x7cR9nepfCgEdUdeP_lA8OPmW4HTsoe4PsmEJZnZbKFgbtmEHJNqNVsAtaH2aPNl4wQ-EIn5RlrgSSOPCOPLWerAJwjSI9LSH7sxquu9jM8FgU4jhQ_BYk_OvWi2Ka-cF5YqVnDn_j5yNRDizhu2qHZNSQ5-FZBQWSSJeqzolpAR1VADTSx1w%3D)
I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.
[**I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight with me:**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=2474817e4d4d48ad87f5f1ceca1ad8cb&_e=ppa2klRfBSgZr3-bmmvFbdElw6g0rIZyXLQdY5JQ6sm-K3a-ojAEs5EGZi4H3A_Bt20RtcKcf6OJviwu8tVDX-gtcOP3zd4LYuJYj264O-UdV42PyfMccNTWbsxE1SfSE8GDa6sQV5G-Sn8ojFL_e5gsslNnnCGmRk92FgD23NAYc5plpbnvgYM3smFqtDkl4tzeV0MhyPKodh7Ck8xndSqlMOUN7tGTkYBD-ZHJYCxjCKr_ScFVri3CLi4qoqiU8eoIbqy7Pl_TvXlejr8x5jmOWUiqlHjiLGe4DYAiPG3TlMuQ3iVa492VKlPDFX3nxyIlsoU9NwBRLBEh48TeKMuc39iYaCBDo5MEVyzG8toJsuzBcPXFdLKXabd28Up5vO2GK3267F7Kct2KkovEzn4QFHpY_kpjmizByRLmoC6JirtIpTB11kYoI1k1ESyRML-CTjWnGg6pCFu5rPeOF24ihYGQkkJizZP_xnFBTTbKGhDC5xaPvVGbmOyBynLQG4lEE7bKvEZ9grlW6RIooEb30V8Qy-ONV5DnYYxZUfM%3D) | [**JOIN DR. name: John Fetterman
subject: Crudité or veggie tray?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hi, Derek. It’s John Fetterman — Lieutenant Governor of PA +
Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate.

Mmmmm 😋 crudité!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.qlIJW1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ][IMG]

Just kidding. That is NOT a photo of me holding Crudité.

Here in PA, we just call this a Veggie Tray.

Seriously. If this looks like anything other than a Veggie Tray to you,
then I am probably NOT your candidate.

Because there’s nothing more patronizing to everyday people than calling a
“Veggie Tray” some fancy French word that literally everyone has to look
up on Google. 🙄

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.qlIJW1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ] [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.qlIJW1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ][IMG]

Derek, I can’t tell you how critical it is that Democrats defeat
ridiculous, Crudité-eating Republicans like Dr. Oz in November.

That’s why Adam Schiff and I are humbly asking for your support.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.qlIJW1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]Can you rush a donation of any amount between my campaign + Adam
Schiff’s? Any amount you’re able to give has a direct and immediate impact
on our chance to win PA and defend our House Majority for Democrats in
November.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to John Fetterman and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.njd8rb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.z1dRKL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.cT0zfj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.B1GAcm&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.8AOLIg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2022_abs_em_fetterman.qlIJW1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=706%2E5257348%2E8-hCNF ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!!

❤️ John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

body:
completely crestfallen

|

Hey Peter,

I’m going to keep this email down to a few sentences – but I hope you can understand just how important this is. [**_Click here to donate to my campaign >>_**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=88027deb4a4844409370d8b251a2e23d&_e=WEGDRgB4LoN6tOXmTDVBFFTEs7vMuvPWbaKbDZFOMaZIg-UyKP2eEqRDQg2qxe1XF4jHhGigJcHLTVVsyyFkt-TlNVzr3Vs6Rd4_0t5aI4TnKmpWt3xDXVdIyThUpr-pBw4an7NE6Pq8zzYP8D0nVuCOirn-Jya9FRsMYBXb8YsR7ONPdLKdpYY5xpXibghXmtXBZZFAYjF-PXOgqFEg61PRYsVJ9AI5HPHnIZiL_4uNDupx6OFPv0yqZ08tjd31vK6Rk2ghGeHqJy80V7SFIwTrviNLmhkzuJFF2PYvrCakWeBT-pcBogyrFAOc9Bg__xtWEN6KsX_CN86eubVf9C0J9zy3UQLXumg7vYV4od3_gGNn2IK8dRfM1j1B-mE6Kspli4mrB5NZ4f_jGMAwsCU2bVUUGso7JmybkEHFcW9lVttCKs_iK8yoKTQoUXDXAz2fUmWYBobGzf4XeDSxUTU0mC-kkvzABd3pTERUFrWJ8Db_7itASCHyq_gI8ygOg-9PdrXkb7kOJoBwUEAWTw_oMVFV3L5YVUCLJm7rnbc%3D)

Ohio WILL decide Senate control. And I am drowning in Ryan’s dishonest attacks. He’s even called my NYT bestselling book “a piece of garbage.” That stung.

I’m more fired up than ever to beat him. And I need crucial resources to turn this campaign around, [**_and I was hoping you could rush a donation today to help me out._**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=88027deb4a4844409370d8b251a2e23d&_e=WEGDRgB4LoN6tOXmTDVBFFTEs7vMuvPWbaKbDZFOMaZIg-UyKP2eEqRDQg2qxe1XF4jHhGigJcHLTVVsyyFkt-TlNVzr3Vs6Rd4_0t5aI4TnKmpWt3xDXVdIyThUpr-pBw4an7NE6Pq8zzYP8D0nVuCOirn-Jya9FRsMYBXb8YsR7ONPdLKdpYY5xpXibghXmtXBZZFAYjF-PXOgqFEg61PRYsVJ9AI5HPHnIZiL_4uNDupx6OFPv0yqZ08tjd31vK6Rk2ghGeHqJy80V7SFIwTrviNLmhkzuJFF2PYvrCakWeBT-pcBogyrFAOc9Bg__xtWEN6KsX_CN86eubVf9JsyK1qNiRB5OlllyTvgWw-dvyogp0jG1na5IaGhBCorq3l5utUrbjcJS25ElF7t4YjTXfjrPej2IH3LbBYJfdmXct4XHDU8fiRZdOf-r5DPilVSuHmOxT5cQ5BI89inM9XjHl8UQxC6fcIGuGQmD7FT6TMvFFGOGgzNFnHf-bcCqsJTvn68DOQe6445nrsyFSrypPDA4kESsYhaensjhVQ%3D)

I’m about to walk into a campaign meeting, but I’m begging that you hear my plea and [**please rush $25, $50, or even $100**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=88027deb4a4844409370d8b251a2e23d&_e=WEGDRgB4LoN6tOXmTDVBFFTEs7vMuvPWbaKbDZFOMaZIg-UyKP2eEqRDQg2qxe1XF4jHhGigJcHLTVVsyyFkt-TlNVzr3Vs6Rd4_0t5aI4TnKmpWt3xDXVdIyThUpr-pBw4an7NE6Pq8zzYP8D0nVuCOirn-Jya9FRsMYBXb8YsR7ONPdLKdpYY5xpXibghXmtXBZZFAYjF-PXOgqFEg61PRYsVJ9AI5HPHnIZiL_4uNDupx6OFPv0yqZ08tjd31vK6Rk2ghGeHqJy80V7SFIwTrviNLmhkzuJFF2PYvrCakWeBT-pcBogyrFAOc9Bg__xtWEN6KsX_CN86eubVf9EpJB4t7UQi9hvJxb3KC2myQSV3Rlwxp5tsfql8BOYt5XWpnYtaJzz4Zm2Ja39v5ulYPGkuulQTZrs1SZ29p9ZFYc1zEZNjN1nh4MtdtLFUVXv5I2CvAoNN1_y4nOqwY8ib6jPmIrvP6y3njQfDi_cEXOdXmVu4BfoH5H-hGz9bSaFhWtHRHcV6mZQZt_nHyWB5LDQlVaGKA2QP_lVO0NOM%3D) to our campaign before midnight to get us back on track.

Thx so so much,
JD

I wanted to make a point of personally reaching out to you today.

Polling in this tight Georgia Senate race has shown me down by three points, tied, or - most recently - _up by one point._

**These polls all have one thing in common:
_MARGIN OF ERROR

TOSS-UP_**

_Democrats expected to have a blowout lead by Labor Day. Instead, we're approaching fall with the race still a virtual tie._

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Humbly asking you to make a $3 contribution before Tuesday's primary
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
This is a long email about our campaign as we head toward primary day on Tuesday
#

Friends -
I wanted to take a few minutes today from knocking on doors to talk to you about our campaign for Congress, and to ask you to contribute $3 before Tuesday's primary.
I'll explain more in just a second, but if you're ready to add your support now, please use this link:
[**https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/Donate**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220821-1-t1&refcode2=1038_59515_8cVC-g&akid=1038%2E59515%2E8cVC-g)
First, a bit of history:
When I ran for State Senate in 2018 against a seven-term fake Democrat and leader of the New York political machine, it was because I didn't see nearly enough urgency from our leaders in Albany. Instead of using their power to deliver for working people, my opponent was more concerned with appeasing his corporate donors.
My opponent had more money, more endorsements, and the corporate establishment backing him. But he didn't understand what our communities needed or deserved, and he didn't have the people. That's why we won.
Sound familiar?
I'm running for Congress because I see the same thing in Washington today that I saw in Albany then. That's why from the very beginning, this has been a campaign for all New Yorkers — for _everyone_ , not just the wealthy and well-connected.
For everyone who is frustrated with the lack of courage and urgency from the political establishment.
For everyone who believes health care is a human right, not a tool for corporate profits.
For everyone who believes abortion rights should be protected and fought for without hesitation, not taken for granted or used to fundraise off of.
For everyone who believes we must pass a Green New Deal and save our planet, not hand it over to fossil fuel companies and industrial polluters.
For everyone who believes we must get dark money out of politics once and for all, not encourage right-wing super PACs who try to buy our political system.
For everyone who believes it should be easier for working people to organize and join a union, not harder.
For everyone who believes we must abolish the filibuster to protect and expand the right to vote, not allow our democracy to be dismantled piece by piece.
And for everyone who believes it's time for a new generation of fearless and relentless leaders who will act with urgency and strength to finally have a say in our government.
I'm so proud of the campaign that we've run together.
Despite hundreds of thousands of dollars in super PAC spending and a tidal wave of attack ads, our grassroots movement has stood together through adversity and shown our collective strength.
But the truth is that in order to finish the job and win on Tuesday, we need the resources to fully fund our Get Out the Vote operation for two more days.
That's why I need to ask, one more time:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign for Congress? Every dollar will go toward our final GOTV push tomorrow and Tuesday so we have what it takes to win this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220821-1-t1&refcode2=1038_59515_8cVC-g&akid=1038%2E59515%2E8cVC-g)

I'll explain more in just a second, but if you're ready to add your support now, please use this link: First, a bit of history: When I ran for State Senate in 2018 against a seven-term fake Democrat and leader of the New York political machine, it was because I didn't see nearly enough urgency from our leaders in Albany. Instead of using their power to deliver for working people, my opponent was more concerned with appeasing his corporate donors. My opponent had more money, more endorsements, and the corporate establishment backing him. But he didn't understand what our communities needed or deserved, and he didn't have the people. That's why we won. Sound familiar? I'm running for Congress because I see the same thing in Washington today that I saw in Albany then. That's why from the very beginning, this has been a campaign for all New Yorkers — for everyone , not just the wealthy and well-connected. For everyone who is frustrated with the lack of courage and urgency from the political establishment. For everyone who believes health care is a human right, not a tool for corporate profits. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: My remarks from the Michigan Democratic Party 2022 Nomination Convention
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hello friend,
Today, I formally accepted the nomination for another term as Michigan Secretary of State. “’m sharing my full acceptance speech below because I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it. Thank for being in this with me.
I am honored to stand before you today and accept your nomination to be Michigan Secretary of State for another a second term. Thank you!
When I stood before you four years ago alongside my mentor, the late U.S. Senator Carl Levin, we looked ahead to what we hoped would be, and indeed became, a new day for democracy in Michigan.
When you nominated me four years ago you asked me, you wanted me, to make government – and our democracy - work better for everyone.
I am proud to say we heard you loud ands clear and we did just that.
In just four short years we’ve completely modernized the Secretary of State’s Office by expanding the options you have for conveniently doing business with us. Those options include renewing from the comfort of your home, or at the grocery store while you’re shopping.
And I am proud to stand before you and say how in just four short years we’ve transformed our democracy, too, making it easier for every eligible citizen to register and vote, empowering citizens to draw legislative and congressional district lines, and propelling Michigan into one of the highest voter turnout states in the country.
But I’m not here to talk about all that because you know it. You’ve lived it. You’ve seen first-hand that -- because of what we’ve done together in the last four years -- state government is more representative, more responsive, and more effective.
Instead, I stand before you today to say we’re not done.
I’m here today to say we’ve got more work to do for you, the citizens of Michigan.
I’m here today to tell you that if we don’t do everything we can in the next XX days to protect every Michigan citizen’s right to live in a democracy where every voice is heard and every vote is counted, we could lose everything we’ve gained and more.
I’m here today to tell you that this November, our fundamental rights, our freedoms and our democracy are on the ballot.
Right now conspiracy theorists and election deniers are carrying out a coordinated strategy to delegitimize democracy. One of them is running to replace me. Another is running to replace the attorney general. And still another is running to be the governor of this state.
But we aren’t going to let them win, are we?
No! We won’t let them win because no amount of threats, lies, deceit, false rhetoric or vitriol is going to stand in the way of us and our democracy. Not in Michigan, not now, not ever.
But here’s the thing: we won’t win without the work. And in these next 79 days, we need to work.
We need to work harder than we worked in 2018, harder than we worked in 2020, harder than we’ve worked ever before, to ensure that every single voter in this state knows that democracy is on the ballot this fall.
So I’m asking you Michigan Democrats:
*
Are
you
ready
to
work
to
ensure
every
voter
in
the
state
of
Michigan
knows
that
their
vote
in
this
race
will
determine
the
future
of
democracy
not
just
in
Michigan
but
in
the
entire
nation?
*
Are
you
ready
to
make
sure
every
single
voter
knows
that
democracy
is
on
the
November
8th
ballot?
*
Are
you
ready
to
tell
them
to
vote
for
democracy?
*
And,
most
importantly
are
you
ready
to
get
out
the
vote?
If you are, if you’re with me, I want you to repeat after me:
Vote for (vote for!) Democracy (democracy!) Vote for (vote for!) Democracy (democracy!)
Let’s go win!

We need to work harder than we worked in 2018, harder than we worked in 2020, harder than we’ve worked ever before, to ensure that every single voter in this state knows that democracy is on the ballot this fall. So I’m asking you Michigan Democrats: Are you ready to work to ensure every voter in the state of Michigan knows that their vote in this race will determine the future of democracy not just in Michigan but in the entire nation? Are you ready to make sure every single voter knows that democracy is on the November 8th ballot? Are you ready to tell them to vote for democracy? And, most importantly are you ready to get out the vote? If you are, if you’re with me, I want you to repeat after me: Vote for (vote for!) Democracy (democracy!) Vote for (vote for!) Democracy (democracy!) Let’s go win! secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=082122 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=082122] [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Pod Save America Update (via Team Ryan)
subject: “JD Vance is an absolute fraud doing MAGA karaoke…”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19435?t=1007&amount=25&akid=5130%2E3611125%2ELgGHA8 ]Pod Save America: "JD Vance is an absolute fraud doing MAGA karaoke ... you can
see the flop sweat from him trying to be something he isn't.”

The guys over at Pod Save America said it even better than we could,
folks...

✅ JD Vance is a fraud ... yep, checks out. JD left Ohio high and dry to
ride off into the Silicon Valley sunset to make millions and kickstart his
political career. Thanks, Peter Thiel 🙄

✅ Doing MAGA karaoke ... hmm, an anti-democracy, anti-abortion, right-wing
fear monger who would rather pass tax cuts for the wealthy and the
well-connected than look out for the working class. Where o’ where have we
ever heard those greatest hits before?! 🤔

✅ See the flop sweat from him trying to be something he isn’t ... 1.) ew,
but 2.) JD has spent his “career” (that’s us being generous) flip-flopping
on position after position to follow the wind in whichever direction he
thinks will help him win. But also, ew. 🤢

❌ We can NOT let JD win the race that will decide Senate control,
folks.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19435?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5130%2E3611125%2ELgGHA8 ]Pod Save America, You Save Ohio (and also America)—will you chip in $25
or more right now to make sure JD Vance steps nowhere near the Senate
floor?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.
